Name: Basatin Landscaping SPLLC
Description:
Whether it is a seasonal rotation of color, a retrofitting of an irrigation system, or a comprehensive landscape redesign, our environment friendly and cost-effective solutions will guarantee that your landscape reaches its full potential.

With our personalized service, we cover the entire value chain in the landscaping business. Whether it is our in-house landscape designers or our team on site, we have the ability and the resources to design and execute any enhancement you desire.

Name: Desert Group
Description:
Founded in 1988, Desert Group delivers trend-setting, sustainable landscape and horticulture solutions across the UAE and beyond. Built on a vision of transforming arid environments into vibrant green spaces, we’ve evolved from a landscaping pioneer into a multi-dimensional organization at the forefront of sustainable natural development.

In 2024, Desert Group proudly became part of Al Ghandi Group Enterprises, strengthening our foundation and accelerating our shared mission to shape greener, more livable communities across the region. This strategic partnership empowers us to expand our impact while continuing to deliver the same world-class quality and innovation our clients have trusted for over 35 years.

Our longevity is rooted in our customers’ trust and our proven ability to deliver technically advanced, design-driven solutions—on time, within budget, and to global standards. From large-scale landscape construction to advanced turfcare, irrigation, and agriculture, we continue to lead the industry with deep expertise and a passion for nature.

Desert Group has proudly partnered with iconic clients such as Emaar, Nakheel, Dubai Municipality, Meraas, Dubai Properties, Jumeirah International, Atlantis The Palm, The One & Only Royal Mirage, Park Hyatt, Museum of the Future, Sharjah Safari Park, and more.

Name: LandCare LLC
Description:
Inspiring Others with Meaningful Environments:
LandCare is committed to creating and maintaining meaningful environments for customers nationwide. We recognize that the work we do on your land has the power to impact your customers, your employees, and your visitors. So we offer you our care and our expertise to ensure your land makes a positive impression. Every time.

Professional:
The professionals at LandCare are passionate about landscaping. That’s because we recruit leaders who actually went to school for landscape management, horticulture, landscape architecture, irrigation, sports turf and tree care. It’s what gets us up in the morning. And it’s why we bring our best to the properties we serve. Every day.

Local Experts. National Reach.
LandCare owns and operates local branches coast to coast. So no matter what the challenge in your environment, you can rely on our local experts to keep it healthy and make it meaningful.

Our Core Values:
We are guided by a set of core values that were organically grown by our branch teams across the country. Our values aren’t just a set of blue-sky ideas. They’re actionable guidelines for each and every team member, from the executive staff to the pros out in the field.

Delight our customers. Every time.
Lead with confidence and integrity.
Work hard, smart and safe. Every day.
Inspire others with meaningful environments.
Have fun with a commitment to teamwork.

Name: Solutions+
Description:
At Solutions+, we believe in the positive power of great community spaces. We bring the plus for our customers, building and transforming landscapes to enhance communities, enrich lives and leave a lasting impact. 

With over 30 years in the landscaping industry behind us, Solutions+ brings together a wealth of experience, knowledge and skill. This paired with our desire to deliver the best is how we always bring the plus for our customers.

Name: Landscape Solutions
Description:
We are a full-service landscaping company specialising in civil landscape construction, landscape maintenance, sports turf and golf course management, building and irrigation. A team of over 600, since 1993 we have been successfully creating great places across Australia and New Zealand.

Since the day we first opened our doors, our vision has always been to maintain our humility, embrace opportunities and to look after our people and our customers. We are genuinely committed to the success of our customers. It’s what we believed in from the start and why we are where we are today.

Name: Yellowstone Landscape
Description:
Yellowstone Landscape began in 2008 with the unification of established, independently successful local and regional landscape companies. Since then, we’ve been linked by a common goal to better serve our clients, sharing decades of experience in landscape maintenance, landscape design and installation, landscape enhancements, irrigation systems, tree care, snow and ice management services, interiorscapes, and sports field maintenance. 

Yellowstone has become one of the industry’s fastest-growing and most trusted commercial landscaping firms, proudly serving more than 6000 client properties from local branch operations facilities across the United States. We offer a uniquely comprehensive selection of services, allowing us to serve a project through the years - from planning and design to a mature and thriving landscape in the ground.

Our 6500 Landscape Professionals are dedicated to creating and maintaining green spaces that enhance the quality of life where you live, work, and play. We provide professional landscaping services to some of the most outstanding homeowner associations, local and state agencies and municipalities, master-planned developments, hotels and resorts, corporate campuses, commercial office parks, schools, hospitals, apartment communities, and retail centers across the country. 

Meet with your local Yellowstone Landscape team and let us show you our commitment to excellence in commercial landscaping.

Name: Aqar Landscape LLC
Description:
Aqar provides high-quality expertise in hard-landscape, soft-landscape, ornamental gardens, irrigation systems, swimming pools, water features, electromechanical engineering, and much more. Aqar is a member of the Al Yusr group of companies, Oman.
Over the past four decades, Aqar has established itself as a market leader in the United Arab Emirates construction industry. The company's key operations are determined to complete projects to the best level of client satisfaction by offering cost-effective and value engineering solutions to our valued clients.

Name: Tornado Total Landscape LLC
Description:
Tornado Total Landscape LLC is a leading landscaping company based in the United Arab Emirates, delivering innovative, sustainable, and high-quality landscaping solutions since 2001. As a proud member of the Tornado Group, we specialize in comprehensive landscape construction, irrigation systems, hardscape and softscape works, infrastructure, and ongoing maintenance services.

With a commitment to environmental sustainability and excellence, we have successfully completed a wide range of high-profile projects across the UAE, including public parks, urban developments, community landscapes, roadsides, and private facilities. Our services cover the full spectrum of landscape development — from earthworks and planting to irrigation engineering and aesthetic design execution.

What sets us apart is our dedication to quality, safety, and client satisfaction. Backed by a team of seasoned professionals, engineers, and technicians, Tornado Total Landscape continues to transform outdoor spaces into living environments that enrich communities and support greener futures.

Let’s grow a greener tomorrow — together.

 Services:

• Landscape Construction
• Hardscape & Softscape
• Irrigation Systems
• Infrastructure & Earthworks
• Landscape Maintenance
• Public Beach & Resort Operations
• Environmental & Aesthetic Enhancements

 Headquartered in Abu Dhabi, UAE
 Visit: tornado-group.com

Name: Perfect Technical Works and Landscaping LLC
Description:
PERFECT Technical Works & Landscaping LLC was established in the year 2017 in Dubai, UAE, and is one of the most prestigious landscaping companies in the region. The company maintains professional integrity and a pioneering spirit while offering comprehensive solutions for all landscaping requirements.



PTWL services include hard landscaping, soft landscaping, automatic irrigation systems, water features, landscape lighting, specialized elements such as parks, palaces, swimming pool constructions, and hardscape elements.



PTWL has successfully executed several prestigious projects in the commercial, residential, leisure, and recreational sectors in the UAE. The company continues to exceed expectations by its strong commitment to professional quality and excellent customer service.

Name: Citiscape Group
Description:
Citiscape values its people as the most valuable asset. Our workforce comprises experienced individuals from diverse backgrounds, equipped with the necessary skills for our diverse project portfolio.

We prioritize efficiency and adhere to the latest engineering technologies, upholding national and international standards for quality, safety, and the environment. Our dedicated staff implements projects with a strong commitment to sustainability.

Our Projects teams are led by experienced leaders with accredited certifications, ensuring desired outcomes using innovative methodologies, reliable tools, and optimized resources for excellent performance.

Our main office technical team consists of qualified and certified engineers and technical staff in various divisions, covering pre- and post-contract project support functions including:

- Estimation & Tendering
- Contracts
- Design
- Planning
- Projects Control
- Quality team

We have a proven track record in delivering design and construction contracts timely and efficiently, under various contracting models. Our expertise spans across residential, theme parks, hotels and resorts, airports, roads, villas, apartments, and restaurants.

At Citiscape, we prioritize continuous development through regular training and collaboration with higher-ranked consultants and developers. Our strategic management, solid governance, innovation, and highly qualified staff have allowed us to successfully execute prestigious projects in the UAE for the past 18 years.

Our certifications and accreditations include:

- ISO9001:2015
- ISO45001:2018
- ISO14001:2015
- ICV (In Country Value) required by the Abu Dhabi government
- OSHAD (All our safety team is OSHAD certified)
- FIDIC (Our managers are FIDIC trained and certified)
- BIM (We have a special design team trained and certified in BIM modeling)

Join Citiscape and become part of our experienced and diverse workforce!

Name: Pine Landscaping Company
Description:
Pine Landscaping is a leading landscaping company in Saudi Arabia that has established a strong reputation in the market for providing top-notch landscaping services since 2006. With a strong team of experienced professionals, Pine Landscaping has proven its ability to execute mega projects with high-quality results.

One of the strong points of Pine Landscaping is its commitment to delivering innovative solutions that meet the unique needs of its clients. The company’s team of experts is skilled in using the latest technologies and techniques to create stunning landscapes that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.

Another key strength of Pine Landscaping is its focus on sustainability. The company is committed to using environmentally friendly practices in all of its projects, ensuring that its work has a positive impact on the environment.

Pine Landscaping’s vision is closely aligned with Saudi Arabia’s 2030 vision, which aims to diversify the economy and create more sustainable and livable communities. The company is committed to supporting this vision by creating beautiful and sustainable landscapes that enhance the quality of life for people in Saudi Arabia.
OUR MISSION
To provide our clients with inspirational landscaping services
that go beyond their expectations.

We are committed to using sustainable practices 
and materials that minimize our impact on the 
environment.

and dignity as we believe in conducting our business with 
honesty, transparency, and ethical practices.
 We put our clients' needs first and strive to deliver 
customized solutions that meet their unique 
requirements.
OUR GOAL
Our primary goal is to establish long-lasting relationships with our clients by providing exceptional landscaping services that meet their needs and exceed their expectations. We aim to become the go-to provider of
landscaping solutions by delivering high-quality
workmanship.

Name: Gothic Landscape
Description:
The Gothic story begins in the humble setting of the Georgio Family garage located on “Gothic Avenue” in the San Fernando Valley of Los Angeles. Louis Georgio provided the inspiration by founding “Georgio & Sons Landscaping” in 1968 initiating the family passion for the landscape industry. Upon his passing, Judy Georgio founded Gothic in 1984. Her son Michael was instrumental in driving Gothic’s growth and unique culture.

Gothic has remained family-owned and run by Jon and Ron Georgio alongside a highly talented leadership team. Our extended Gothic family continues to grow with over 1,800 dedicated landscape professionals servicing California, Arizona, Nevada and Utah.

We remain committed to our legacy values which include the success of our client-partners, our no excuses and no compromises approach, and our pledge to delivering extraordinary results.

Name: Landscape Middle East Awards
Description:
Now in its fourth edition, the Landscape Middle East Awards & Conference has become the region’s premier platform for celebrating excellence in landscape architecture and sustainable design.

Following the success of our previous editions in 2019, 2023, and 2024, the 2025 event will take place in Abu Dhabi—marking another milestone in our journey to elevate the profession across the Middle East.

Proudly hosted by Landscape Middle East Magazine, the 2025 edition is held in association with the International Federation of Landscape Architects (IFLA), the Saudi Society of Landscape Architecture (SSLA), the Oman Society of Landscape Architecture (OSLA), and the World Green Infrastructure Network (WGIN).

The event brings together design leaders, government planners, academics, and sustainability advocates to spotlight innovation and recognize projects that are shaping greener, healthier, and more inclusive cities across the region.

Description: At Garden of Joy, we design, execute, and maintain stunning gardens for homes, offices, and commercial establishments. Our services include garden design, plant selection, setup, and continuous maintenance to ensure a vibrant and healthy landscape.

Name: ASquared Landscape
Description:
ASquared is a Design/Build boutique specialized in the creation of luxury pools and landscapes for both commercial and residential sectors.

We are a one-stop shop for outdoor services providing holistic landscape solutions starting from design, construction, furnishing, styling, and maintenance for water structures projects. 

At ASquared specialization is our key. Our services go beyond what we provide, We are focused on showcasing our specialty in pools and landscapes with every factor and detail. We are pool and landscape experts with skill, practice, and passion. 

Taking part in more than 250+ successfully delivered residential and commercial projects across Egypt and now expanding its services to the UAE.

Name: Juniper
Description:
At Juniper, our team of over 3,200 is not just a number but a testament to our commitment to excellence. We provide quality services in all aspects of the green industry, from landscape architecture and planning to construction and maintenance. Our 200-acre growing operation ensures that the highest quality materials are used for every project we undertake. Our goal is to be the preferred company for designing, building, and maintaining your landscaping project. Our immense knowledge of plant science ensures that our clients receive the maximum quality and value.

Through it all, Juniper remains committed to its core values: sense of urgency, constant communication, mission over ego, 'we do what we say', relentlessness, and growth and adaptation. Values matter at Juniper, and we believe in Living Our Values Everyday (L.O.V.E.) to create raving clients. 

Our culture welcomes, grows, and celebrates people who share in our mission. We have training programs to help cultivate leaders such as our Landscaping Education Advancement Program (LEAP) a groundbreaking initiative designed to cultivate the next generation of leaders in the landscaping industry.

Every employee contributes directly to Juniper’s growth and success and we in turn support our employees by offering a comprehensive and competitive benefits program including Employee Assistance programs for times when extra assistance is needed. 

We are committed to diversity and inclusion by welcoming and valuing different cultures, ethnicities, genders and backgrounds. To propel that commitment, we have several D&I programs including the WILD Initiative (Women In Landscaping Dominate) which attracts, develops, and retains top female talent in the industry

Juniper distinguishes itself within the landscaping industry by giving back to our clients, employees and the communities we serve through our Juniper Cares programs with toy drives, breast cancer awareness, and much more.

Come be a part of the Juniper Community!

Name: Karaoğlu Peyzaj
Description:
Karaoğlu Peyzaj, kurulduğu 1994 yılından bugüne, 30 yıllık deneyimiyle doğa ve insan odaklı tasarım ve uygulamalar üreten, Türkiye'nin lider peyzaj firmalarından biri. 

İnşaat, altyapı, enerji, maden gibi pek çok sektöre değer katan peyzaj tasarım, uygulama, bakım ve doğa onarım projeleri gerçekleştiren Karaoğlu Peyzaj, alanında uzman yeteneklerin bir araya geldiği, multidisipliner ve tecrübeli bir teknik ekibe sahip. 

Karaoğlu Peyzaj, karma kullanımlı projeler, lüks segmente hizmet sunan oteller, dev konut projeleri, havalimanları, köprüler, otoyollar, demiryolları, boru hatları, eğitim kurumları, kurumsal yerleşkeler, hastaneler ve tıbbi tesisler ve kültürel varlıklar için peyzaj çözümleri geliştiriyor. 

Türkiye’nin bir ucundan diğer ucuna uzanacak kadar otoyol peyzaj uygulamaları yapmış olan Karaoğlu Peyzaj, bu deneyim ve uzmanlığını Bulgaristan’dan Etiyopya’ya, Rusya’ya kadar geniş bir coğrafyada sergiliyor.

Sürdürülebilirlik odaklı peyzaj çözümleriyle iklim krizine karşı sera gazı emisyonunu azaltan, kentlerin soğutulmasına, doğanın geri dönüştürülerek ekolojik dengenin korunmasına destek olan, insan ve doğa odaklı yaklaşımıyla, sürdürülebilir kentler için doğa tabanlı peyzaj çözümler sunan Karaoğlu Peyzaj; aynı zamanda Sakarya, İstanbul ve Ankara’daki, toplam 48 hektarlık ﬁdanlık üretim ve lojistik merkezlerindeki yüksek ihracat kapasitesi ve sunduğu hizmetlerle de ülke ekonomisine değer katıyor. 

Deloitte'un “Türkiye’nin En İyi Yönetilen Şirket” ödülüne layık görülen Karaoğlu Peyzaj, ulusal ve uluslararası alanda imza attığı projelerle ve başarılarla değer görüldüğü 10’dan fazla ödüle sahip.

Name: Southern Botanical
Description:
Southern Botanical is known as The Green Standard in the landscaping industry, serving as the #1 preferred landscape provider for prominent commercial properties and high-end residential estates in Dallas and Fort Worth. 

Offering comprehensive landscape services including lawn, garden, and irrigation management, certified tree care, and design-build services allows our team to deliver exceptional quality and value to each of our clients. 

Our award-winning projects have been widely recognized for exceptional beauty, innovation, and a commitment to sustainability. As a locally owned company, we are proud to service some of the most iconic properties in the Dallas Fort Worth area including Klyde Warren Park, George Bush Library, Dallas Zoo, Legacy West, and more. We see our work as an important way of developing and investing in our local community. 

Services are tailored to our client’s preferences and specific property needs – no two projects are the same, and we like it that way. Continuous communication keeps expectations aligned and allows us to develop long-standing relationships with clients. 

We are honored that word-of-mouth referrals have grown our business for 25+ years. It all started with a boy who wanted a bike. Dallas native, Jason Craven, began mowing neighborhood lawns when he was 12 years old to earn money for a new bicycle. His entrepreneurial spirit and attention to detail kept him going long after he bought that bike, and many of his original clients and employees are still with the company today. 

As Jason says, “there’s nothing magic about our services – we simply set high standards, do what we say we are going to do, and treat people right along the way.” Southern Botanical’s unique culture of service and achievement attracts talented team members and loyal clients to this day.

Name: Sperber Landscape Companies
Description: For over half a century the Sperber Family has designed, built, maintained, and beautified the landscapes of some of the most iconic resorts, corporate campuses, museums, and sports arenas. The Sperber Family has brought alive the vision of some of the world’s greatest landscape architects, and in the process, helped owners and developers create unique places of truly lasting beauty. Sperber Landscape Companies is the new chapter in the Sperber family legacy and brings unmatched knowledge, passion, and talent to every project it takes on.

Name: Al Ruaa Group
Description:
Al Rlruaa is a leading provider of comprehensive landscaping and irrigation solutions, dedicated to enhancing the built environment through innovative design, construction, and sustainable planting practices. Specializing in residential, commercial, and industrial projects, we offer a full suite of services that cater to the unique needs of each client, from initial concept development to long-term maintenance.

With years of experience in the landscaping and construction industry, we pride ourselves on delivering exceptional results that blend aesthetic appeal with environmental responsibility. Our expertise spans across a wide range of services, including:

Landscaping Design & Installation: Creating visually striking outdoor spaces that are functional, sustainable, and designed to thrive in the local environment.
Irrigation Systems: Installing water-efficient irrigation systems that ensure optimal plant health while conserving water, promoting sustainability, and reducing maintenance costs.
Hardscape Solutions: Designing and constructing high-quality patios, walkways, retaining walls, and other hardscape features that complement the natural landscape.
Planting Services: Curating and installing native, drought-tolerant, and aesthetically harmonious plantings that enhance the beauty and longevity of your outdoor spaces.
Site Preparation & Construction: Providing grading, drainage, and other site preparation services to ensure a solid foundation for your landscaping features.
We are committed to excellence and customer satisfaction, delivering every project on time and within budget. Our team is composed of certified horticulturists, landscape architects, and skilled construction professionals who are passionate about transforming outdoor spaces into vibrant, sustainable environments.

At Al Ruaa, we understand that every project is unique, and we work closely with our clients to ensure their vision is realized with precision and quality. Whether you’re looking to c

Name: BET LAMOUR
Description:
BET LAMOUR implanté à Marseille, Bordeaux, Hyères et La Rochelle est une société d’études et de Maitrise d'Œuvre qui s'organise en plusieurs pôles de compétences .
Le premier pôle traite des sujets de Paysage, Urbanisme et Mobilité. 
Le second pôle est spécialisé en Aménagement Urbain, VRD et Hydraulique. 
Le troisième pôle est spécialisé en déconstruction-désamiantage-déplombage, déchets et dépollution.
Le dernier pôle s'occupe des sujets d'OPC.

Le pôle Paysage, Urbanisme, et Mobilité intervient sur les sujets d'aménagement. Une sensibilité pour la Biodiversité, la végétalisation, la renaturation et la désimperméabilisation s'affirme dans nos projets.

Le pôle Aménagement Urbain-VRD-Hydraulique réalise des missions complètes nécessitant les compétences Aménagement Urbain, VRD, Hydraulique notamment la réalisation de Dossier Loi sur l'Eau, Terrassement, Vidéosurveillance, Contrôle d'accès, IRVE. Aidé de nos outils logiciels variés et performants, nous optimisons les projets afin de garantir le meilleur rapport Qualité-Coût-Délai.

Le pôle ENVIRONNEMENT assure des missions variées en rapport au désamiantage déplombage, à la déconstruction, à la dépollution et aux déchets. Nous réalisons des missions telles que des diagnostics PEMD, de la coordination déchets, du suivi de chantier pour accompagner au respect des chartes faibles nuisance pour l'environnement. Nous établissons des permis de démolir. Ce pôle assure l'ingénierie, et la maîtrise d'œuvre de tous les travaux de Réemploi, déconstruction, de désamiantage, de déplombage, de démolition, et de dépollution. 

Le pôle OPC s'occupe d'opérations diverses et variées.

Notre raison d'être :
Réinventer et concevoir collectivement des Aménagements où la préservation voire la régénération de la biodiversité est au cœur de nos engagements.

Name: MUGO - Paysage | Cultures | Biodiversité
Description:
Chez MUGO, nous sommes paysagistes, jardiniers, apiculteurs, fleuristes. 

Nous travaillons avec le végétal, pour la biodiversité, que nous replaçons au cœur de nos cadres de vie, professionnels, publics et privés. 

Nous accompagnons les collectivités, les entreprises, les architectes, les associations, les particuliers : tous les acteurs concernés par les enjeux de rénovation et d’aménagement durable des territoires.
Nous définissons la stratégie paysagère de nos clients, nous concevons et certifions des paysages vivants et les entretenons en ville comme à la campagne, en intérieur comme en extérieur, en pleine terre comme sur les toits.

Nous plantons des arbres. Nous produisons du miel. Nous intervenons de l’échelle de la jardinière à celle du grand paysage, du semis au compost. Nous agissons concrètement, et localement, partout en France.

Name: Hermes Landscaping
Description:
An established family firm, Hermes Landscaping remains focused on our vision to be a Best in Class organization, providing the highest quality landscape services to commercial and residential clients. Since 1965, this privately held family organization has been servicing the greater Kansas City metropolitan area with a full range of landscape design, construction, maintenance, and snow removal services.

Our mission is to make our world more beautiful, and we have done so through the creation and ongoing care of landscapes in commercial settings, living communities, and private homes. Through our unique blend of talents and expertise, our staff can create the ideal outdoor environment to complement any structure or living space. Whether that is providing beautiful green surroundings to enhance the workplace, improving the functionality of an outdoor area, or creating a unique space of tranquility in your home, Hermes is here to serve.

Hermes is known for designing and installing high-profile projects such as Children's Mercy Park, Garmin World Headquarters, the renovated KCI Airport, and many more. Hermes' talented designers and landscape architects consistently win prestigious awards, including NALP Gold Awards for the Linda Hall Library Renovations, TUKHS Cambridge North Tower, KU Medical Center Health Education Building, and Cerner, as well as NALP Silver Awards for Santa Marta and UHLIG. In the last 10 years alone, we've brought home over 30 awards.

We take great pride in the work we do and our company’s core values of Communication, Relationships, Excellence, Execution, and Developing people (CREED). We feel honored to be stewards of the environment and to consider so many customers our treasured friends.

Follow us on Facebook! https://www.facebook.com/HermesLandscapingLenexa

Nous touchons plusieurs marchés: btoc et btob 
Bureaux, boutiques, salons professionnels, hôtels, particuliers...

Name: Permaculture Design
Description:
PermacultureDesign c’est :
- un bureau d’études oeuvrant sous tous climats en France et à l’étranger (conception)
- des formations (sur site et en ligne)
- la transmission de la permaculture
- des lieux expérimentaux

Nos domaines d’actions sont :
- la création de sites et aménagements autonomes et durables
- la restauration et la revalorisation d’écosystèmes dégradés
- la conception de projets : touristiques, de loisirs, immobiliers, agricoles, urbains…
- la formation : pour les particuliers, professionnels, acteurs et porteurs de projet

Notre but est de participer à la transition vers un nouveau modèle de société durable où chaque être vivant a sa place et vit en équilibre avec son environnement. 
La particularité de notre bureau d’étude est de s’appuyer sur les 3 éthiques de la  permaculture :
 - être attentif à la terre et à ses besoins
 - être attentif à l’humain et à ses besoins
 - créer l’abondance, prendre son juste besoin et partager les surplus

Name: Clean Scapes
Description:
Clean Scapes Landscaping provides full-service commercial landscaping, specializing in the construction and maintenance of softscape, hardscape, and irrigation. Founded in 2005 by a core group of landscape professionals, we are one of Texas' finest landscaping leaders.

With our decades-long experience, we bring out the full beauty and creativity of a landscape’s design while providing attention to each detail. We are trusted to accommodate landscape projects of any size and can provide a multi-million dollar bonding capacity. More importantly, we are committed to the safety and well-being of all by adhering to a comprehensive safety program, reinforced by regular meetings, full training for new employees, and requirements that each crew member be outfitted with needed safety equipment.

As we endeavor to be the best guardian of each landscape, we know the importance of being vigilant environmental stewards. With this in mind, we source materials locally and use native plants to reduce irrigation needs. These practices are incorporated into our many LEED registered projects. Additionally, we are Green Garden Certified with the City of Austin to promote sustainable and environmentally-sound landscape practices. Furthering our commitment to the environment, we are stakeholders in the Central Texas Clean Cities Coalition. As such, we have converted our large mowers from gasoline-powered to propane-powered to reduce emissions and improve local air quality.

Our many clients—representing retail, office, mixed-use, multifamily, healthcare, education, civic, and resort properties—are confident in our abilities, professionalism, and history of delivering results. By continuing to meet and exceed expectations, we are building upon existing relationships and cultivating new ones.

Name: Enea Landscape Architecture
Description:
In 1973 Francesco Enea founded a company specializing in garden decorations. Later in 1993, Enzo Enea took over his father's business and gradually built it into the leading company in landscape architecture. Today, Enea is established in Switzerland and across the globe. 

With our landscape architecture we create value for generations. In our design, we promote the fusion of outdoor and indoor spaces, the creative intertwining of the spirit of the architecture with its surroundings. We call our philosophy Outside In.

Our award-winning firm is recognized for its ability to create complex designs and installations of private gardens and terraces, hotels, and resorts, as well as corporate gardens, public parks, and golf courses. We operate in all climate zones. The unique strength of the company lies in its capacity to offer the client a complete in-house service package, including the total realization and implementation of a project. 

Besides our landscape architecture and construction teams, Enea comprises also an interior design studio, a showroom for outdoor furniture, a concept store for indoor furniture and a carpenter’s workshop. 

The firm ‘s 240 employees come from 25 countries and bring to Enea a global perspective in landscape architecture and design. Apart from the Swiss headquarter in Rapperswil-Jona, Enea has affiliates in New York, Miami, Milan, and Zurich.

The project close to the heart of Enzo Enea, CEO, is the world's unique Enea Tree Museum in Rapperswil-Jona. More than 50 trees saved from felling are on display and visitors are raised in awareness of the human interaction with nature. The open-air museum, created in 2010, shows how landscape, botany, architecture, art, and design can be connected in an integrative manner.

Name: L'herbe & le geste
Description:
Je m’appelle Tom Briaud, fondateur de L’herbe & le geste – la pensée de la relation.

Cette micro-entreprise est l’aboutissement d’une reconversion professionnelle commencée il y a trois ans : un passage lent du regard au geste, de la recherche à la terre.

Formé à l’anthropologie, j’ai longtemps étudié les manières d’habiter, d’échanger et de prendre soin du monde. Puis j’ai travaillé comme ouvrier, apprenant la rigueur des rythmes, la valeur du concret et le sens de l’effort partagé. De là est née une conviction simple : le paysage s’apprend d’abord par le corps. C’est ainsi que j’ai choisi de devenir ouvrier-paysagiste, puis jardinier-paysagiste : pour unir le savoir et le faire, la pensée et la main.

L’herbe & le geste, c’est surtout et d’abord une manière de travailler.

J’entretiens les jardins privés, les petits ensembles collectifs et les espaces délaissés autour de La Rochelle avec une attention particulière au vivant et au rythme du lieu.

Mon approche repose sur trois principes simples :

• Un entretien raisonné, fondé sur la taille douce, le soin des sols et la réutilisation des rémanents (paillage in situ).
• Une mobilité douce, privilégiant les trajets à vélo + remorque ou utilitaire léger, pour limiter bruit, coûts et empreinte.
• Un parc électroportatif silencieux, entièrement sur batteries Stihl, pour intervenir avec précision et respect du voisinage.

Je propose deux volets complémentaires :

– Paysages : tailles, massifs, débroussaillage sélectif, petits aménagements.
– Nettoyages : remises en état, terrasses, murets, vitrerie.

Chaque intervention est documentée, facturée avec clarté, et pensée comme un acte de soin : écouter, alléger, maintenir l’équilibre sans rigidité.

L’herbe & le geste cherche à relier rigueur technique et attention poétique, à faire du geste un espace d’écoute, de transmission et de transformation.

C’est une petite entreprise, mais un grand engagement : faire tenir les choses avec justesse.

Name: August
Description:
Notre intervention vise à créer des lieux vivants, nés d’une lecture émotive du paysage, dont la richesse des références, des usages et l’efficacité des fonctionnements en font des œuvres à habiter.
Nous proposons la mise en place d’une démarche, qui va au delà de la mise en œuvre d’un espace formel, et qui tend à transformer un paysage en mobilisant tous les acteurs d’un territoire et en y injectant tous les éléments constitutifs de la ville durable : la culture, le jeu, les flux, l’agriculture, la nature, les enjeux et fonctionnements économiques locaux, et ce en stimulant la dynamique habitante.
L’objectif poursuivi est celui de l’émergence d’un système global durable par le paysage, assumant pleinement le contexte économique actuel : coûts minimisés et maîtrisés, système participatif, valorisation économique et écologique du paysage, permettant de renforcer l’équilibre du territoire dans toutes ses composantes, et menant à une affirmation de l’autonomie de la collectivité et de la responsabilisation collective.
Notre démarche oscille entre exigences d’ordre esthétique et culturel, technique, écologique, social, politique, économique, et en forme la synthèse pour aboutir à un projet pérenne et appropriable par tous.

A company founded on integrity, diversity, and safety. That is what Aspen Contracting Inc. offers every employee and customer. Since 1996 we have offered our customers a level of service and dedication that is unmatched. 

We are proud to be one of the Minority and Women - Owned Small Business Enterprises ("MWSBE") in the industry. When we began this journey we exclusively focused on meeting the needs of our New Jersey clients. However, the more projects we completed in New Jersey the more demand there was for us to complete projects in neighboring states. We currently offer our services in New Jersey, New York, Pennsylvania, Delaware, and many more states to come. In addition, Aspen is a union signatory in NJ, NY, PA, and DE.

As a company we decided to invest in our employees. We made this decision because without every employee doing their part there would be no Aspen.  As our employees skill set expands, so do our  services. We currently offer erosion control, hydro seeding, wetland migration, railroad spraying, landfill work, tree clearing, planting, soil stabilization, and so much more. We are excited to see what the future holds.

Comme artisans du cadre de vie, nous travaillons avec des formes et des matières vivantes. De l’idée à l’action, d’une vision contextuelle à la rigueur du détail, nous sommes une équipe de créatifs pragmatiques, ancrés dans la réalité des processus de projet.

Name: Nature's Way Resources
Description:
Nature's Way Resources is one of the most recognized and trusted manufacturers of high-quality landscape materials in the Houston and Gulf Coast areas. Our products are 100% organic and made naturally. We do not use any dangerous synthetic chemicals, toxic dyes, or sewage sludge (biosolids) which ensures they are safe for children, loved ones, and pets. We focus on soil biology to ensure our customers get the best products for their gardens and landscapes. The health of our soil is critical for our plants' overall growth and resilience. The life in our soil from bacteria, fungi, and earthworms drive soil fertility and gardening success. 

Nature's Way Resources has been recognized in many publications from the Houston Chronicle to the Wall Street Journal for the quality of our products, which are designed to feed and increase beneficial soil life. Our bags are sold through retail partners in plant nurseries, garden centers, feed stores, hardware stores and ecommerce. We are proud to be serving our communities for over 29 years and providing resources for a healthier lifestyle and a healthier environment. When we take care of the soil, it saves us time and money while providing us with better results and less problems with pests and diseases. Just the way Mother Nature intended!

Name: Hidrovetés Kft.
Description:
Ha füvesítésről van szó, a hidrovetés szolgáltatásaink mind az ipari, mind a lakossági igényekre egyaránt megoldást kínálnak. Tapasztalt szakemberekből álló csapatunk gondoskodik arról, hogy a fű gyorsan és egyenletesen nőjön, fenntartható és költséghatékony gyepesítési megoldást kínálva bármilyen zöldítési projekthez. 

Több mint 20 éves hidrovetés tapasztalattal és talajelőkészítési szakértelemmel rendelkezünk. Megoldást találunk akár a legnehezebb fűtelepítési vagy eróziószabályozási problémákra is. Csak a legbeváltabb, legkörnyezetbarátabb technológiát, és a legjobb minőségű hidrovetés termékeket használjuk kertektől a nagyobb fejlesztési projektekig.

Szinte egyedülálló gépparkunk van, amivel a kis kertektől kezdve a több hektáros területekig minden igényt kielégítünk. Gépparkunk nem csak a hidrovetéshez, hanem a kertek talajműveléséhez szükséges munkákra is alkalmas.

Name: Conseil National de l'Ordre des Paysagistes Français [CNOP]
Description: La création de l'Ordre National des Paysagistes en France sera une avancée majeure pour la reconnaissance et la promotion de la profession de paysagiste. Cet ordre jouera un rôle primordial dans la protection du paysage français en garantissant la compétence des paysagistes et en veillant au respect de la déontologie professionnelle. Il contribuerait également à la promotion des métiers du paysage et à la sensibilisation du public à la valeur du paysage. Grâce à l'Ordre National des Paysagistes, le patrimoine paysager de la France sera davantage préservé et valorisé, au profit du bien-être des générations présentes et futures. La création de l' Ordre National des Paysagistes en France représente un pas crucial vers la réglementation et la valorisation de cette profession passionnante et essentielle. En établissant des normes de qualité, en protégeant l'environnement, en promouvant l'excellence et en offrant une reconnaissance officielle, cet Ordre contribuerait à renforcer le rôle central des paysagistes dans la construction d'un environnement durable et harmonieux. En résumé, la création de l'Ordre national des paysagistes en France apporterait une reconnaissance officielle, une protection de la profession, une promotion de l'environnement, du professionnalisme et de l'éthique, ainsi qu'une collaboration et une innovation accrues. Cela contribuerait à renforcer le rôle et l'impact des paysagistes dans la société.

Name: Ringler Landscape
Description:
Our company prides itself in innovating within the landscape industry to provide resources and services to our clients that will eventually mold new standards for the industry.

We utilize in-house developed proprietary technology and processes to make each of our services convenient, personalized, and efficient for our clients.

We provide Full Service Commercial, Municipal, and Association Landscape Management services across Palm Beach County. We hold our team and projects to the highest standard of quality, and make it our mission to tailor our contracts to the specific needs of each client and community.

We also offer full service Landscape Design and Installation services for commercial, residential, and municipal clients. From basic graphic renderings, to blueprints, to full 3-d renders with video walk-throughs, we have a design service to fit any project. We don't utilize the "one size fits all" cookie-cutter landscape design routine that our industry has become so well known for. We have software and apps that our clients receive free access to when hiring us for a design service, where they can choose material and guide our designers towards their preferred taste and style.

Through our wholesale landscape supply & nursery company, Ringler Supply LLC, we import raw materials, and grow landscape materials in order to bring costs down for our clients, big and small.

We also have a landscape division specifically for sub-contracted services. These crews represent your company, utilizing un-marked vehicles, and un-marked uniforms.

Our goal is to provide quality customer service through work, communication, and planning. We look forward to working with you to create and execute a plan of action for your communities and projects, and to help incite a noticeable change in the aesthetics of your property.

As your needs change, we will be happy to help you evaluate those needs and
offer you the services that will help you achieve your new goals.

Name: Bahçe Bakım Otomasyonu
Description:
Bahcebakim.tr – Akıllı Bahçe Yönetim Sistemi

Bahçeler doğanın bize sunduğu en özel alanlardan biridir. Ancak düzenli bakım yapılmadığında, en güzel bahçeler bile kısa sürede canlılığını kaybedebilir. İşte tam bu noktada bahcebakim.tr, bahçe sahiplerinin ve profesyonel peyzajcıların en büyük yardımcısı oluyor. Kullanıcı dostu arayüzü ve zengin içerikleriyle bahçeniz için ihtiyacınız olan tüm bakım adımlarını planlayan dijital bir yönetim sistemi sunuyor.

Platformda 600’den fazla bitki, 10’dan fazla çim türü ve 50’den fazla peyzaj donatısı için özel bakım takvimleri yer alıyor. Bu takvimler, aylık görev listeleri halinde hazırlanarak kullanıcılara düzenli olarak sunuluyor. Böylece ister villa sahibi olun, ister site yöneticisi, ister bağımsız bir bahçıvan ya da peyzaj firması; bahçenizin ihtiyacı olan her şey size adım adım hatırlatılıyor.

Bahcebakim.tr sadece bakım hatırlatmakla kalmaz, aynı zamanda görev listeleri, aylık raporlamalar, hava durumu uyarıları ve otomatik PDF rapor indirme gibi özelliklerle bakım süreçlerini profesyonel bir seviyeye taşır. Kullanıcılar, kendi bahçelerini sisteme tanımlayarak bitki çeşitlerini seçebilir, istemedikleri öğeleri kaldırabilir ve tüm bakımı kişiselleştirilmiş bir şekilde yönetebilir.

Ayrıca platform, Mağaza entegrasyonu ile gübre, sulama ekipmanları ve bahçe bakım ürünlerini kullanıcıların hizmetine sunar. Abonelik sisteminde ise “Bedavacı Bahçıvan” planı temel ihtiyaçlar için ücretsiz sunulurken, “Amatör Bahçıvan” ve üst seviye planlarda sınırsız bitki seçimi, detaylı raporlar ve premium özellikler kullanıcılara açılır.

Bahcebakim.tr, sadece bireysel kullanıcılar için değil, peyzaj firmaları, park ve bahçe ekipleri, site yönetimleri için de toplu çözümler sunar. Bu sayede geniş alanların bakımı kolaylaşır, iş gücü verimli kullanılır ve hata payı minimuma iner.

Bahcebakim.tr – Akıllı Bahçelerinizde zamanı, emeği ve maliyeti doğru yönetmek istiyorsanız, bahcebakim.tr tam size göre. Daha fazla bilgi için www.bahcebakim.tr

Ytorna kan då klippas ofta, och klippresultatet blir bättre. MowFleet gör gräsytorna i parker, bostadsområden, kyrkogårdar, rondeller och andra platser i stadsmiljön både vackrare och grönare.

Name: Phoenix Power Recyclers
Description:
Phoenix Power currently manufactures in excess of 50,000 cubic meters of finished compost per annum. 
Their signature ‘Prescription Compost 100’ is used to make landscaping soils, soil conditioners and other growing media for agricultural and horticultural applications through premium soil-conditioning distributors.

Located in the continually growing Yatala Industrial Precinct within the Gold Coast region, the Sandy Creek Rd site is a comprehensive organics recycling facility predominantly handling food & green solid and liquid organics waste. 
In addition to organics, Phoenix produces biomass fuel from shredded timber products and oversize green waste.

Phoenix Power has approvals centred around developing an Eco-Cluster concept. At present the principle focus is the processing of food and garden waste (FOGO) to produce compost for direct sale or for onsite blending with top soils and other amendments.

Phoenix uses ‘Best Practice’ in-vessel composting technology that accelerates the initial phase of composting called ‘pasteurisation’. To utilise this technology all of the product accepted is blended with liquid and placed into purpose built concrete tunnels some 1250m3 in size, each ultimately holding approx. 500 tonnes of food & green waste along with a further 150 tonne of liquid waste.

Name: Uneterra
Description:
Uneterra es mucho más que una empresa de jardinería y paisajismo; es una pasión convertida en un compromiso con la naturaleza y la belleza de los espacios verdes. Nuestra historia se teje con la tierra misma, y nuestro compromiso con la creación, conservación y desarrollo de áreas verdes es inquebrantable.

Fundada en la hermosa ciudad de León, Guanajuato, Uneterra ha florecido como un líder en el mundo del diseño paisajístico y la jardinería, ganando reconocimiento tanto a nivel local como nacional por la excelencia en nuestros servicios y la calidad de nuestro trabajo.

Lo que nos diferencia es nuestra dedicación apasionada a cada proyecto. Cada jardín, cada paisaje, es un lienzo en blanco sobre el cual pintamos con plantas y elementos naturales. Trabajamos con precisión y atención al detalle, asegurándonos de que cada espacio refleje la visión de nuestros clientes y se convierta en un oasis de belleza y serenidad.

Nuestros valores son fundamentales en todo lo que hacemos. El servicio al cliente es nuestro faro, y nos esforzamos por comprender las necesidades individuales de cada cliente. Escuchamos con atención, colaboramos estrechamente y creamos soluciones personalizadas que superan las expectativas.

La innovación también está arraigada en nuestro ADN. Abrazamos las últimas tendencias en jardinería y paisajismo, incorporando tecnologías de vanguardia y prácticas sostenibles en nuestros proyectos. Nos enorgullece ser defensores del medio ambiente y trabajamos incansablemente para crear jardines que prosperen en armonía con la naturaleza.

Ofrecemos una gama completa de servicios, desde la planificación conceptual y el diseño ejecutivo hasta el mantenimiento residencial y comercial. Nuestros proyectos conceptuales son obras de arte vivas, donde cada planta, árbol y elemento decorativo se elige con cuidado y se coloca estratégicamente para crear una estampa visualmente impresionante.

Name: Robin
Description:
ROBIN is a commercial landscaping and outdoor execution brand delivering large-scale projects across Lebanon and Saudi Arabia. ROBIN is owned by Robinsons and operates digitally under robin-land.

We specialize in commercial landscaping, hardscape and softscape execution, and irrigation systems for contractors, developers, hotels, malls, compounds, and mixed-use developments. Formerly known as Robinsons, Robin was born from a long-standing legacy in agriculture and landscaping. Our new identity reflects growth, renewal, and a reinforced commitment to shaping outdoor spaces that are not only visually compelling, but engineered to perform and endure.

With roots dating back to 1966 in agriculture and an expansion into landscape development in 1996, we bring over six decades of technical expertise to every project. We work closely with developers, architects, consultants, and property owners to translate design intent into reliable, long-lasting landscapes — balancing aesthetics with functionality, sustainability, and maintenance realities.

Through Robinsons Arabia in KSA, we deliver landscaping solutions tailored to the region’s climate, scale, and operational demands, while upholding the same standards of precision, professionalism, and execution excellence that define our work in Lebanon.

Our services include landscape execution and construction, irrigation and water network systems, garden maintenance, and complete outdoor solutions for residential and commercial developments.

At Robin, our focus is simple: design with intelligence, execute with precision, and deliver landscapes that add long-term value.

Peyzaj tasarımı ve uygulama süreçlerinde, az zamanda sektöründe öncü firmalar arasına girmiş, fikirden üretime kadar tüm prosesleri kendi bünyesinde oluşturarak markalaşmayı başarmış bir firmadır.
Mir Doğa Ürünleri olarak öncelikli ve temel edindiğimiz amaç; 7’den 70’e tüm insanlara hitap edebilecek, herkesin sosyalleşmesini sağlayacak, şehir kargaşasından uzaklaşarak nefes alınabilecek yeşil alanlar oluşturmak ve insanların yenilenebileceği rekreasyon alanları kazandırmaktır.
Kaliteli ve sürdürülebilir yeşil alanlar için; Bitkisel ve Yapısal Peyzaj Tasarım ve Uygulamaları, Çocuk Oyun Elemanları ve Fitness Ekipmanları, Otomatik Sulama Sistemleri, Sert Zemin Temin ve Uygulamaları, Spor Sahaları ve Aktivite Alanları, Epdm ve Akrilik Zemin Kaplamaları, Hydroseeding Uygulamaları yaparak, tasarlanan yeşil alan içerisindeki her detay hakkında hizmet verebilen, tüm kullanımları kullanıcılara sağlayabilen bir firmadır.
Mir Doğa Ürünleri;Sürdürülebilirliği esas alarak tasarım ve uygulamaları ile çocuklar, gençler, yetişkinler ve engelli bireyler için konforlu, nefes alan ve yaşayan alanlar tasarlayarak, sosyal hayat konforunu arttırmaya yönelik hedef ile hareket etmektedir.
Sektöründe, Türkiye’nin adını diğer ülkelerde duyurmayı amaç edinmiş, ‘’Hayalinizdeki Tasarımı Gerçeğe Dönüştürüyoruz’’ sloganı ile çıktığı yolda yeni nesil peyzaj alanları ile Türkiye’de ve Dünyada başarılı projelerle adından söz ettirmeyi hedeflemiştir.
Sektörde farklılıklar yaratıp Türkiye’de ve Dünyada kalıcı üstünlükler sağlamak için çalışmalarımıza devam ettiğimiz hedefimizde, sizlerden alacağımız her türlü eleştiri-tavsiyeler, her zaman dikkate aldığımız yol gösterici unsurlar olacak, hedeflerimize yürümemizi ve gelişmemizi sağlayacaktır.

Name: Greenspace SOS (CIC)
Description:
Greenspace SOS is a non-profit Community Interest Company dedicated to revitalizing and maintaining greenspaces for the benefit of local communities. Our mission is to use all profits from our ground maintenance services to deliver free services for vulnerable people and groups in our communities, creating significant social value.

Our Core Values:
Ethical: We prioritize sustainable practices and zero-emission equipment to minimize our environmental impact.
Reliable: Our team is committed to delivering consistent, high-quality service.
Professional: We bring expertise in horticulture, sustainable landscape maintenance, property development, and project management.
Friendly: We foster a positive and collaborative atmosphere in all our interactions.

Our Services:
Commercial and Residential Grounds Maintenance: We provide comprehensive services including lawn care, landscaping, hedge trimming, and garden clearances. Our eco-friendly approach ensures well-maintained outdoor spaces.
Community Projects: Through our 'SAVE OUR SPACE!' initiative, we offer free clearance and renovation services to nominated areas, turning neglected spaces into functional green areas.

Impact and Outreach:
Our work creates multi-functional green spaces that enhance health and well-being, promote active aging, and build resilience against climate change. From sensory gardens to wildlife conservation areas and outdoor classrooms, our projects make a tangible difference in local residents' lives.

Looking Ahead:
We aim to strengthen partnerships with social housing organizations, local councils, and private enterprises while developing a robust volunteer network. Promoting environmental sustainability and social value remains a core objective; we are committed to zero emissions and educating clients on sustainable practices. To support these initiatives, we aim to secure additional funding, maintain financial stability, and reinvest all profits into free services and community projects.

Name: Babilon.cat
Description:
Babilon es una empresa comprometida con la conservación del medio ambiente y se siente orgullosa de ofrecer un producto que aporta mejoras y/o soluciones a la degradación de la calidad de vida de las ciudades y de sus edificios.

Los jardines verticales y las cubiertas ajardinadas aportan beneficios para el medio ambiente y para la salud. Absorben CO2 y por ello ayudan a reducir el efecto invernadero; pueden reducir hasta 5 grados la temperatura interior de los edificios en verano y mantienen la temperatura en invierno; generan ahorro energético por sus propiedades de refrigeración y aislamiento; habilitan espacios urbanos en desuso; crean un espacio muy agradable dentro del entorno urbano; crean un ecosistema en la ciudad que permite la integración de especies vegetales autóctonas.

En cuanto a los beneficios para la salud tenéis que saber que 1m2 de cobertura vegetal genera el oxígeno necesario para una persona durante un año; 1m2 de cobertura vegetal atrapa unos 30 gramos de polvo al año y una fachada de 60m2 de cobertura vegetal atrapa 40 toneladas de gases nocivos al año; esta misma fachada es capaz de atrapar y procesar 15 kg de metales pesados; los jardines verticales mejoran el rendimiento y reducen el malestar de las personas que los tienen instalados en sus lugares de trabajo; además el aislamiento vegetal reduce hasta 6 decibelios la contaminación acústica.

Es por estas razones que defendemos y proponemos la integración de la vegetación en la arquitectura y trabajamos para extender su uso y sus ventajas. Es evidente que hay muchas mejoras a realizar en la sociedad para que esta sea más respetuosa con el medio ambiente pero ya va siendo hora de devolverle a la tierra parte de lo que nos ha dado.

Name: La 5ème saison jardinier-paysagiste SÀRL
Description:
La 5ème Saison Jardinier-Paysagiste : Un Héritage de Passion et d'Expertise

Bienvenue sur la page de La 5ème Saison Jardinier-Paysagiste, une entreprise née d'une passion inébranlable pour l'art du jardinage et de l'aménagement paysager. Notre histoire commence il y a de nombreuses années avec juste une pelle, une brouette, et une détermination sans faille. En cultivant mon propre jardin, moi, Jeremy Contomanolis (administrateur actuel) a attiré l'attention de quelques voisins séduits par la beauté de mes aménagements et le choix méticuleux de mes végétaux. C'est ainsi que, petit à petit, La 5ème Saison a pris racine.

Aujourd'hui, nous sommes fiers de vous présenter une entreprise qui n'est pas seulement un prestataire de services, mais un véritable partenaire dans la création et l'entretien de vos espaces verts. Nous sommes une structure formatrice qui investit continuellement dans le développement de notre main-d'œuvre, assurant ainsi un savoir-faire à la pointe de l'innovation dans le domaine du paysagisme.

Notre équipe est dynamique et polyvalente, capable de gérer aussi bien l'entretien d'espaces verts que l'aménagement de jardins complexes. Nous proposons une gamme complète de services, allant de la conception sur mesure à la réalisation de vos projets de jardinage. Nos spécialités incluent l'installation d'arrosage automatique, la mise en place d'éclairage extérieur, la création de terrasses, et l'utilisation de pierres naturelles pour un rendu esthétique et durable.

Chez La 5ème Saison, nous croyons que chaque jardin est unique. C'est pourquoi nous travaillons main dans la main avec vous pour concevoir un espace qui reflète vos goûts et répond à vos besoins. Notre engagement envers l'excellence, notre approche personnalisée et notre passion pour le paysagisme nous permettent de transformer chaque espace vert en un petit coin de paradis.

Rejoignez-nous dans cette aventure verdoyante

IncoNed Groen is de inkooporganisatie voor bedrijven in de groensector. Door de inkoop van producten en diensten te bundelen, zorgen onze sectorspecialisten voor scherpe raamcontracten met A-leveranciers voor een heel scala aan productgroepen. Die profiteren op hun beurt van trouwe afnemers en alle partijen hebben voordeel van een gestroomlijnd proces met minder verkoop- en inkoopinspanning. Ons dataplatform maakt het mogelijk om het inkoopproces steeds verder te optimaliseren.

We ondersteunen het hele proces, van prijsvergelijkingen tot offertetrajecten, en nemen het desgewenst integraal uit handen. Maar we doen meer: we organiseren bijeenkomsten en kennisdagen voor onze deelnemers en jagen innovaties aan door partijen bij elkaar te brengen. Zo zorgen we als inkooporganisatie voor omzet- en margeverbetering, en dragen we actief bij aan de groei en verdere professionalisering van alle bedrijven waar we mee samenwerken.

Woningcorporaties, bedrijven, overheden, begraafplaatsen, projectontwikkelaars en onderwijs- en zorginstellingen zijn sectoren waar wij onze dienstverlening op richten. Name: CERCLE arquitectura del paisaje
Description:
CERCLE es un estudio especializado en paisajismo y arquitectura. Anna Bonet Asensi fundadora, coordina el estudio . Se trata de un proyecto abierto a la interacción y retroalimentación con todas aquellas disciplinas que tienen voz en el paisaje. Administraciones locales y autonómicas, empresas de ingeniería y arquitectura, universidades o particulares han confiado en nosotros para apoyarles en sus proyectos. Siendo las regiones de Valencia y Cataluña nuestro ámbito de trabajo más habitual, hemos desarrollado trabajos en otras comunidades y en otros países.

En CERCLE creemos en el trabajo en red como filosofía para enfrentar los retos que acontecen en materia de paisaje en los ámbitos de la planificación, la intervención, la gestión y la divulgación. 
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Cercle is made up of: Ignacio Díez Torrijos as Coordinator and founder, with Anna Bonet Asensi, María Amparo Jiménez Dolz and Patricia Sánchez Giménez, and is an open project fostering interaction and feedback with all those disciplines that have a voice in the landscape. Local and autonomous administrations, engineers and architects, universities and private companies have all trusted us to support them in their projects. Although the regions of Valencia and Catalonia are our common work environments, we have developed works in other communities and in other countries.

We believe in networking as a philosophy for the contemporary challenges that occur in the fields of planning, intervention, management and dissemination of the landscape.

Name: Beary Landscaping
Description:
We are on a mission to build, grow and maintain landscapes that enrich the environment for all.

Since 1985, Beary Landscaping has earned an impeccable reputation through our construction and landscape expertise. Our expansive roster of clients includes multi-family living communities and retail centers to Fortune 100 companies and government agencies. Beary is a provider of recurring landscaping and snow removal services to commercial end markets, including utilities, multi-family living communities, office buildings, municipalities and others. Beary currently serves over 1,500 customers across Illinois, Indiana, Kansas, Michigan, Pennsylvania and Wisconsin.

At Beary, our vision is to be trusted for taking the best care of the outdoor environment. That is why we give our clients and their landscapes the attention to detail they deserve: exceptional service, distinctive materials, and professional installation.

Our friendly workplace is rooted in our core values of accountability, trust, openness, and enjoyment. We own our individual work and outcomes, support each other’s growth, and promote proactive, honest communication. Together, we strive to get better every day—and have fun doing it! We also provide pay and benefits rivaling national landscaping companies.

Name: 800PERGOLA

We offer a variety of finishes like wooden, aluminum, bioclimatic, smart, automatic, retractable, and modern pergolas, all designed to complement your outdoor space and meet your specific needs.

No matter what style and finish you prefer, our team of experts will make it happen for you. Our team of experts has years of experience in the industry, and we are committed to delivering the highest quality workmanship and customer service. We know that every client is unique, and we take the time to understand your specific needs and preferences. We believe that communication is key, and we work closely with our clients to ensure that we meet and exceed their expectations.

At 800 Pergola, we believe that a well-designed pergola can transform your backyard into a dream oasis. It can provide shade, shelter, and a place to relax and unwind. Our team is passionate about creating beautiful and functional outdoor spaces that you will love to spend time in. 

Don't wait any longer to create the backyard of your dreams. Book now with 800 Pergola and let our team of experts help you turn your vision into a reality.

Name: Georgia Urban Agriculture Council
Description:
The Georgia Urban Ag Council is the unifying voice of Georgia’s landscape, turfgrass, and horticulture industry (urban agriculture), empowering professionalism through leadership, advocacy and education.

The Georgia Urban Ag Council fuels the growth of the landscape, turfgrass, and horticulture industry (urban agriculture) by strengthening professional standards, delivering high-quality education, providing impactful advocacy, and cultivating the next-generation workforce.

Our members include professionals involved in all sectors of the urban agriculture industry, including landscape installation, design and  maintenance businesses, turf grass and sod growers, the nursery and horticulture industry, landscape architects,  irrigation contractors, green wholesalers,retail garden centers, floriculturists, florists, golf courses and their related businesses.

UAC represents one of the largest and most successful industries in Georgia, with more than $10 billion in sales, 8,000 companies and more than 100,000 employees.

Founded by Director Rhys Woods, the business has grown from a small local service into a professional contractor trusted by both public and private sector clients.

Sustainability is at the heart of everything we do. We proudly hold the Small Business Sustainability Mark and the Supply Chain Sustainability School Gold badge, underlining our commitment to environmental responsibility and continuous improvement. Our 4-acre orchard is managed without chemicals, and produce is donated to local food banks and community groups, making sustainable food more accessible to all.

Health, safety, and wellbeing are equally central to our culture. Our Director is trained in IOSH Managing Safely, Directing Safely, and Occupational Health & Wellbeing, ensuring strong leadership in compliance and risk management. We are fully accredited with SafeContractor and CHAS, giving clients confidence that every project is delivered safely and to the highest professional standard.

We also take pride in being part of several leading charters and pledges:

NHS Mental Health Charter

Mindful Employer & Mental Health at Work commitments

Armed Forces Covenant

Living Wage Employer

SME Climate Hub Pledge

As part of our SafeWorkforce three-year contract, all staff have direct access to Chartered Health & Safety consultants from 9–5 every working day, ensuring robust support and compliance across every job.

We combine modern systems with traditional values. Our clients benefit from a secure online portal that provides real-time updates on works, including geotagged progress, reports, and site records – giving full transparency, accountability, and peace of mind.

At RW Landscaping Ltd, we don’t just maintain landscapes – we build trusted partnerships. Our approach is guided by our slogan: “Thrive. Comply. Support.” We are proud to deliver safe,

Wir sind entschlossen, die Branche positiv voranzutreiben und setzen uns leidenschaftlich für Umwelt, Natur und Artenschutz ein. Aus diesem Grund konzentrieren wir uns auf Themen wie Klimawandel, Biodiversität, Digitalisierung, grüne Urbanisierung sowie Fachkräftesicherung.  

Wir fördern hochwertige Arbeit und schaffen Chancen, von denen unsere Umwelt profitiert. Wir Landschaftsgärtnerinnen und Landschaftsgärtner sind stolz auf unsere Arbeit, stehen hinter unseren Mitgliedern und bilden eine starke Gemeinschaft, die füreinander da ist. 

Unsere Strategie ist ein klares Versprechen: Wir gestalten eine Welt, in der der Garten- und Landschaftsbau neue Maßstäbe setzt, in der Nachhaltigkeit gedeiht und unser Lebensraum erblüht.

Name: garDsign
Description:
Een tuin ontwerpen is een vak apart. Maar met de juiste tools kan iedereen het leren. Het online ontwerpprogramma garDsign neemt je stap voor stap mee op weg naar een digitale tekening van een nieuwe tuin. In 2012 ging www.tekenjetuin.nl van garDsign live. Sindsdien zijn al duizenden droomtuinen via het platform ontwikkeld. 

Het programma is eenvoudig en gebruiksvriendelijk. Daarnaast zijn er veel instructievideo’s met extra uitleg over de online tekentool beschikbaar. Bijvoorbeeld hoe je de zon en schaduw kunt simuleren of een goed plan maakt voor de bewatering van de tuin. Achter de schermen werkt het gedreven team van garDsign continu aan nieuwe features om het programma nóg handiger en completer te maken. De nieuwste updates richten zich vooral op het verder digitaliseren van de werkwijze.

Naast de online tekentool is garDsign in de loop der tijd uitgegroeid tot een breed kennisplatform vol artikelen, blogposts en video’s met tips en tricks. Onder het motto ‘groen verbindt’ leggen we steeds nieuwe verbanden en delen we onze kennis. garDsign helpt jou als professional met het maken van een impact bij het verbeteren van de leefomgeving. Dat doen we met een concrete en praktische insteek: door tools en hulpmiddelen aan te reiken, en onze uitgebreide (groen)kennis met je te delen. Dat zit van nature in ons.

garDsign is een echt familiebedrijf dat is ontstaan vanuit de praktijk. Bevlogen oprichter Teunis van de Pol heeft diepgewortelde vakkennis van de groen-, bouw- en infrabranche. Samen met zijn hechte team staat hij 24/7 klaar om de gebruikers van garDsign te ondersteunen: praktisch, nuchter en betrokken

Pour assurer la sécurité de nos ouvriers, qui est notre priorité, nous déployons des moyens considérables.
La gestion des eaux, l’écologie et la biodiversité sont au cœur de nos préoccupations et nous trouvons toutes les solutions dans la nature. 
Lutter contre les effets du réchauffement climatique et les inondations en participant activement au développement d’une ville-éponge, vivante et intelligemment arborée constitue notre motivation. 
C’est la raison qui nous a poussé à développer au sein de l’entreprise un bureau d’étude, capable de vous accompagner de la conception à la réalisation de votre projet, et l’entretien des surfaces vertes.
Nous sommes aujourd’hui très fiers de notre activité et notre impact positif sur le paysage et nous continuons d’améliorer jour après jour la qualité de vie de nos concitoyens.

Name: Groupe Fages
Description:
Le Groupe Fages est né de deux passions ; celle de la nature et celle d’entreprendre. En 1989,  L’aménagement du territoire est au cœur de son évolution à la Réunion, et de nombreux acteurs participent au développement des espaces de vie. 

Pour répondre à une partie des besoins en matière d’aménagement du territoire régional, Patrice Fages crée la première entreprise du Groupe, Sapef Paysage, avec pour cœur de métier, le végétal. 

Plus de 30 ans après sa création, le groupe s’est développé et acquis une expérience forte et un savoir-faire du génie végétal en milieu tropical. Tout en préservant sa dimension humaine, sa qualité de service et son engagement environnemental.

Patrice Fages, fondateur dirigeant du Groupe Fages est également Président de l’Union des Horticulteurs et Pépiniéristes de la Réunion (UHPR). Depuis 2015, il livre un vibrant plaidoyer pour la filière horticole de l’île, en défendant une horticulture respectueuse de l’environnement et de la flore endémique de La Réunion et de l’archipel des Mascareignes
A son initiative l’UHPR lance la marque collective « Plant’Péi » en 2019. Une action parmi de nombreuses autres destinées à donner à la filière horticole réunionnaise toute sa place dans le paysage agricole et économique de l’île.
Avec pour cœur de métier le végétal, le groupe développe depuis 1989 ses activités d’aménagement d’espaces de vie durables à la Réunion, à Mayotte, et sur la zone Océan Indien en adaptant aux besoins du marché.

L’activité de paysage amène la création en 1996 de la Pépinière du Théâtre. En 2001, le groupe lance la Jardinerie du Théâtre, dans la même année Sapef complète son activité avec la création d’aires de jeux extérieurs et de terrains multisports. En 2012, implantation de Sapef à Mayotte. En 2018, création de l’espace évènementiel La Petite Bulle.

Name: Farmscape
Description:
When Farmscape started in 2008, our vision was to create gardens where food could travel a matter of feet from the backyard to the dinner plate. Since then, founders Dan Allen and Lara Hermanson, along with a team of experienced farmers, builders and designers, have built hundreds of organic, urban farms across California.

During that time, we’ve grown fresh produce for the best restaurants in California (n/naka, Providence), and tackled rooftop farms in downtown LA and the Bay Area (Jonathan Club, Levi’s Stadium). Our farms grow food in Silicon Valley campuses (PayPal, Samsung, Oracle, Adobe) and in agrihoods like Rancho Mission Viejo in Orange County. While the projects have grown in size, the fundamental goal has remained the same: connecting people to a fresh, local food source right in their own backyard. 

Our vision has also expanded beyond food to include low-water, sustainable landscaping as we have observed the impact of climate change and a limited water supply on farmers in California. 

Today, we offer design, installation, maintenance and programming services for projects to further our mission.

Conscients de notre responsabilité écologique, nous mettons en œuvre des systèmes d'arrosage et des fontaines qui préservent l'équilibre naturel tout en sublimant les paysages.

Description:
Bahçem Tamam Süs Bitkileri Ticaret ve Sanayi Limited Şirketi, 2023 yılında kurulmuş bir firmadır. 
Müşterilerimize kaliteli süs bitkileri ve bahçe ürünleri sunma vizyonuyla yola çıktık. 20 yılı aşkın sürede sektördeki deneyimimizi değişen günümüz teknolojilerine ayak uydurmak ve online satış yapılabilen bir platform olabilmek adına yeni bir kimlik ile karşınıza çıktık.

Firmamız, yenilikçi yaklaşımıyla sürekli olarak müşteri memnuniyetini ve kaliteyi ön planda tutmaktadır. Geniş ürün yelpazemizde, iç ve dış mekanlar için çeşitli bitkiler, çiçekler, saksılar, bahçe aksesuarları ve dekoratif ürünler bulunmaktadır. Müşterilerimize estetik ve doğal yaşam alanları yaratmalarına yardımcı olmak için en iyi ürünleri sunmayı amaçlıyoruz.

Bahçem Tamam, sürdürülebilirlik ve çevre bilincine büyük önem vermektedir. Bu nedenle, ürünlerimizi yetiştirirken ve tedarik ederken doğal kaynaklara saygı gösteriyor ve çevreye zarar vermeden üretim yapıyoruz.

Müşteri odaklı yaklaşımımız ve kaliteden ödün vermememiz, bizi sektörde önde gelen bir konuma taşımıştır. Bahçem Tamam olarak, müşterilerimize güvenilirlik, kalite ve estetik sunmaya devam edeceğiz ve onların bahçe ve iç mekanlarını güzelleştirmelerine destek olmaya devam edeceğiz.

Name: PLATAN
Description:
Créations végétales sur-mesure pour les entreprises
 Animations d'ateliers main verte Team Building


QUI SOMMES-NOUS ?

Platan, c'est un atelier qui végétalise sur-mesure vos espaces & vos évènements. 
Nous sommes spécialisés en design végétal et nous réinjectons cette dose de Nature partout où nous le pouvons : murs & plafonds, logos, scénographies, photocalls... et même dans du mobilier ! Dans toutes nos créations, nous essayons de retranscrire au mieux vos envies et votre identité de marque. Nous accompagnons votre projet de A à Z, du visuel jusqu'à la pose  dans vos locaux.

Nous travaillons principalement avec des végétaux stabilisés : de vraies plantes figées dans le temps par un processus 100% écologique. Les créations ne nécessitent donc aucun entretien (ni d'arrosage, ni de lumière particulière) & restent tel quel plusieurs années ! La plupart du temps, elles peuvent être déplacées & réutilisées dans d'autres espaces.
Nous privilégions le circuit court en nous fournissant dans des pépinières locales, & nous utilisons au maximum des matériaux respectueux de l'environnement : plastique recyclé & recyclable, bois labellisé FCS... 

Outre l'aspect esthétique, la présence de végétaux sur nos lieux du quotidien a un impact positif sur notre santé & notre environnement. Elle créé une atmosphère apaisante, favorise le bien-être & possède des vertus acoustiques. 


NOTRE HISTOIRE

L’atelier germe lors de la rencontre de Marine et Laura à Buenos Aires. Là bas, la végétalisation omniprésente inspire les deux jeunes femmes.
En rentrant à Paris, elles s’associent pour créer Platan !

L’objectif ? Végétaliser les lieux de notre quotidien & ramener la Nature
au sein des entreprises de plus en plus engagées.

Platan contribue à son échelle à la végétalisation urbaine pour un Paris
toujours plus vert ! 

Aujourd'hui, Platan est une entreprise à taille humaine passionnée & prête à relever toutes vos demandes de végétalisation sur-mesure.

Name: Growsters
Description:
Growsters accompagne les entreprises, les acteurs de l’immobilier et les collectivités dans la transformation de leurs espaces urbains en lieux vivants, utiles et durables.

Nous concevons et pilotons des projets qui réconcilient nature et usages urbains, en apportant des réponses concrètes aux enjeux actuels des décideurs : biodiversité, bien-être, attractivité des sites, engagement RSE, lien social et durabilité économique.

Growsters développe des projets à forte valeur d’usage, pensés pour s’inscrire dans le temps.
Les espaces créés redonnent aux espaces verts des fonctions concrètes : lieux de respiration, de production, de pédagogie, de rencontre et d’appropriation collective. Ils répondent à un désir de nature devenu central chez les habitants, les salariés et les élus.

Notre valeur ajoutée repose sur une approche globale et structurée, de la stratégie à l’exploitation :

- Audit et conseil stratégique pour aligner objectifs environnementaux, usages, faisabilité et contraintes économiques

- Conception sur mesure, adaptée aux contextes urbains et aux parties prenantes

- Maîtrise d’œuvre / AMOA, pour sécuriser la réalisation opérationnelle des projets

- Animation, gestion et pérennisation, en embarquant les usagers et les acteurs locaux

Growsters s’inscrit dans une vision exigeante de l’agriculture urbaine et des espaces verts comme leviers de transformation des villes.

Nous croyons à des villes conçues comme de véritables écosystèmes vivants, où nature, santé, alimentation et bien-être cohabitent durablement.

Name: Lilly Landscape
Description:
Lilly Landscape offers a comprehensive suite of landscaping services and solutions:
1. Site inspection: to agree on the plants used and identify the best methods for its vegetative growth throughout the year

3. Install irrigation systems (manual, automatic, and smart)
4. Natural and chemical fertilization programs: Establishing a fertilization program that helps the plant grow and gain its dark green color, as well as supplying the plants with elements that help them complete their flowering processes.
5. Pest prevention and treatment programs
6. After-sales maintenance services:
a. Irrigation operations for villas and other residential units
b. Cut greenery once a week in summer and once every 15 days in winter
c. Cut and trim trees, shrubs and soil data once a month
d. Weekly turning the basins and removing waste and litter from the soil
e. Waste collection into plastic bales
f. Change dead plants resulting from any deficiencies in maintenance and irrigation
g. Carrying out maintenance operations for irrigation networks in the public site and changing parts of the network that may be damaged
