Name: ALEP Paysage
Description:
Alep, architectes paysagistes à Cadenet, a une solide expérience dans l’aménagement des sites patrimoniaux « ouverts au public » sites « à vocation naturaliste » et projets en contextes urbains sensibles.
Confrontés à la problématique des Opérations Grands Sites, nous avons formé une équipe pluridisciplinaire associant paysagistes, architecte, scénographe et naturaliste.
L’équipe veut développer une démarche interactive entre l’analyse et la programmation des activités et des usages, les qualités intrinsèques du site et l’histoire qu’il peut raconter.
En associant mise en valeur des éléments naturels - la matrice biologique – et la composition générale projetée - l’architecture de déambulation - notre atelier développe une approche vivante et globale du projet.
Créé en 2003 par Philippe DELIAU et Juliette HAFTECK, Alep est un bureau d’études installé à Cadenet (84). Il est composé de 12 personnes et s’associe régulièrement avec des agences dans toute la France.

Alep s’est positionné depuis longtemps en « paysagiste de site », avec une approche globale de l’aménagement d’un espace : l’esprit des lieux, la vocation des différentes entités et leurs possibilités d’évolution, la qualité de la trame paysagère, l’équilibre entre les espaces ouverts ou fermés, les facteurs pour créer un territoire vivant...
Pour que le projet raconte une histoire, l’analyse du site et de son identité (patrimoniale, historique, biologique,…) est donc primordiale et nécessaire pour arriver à mettre en synergie un contenu et un parti d’aménagement.
Cette démarche doit correspondre à un état d’esprit de projet, un vocabulaire particulier, pour transmettre aux visiteurs, dès leur arrivée sur le site, un mode de vie et de compréhension du lieu qu’ils viennent visiter.

Smart Irrigation & Lighting Solutions
Residences, Resorts & Hospitality Projects
Institutional & Corporate Campuses
Garden Care & Maintenance Programs
Community Engagement & Green Living Workshops

Core Values – The 5R Framework
The 5R Framework is Jingle Jungle’s core value — a disciplined process that ensures every landscape is designed with clarity, executed with precision, and sustained to last.
Root – Ground every design in scientific site study and real-life function.
Render – Visualize the landscape with clear 2D/3D outputs for confidence.
Refine – Engineer details in plants, materials, irrigation, and lighting for longevity.
Realize – Execute with precision, clean handovers, and on-time delivery.
Retain – Sustain design integrity and plant health through long-term care.

Name: Suardi S.r.l.
Description:
Vantiamo un’ampia esperienza nel settore della gestione (costruzione e manutenzione) del verde urbano, extra urbano, stradale, autostradale, immobiliare e privato e specifiche competenze per le varie lavorazioni incluso posa di recinzioni in parchi e giardini anche storici  ed in ambito autostradale, opere edili, opere stradali, impianti di irrigazione e fontane, posa giochi e pavimentazioni antitrauma e arredo urbano, opere di ingegneria idraulica e naturalistica (piantumazioni forestali e qualsivoglia alberature ed arbusti, idrosemina, cartellonistica varia).

Ci occupiamo anche di costruzione e manutenzioni di campi da calcio in erba naturale ed in erba sintetica oltre a campi da tennis, basket e pallavolo.

Ad oggi, siamo la maggiore Società di costruzione e manutenzione del verde (Categoria SOA OS24) della Provincia di Cremona, sia per dimensioni che per numero di dipendenti impiegando fino a circa 50/60 addetti nei picchi di lavoro stagionale ed operando con l’ausilio di oltre 55 mezzi, tra autocarri, macchine operatrici, trattori, escavatori, pale, terne, fresa asfalti, finitrice, rulli vibranti. 

Nel campo dei servizi e dei lavori di giardinaggio siamo i primi fornitori di Comuni ed Enti Pubblici in provincia di Cremona anche se l’attività si estende in tutta Italia nei settori pubblico e privato.

Eseguiamo anche:
Lavori di Categoria SOA OG1: rifacimento e manutenzione edifici civili ed industriali.

Lavori di Categoria SOA OG3: manutenzione e costruzione strade, ponti, viadotti e piste ciclabili.

Lavori di Categoria SOA OG8: opere fluviali, di difesa e sistemazione idraulica e bonifica, sfalcio, decespugliamento arginature, sollevamento, sbarramento, laminazione piene, pronto intervento, spargimento sale e servizio neve.

Lavori di Categoria SOA OG13: opere di ingegneria naturalistica, idrosemina, messa a dimora alberi, interventi di consolidamento.

Lavori di Categoria SOA OG6: costruzione e manutenzione Acquedotti, Fognature e impianti di irrigazione.

Name: Art'rosage Sàrl
Description:
En décembre 2022, j'ai fondé Art'rosage avec la vision de révolutionner l'approche de l'arrosage automatique pour assurer une irrigation efficace et durable. En tant qu'experts en études d'arrosage, nous nous engageons à repousser les limites de l'efficacité dans le domaine de l'irrigation.

**À propos d'Art'rosage :**

 **Mission :** Chez Art'rosage, notre mission est de concevoir des solutions d'arrosage automatique personnalisées pour répondre aux besoins spécifiques de chaque client. Nous croyons en l'importance d'une irrigation efficiente pour préserver l'eau et favoriser la santé des plantes.

 **Expertise :** Notre équipe dévouée est composée d'experts passionnés en arrosage automatique.  **Services :** Art'rosage propose une gamme complète de services, de l'évaluation des besoins en eau à la conception de systèmes sur mesure, en passant par l'installation et la maintenance. Gramenz Galabau

Das 1957 gegründete und in Wiesbaden-Erbenheim ansässige Unternehmen Gramenz zählt zu den führenden Garten- und Landschaftsbauunternehmen im Rhein-Main-Gebiet.

Unzählige Außenanlagen im privaten und öffentlichen Bereich wurden in den vergangenen Jahrzehnten erstellt. Die Auftraggeber haben Gramenz dabei als flexiblen, leistungsstarken und kompetenten Partner schätzen gelernt. Basis des Erfolges sind die über 180 langjährigen, fachlich qualifizierten Mitarbeiter ebenso wie die 100 Mitarbeiter von Partnerfirmen, mit denen gemeinsam Projekte realisiert werden. Der Einsatz moderner Maschinen und Arbeitsmittel garantieren unseren Kunden einen hohen Qualitätsstandard.

Als Ausbildungsbetrieb mit 40 Auszubildenden bieten wir jungen Menschen hervorragende Zukunftsperspektiven. Ein respekt- und vertrauensvoller Umgang gehört zum Leitbild der Firma ebenso wie das Ansinnen, Ökologie als Herausforderung für die Zukunft anzunehmen.

Um noch besser für eine lebenswerte Zukunft arbeiten zu können, wurde das Unternehmen mit Wirkung zum 01.01.2010 umstrukturiert. Es entstanden neue, leistungsstarke Geschäftsbereiche, die auf einzelne Fachgebiete spezialisiert sind und sich voll und ganz auf ihre Spartenkompetenz konzentrieren können. Straffe Organisation, gebündelte Kompetenz, starke Teams – das bedeutet: noch mehr Gramenz-Power für Garten- und Stadtlandschaften.

Im Jahr 2018 wurde auf dem Firmengelände ein neuer Ideengarten gebaut und eingeweiht. Dieser kann an sofort besichtigt werden. Die Öffnungszeiten variieren je nach Jahreszeit und können auf unserer Website eingesehen werden.

Name: Gouttes de Vert
Description:
Et si vous cultiviez votre nourriture dans votre entreprise ?

La création de mon activité part d'un constat : 
Nous plaçons à des kilomètres de nous, ce qui nécessite le plus notre attention : notre alimentation. 
Notamment les petits fruits et produits frais. 

Or, tous les sols sont cultivables. 
Qui plus est, les endroits en ville pour y planter du comestible sont plus que nombreux. 


 MON MÉTIER  

Je suis jardinière-paysagiste. 
Convaincue que notre nourriture fraîche doit être cultivée au plus près de nous, je vous propose un service innovant :

Installer un jardin comestible dans ton entreprise. 

Non seulement, avoir un jardin nourricier permet à chacun d'entre nous de rentrer dans une réelle transition écologique. 
Mais il permet aussi de faire revenir la biodiversité dans nos villes et de réduire nos déplacements. 
Et ce ne sont là que quelques bienfaits parmi tant d'autres. 

Aujourd'hui, je me nourris avec un jardin urbain de 300 m2. 
Il me fournit en fruits et légumes et accueille un maximum de biodiversité.
Pour cela, je m'inspire des principes de la permaculture. 


 MES SERVICES  

Je vous accompagne du début à la fin, pour que vous ayez toutes les clefs en main. 

 Diagnostic jardin : visite de votre lieu, réponse à toutes vos questions, résolution de vos problématiques, établissement d'une stratégie. 

 Conception : je réalise votre plan de jardin pour vous permettre de vous projeter et de vous organiser à l'année avec vos rotations et associations de culture.

 Installation : j'installe votre jardin, avec apport de matières organiques, plantations, semis, tuteurs, paillage...

 Entretien : je propose 4 sessions d'entretien, une par saison, pour commencer à vous guider après l'installation de votre jardin. En plus de renouveler les matières organiques présentes et les plantations, je vous transmets mes connaissances et vous montre les bons gestes.

 Animation : j'anime des ateliers jardinage pour les entreprises.

Name: Peepal India
Description:
We help individuals and organizations in transforming spaces into gardens that look good and stay good, too. Our garden design approach strikes a fine balance between aesthetics and sustainable practices, thus creating low-maintenance and thriving spaces. 

Peepal came into existence while seeking answers to 3 critical challenges that stand in front of us today. We embarked on this journey to achieve three objectives - personalization, wellbeing and sustainability for our clients and our environment. 

1. Challenge 1: One size doesn’t fit all
In the world of gardening, gardeners are of all kinds. New or existing. Young or old. Active or casual. Every space demands its own design sensibility. 

Our response: Customisation. We have no set menu of gardens to choose from. Peepal is one such garden where gardeners, artisans, designers, and all kinds of experts come together to make your dream garden truly unique.   

Challenge 2: Over-commercialization of plants
Plants are largely looked as ornamental products, face neglect for their therapeutic power and subject to harsh chemical treatments.  

Our response: Well-being. Plants make a great addition to your décor and your senses. However, this experience can be daunting if style takes over sustainability. We aim to create therapeutic gardens that serve it’s creator’s purpose as well as our ecosystem’s. 

Challenge 3: Gardening itself is increasingly becoming non-eco-friendly with rampant use of exotic plants, plastic products, chemicals. It not only degrades our ecosystem but also puts the maintenance burden on people. 

Our response: Sustainability. A garden should serve its people. When you grow a plant, you brighten your life but also of several other species who depend on them - birds, bees, butterflies. Peepal transforms spaces into such thriving gardens that don’t just look good but also do good.

Name: Trophic Design Inc.

Guided by the principles of FPIC, OCAP, and Etuaptmumk (Two-Eyed Seeing). We see land not as a backdrop — but as a living partner in all design work. Our practice weaves together ecology, culture, and design to support relationships between people, place, and All Our Relations. We collaborate with communities, institutions, and teams across Canada to create landscapes that reflect respect, reciprocity, and care.

Name: Hidrovetés Kft.
Description:
Ha füvesítésről van szó, a hidrovetés szolgáltatásaink mind az ipari, mind a lakossági igényekre egyaránt megoldást kínálnak. Tapasztalt szakemberekből álló csapatunk gondoskodik arról, hogy a fű gyorsan és egyenletesen nőjön, fenntartható és költséghatékony gyepesítési megoldást kínálva bármilyen zöldítési projekthez. 

Több mint 20 éves hidrovetés tapasztalattal és talajelőkészítési szakértelemmel rendelkezünk. Megoldást találunk akár a legnehezebb fűtelepítési vagy eróziószabályozási problémákra is. Csak a legbeváltabb, legkörnyezetbarátabb technológiát, és a legjobb minőségű hidrovetés termékeket használjuk kertektől a nagyobb fejlesztési projektekig.

Szinte egyedülálló gépparkunk van, amivel a kis kertektől kezdve a több hektáros területekig minden igényt kielégítünk. Gépparkunk nem csak a hidrovetéshez, hanem a kertek talajműveléséhez szükséges munkákra is alkalmas.

Chez JARDINS DU MOULIN, notre mission est de sublimer vos extérieurs pour qu'ils deviennent des lieux de détente et de plaisir. Nous croyons en l'importance d'un environnement extérieur bien entretenu pour le bien-être de nos clients.

Considering the absence of the minimum number of trees in the city. SkyFlora has taken the initiatives to plant trees (fruits, vegetables, and others) in roof-tops, balcony, road-side areas, corporate office and in government organization. Demand of planting in-house gardening is increasing rapidly in the city and in its outside area. Name: Himalaya Music Fountain
Description:
We know there are bunches of sellers for this product in china and we ask ourselves why we should have the chance to serve you amongst all these suppliers. 
We would like to put ourselves in your shoes.

As a buyer thousands of kilometers away you probably have the following questions in mind: 
1. Manufacture or trading company. 
We have a factory in Changsha to manufacture the hardware of the fountain and a center for developing the software. The other equipments such as Pumps, Cables, Nozzles and lights are purchased from top quality suppliers. You are welcomed to visit our factory

2. Price compatibility. 
We do not claim. We ask you to source other suppliers and in the end give us a call. You won’t lose anything if not gained.

3. Safety of your money. 
As for safety of your money, we suggest 100% confirmed L/C (no advanced payment). Therefore the payment will be only released to us after the goods is produced and shipped to your destination. We as well highly insist on getting goods inspected by reputed inspection companies like SGS – LLOYDS or any other company suggested by you to fully inspect the quality of the order.

4. Products originality and quality.
We in Himalaya Company have made a contract with the University of Changsha for research and development of the latest technology in musical fountain field since our goal is to continuously improve ourselves.

5. Quality features and after sales service.
We believe after sales service starts with choosing highest quality components and strict production quality control. You can see a list of our reputed suppliers in our website : www.Chinamusicfountain.com

6. Company credibility and capability.
Himalaya built fountains in more than 30 countries around world, and referrence is easily available customers from different areas. 

We will devote ourselves to your order if we are lucky to receive it.

Onze liefde voor het buitenvak begon al vroeg, met laarzen aan naast onze vader in het griendhout. Wat toen nog spelen was, groeide uit tot een leven lang werken met groen, water en steen.

Met onze gecombineerde kennis en ervaring ontwerpen, realiseren en onderhouden we complete buitenruimtes. We zijn sterk in tuinaanleg, sierbestrating, houtbouw en straatwerk. Daarnaast verzorgen we ook beschoeiingen en oeverconstructies, alles op het snijvlak van land en water.

Name: Heart of Eden (AHS Ltd)
Description:

With the environment central to our company ethos, the Heart of Eden range is from sustainable sources obtained as close to utilisation as possible, therefore minimising the carbon miles travelled. We are also committed to reducing carbon emissions by ensuring that our All-Purpose Compost is Peat-Free. The destruction of peat bogs not only adds to climate change, it removes an essential habitat for native plants and wildlife.

The Heart of Eden range is ideal for Garden Centres and Landscapers. Speak to a member of our sales team today for further information.

Description:

We are a network of people who work professionally and with different focuses on the topic of water and water cycles.

What has brought us together is our connection with and enthusiasm for the element of water.

As a network, we are open and invite everyone who is professionally involved in restoring healthy water cycles or wants to do so in the future to network with us.

Name: Landcare Logic
Description:
Landcare Logic has been a leading innovator in the Landscape Industry since 2007.  In our experience, landscape companies all pretty much operate the same way, but we strive to change that reality.  We aim to do things differently in hopes of standing out to our customers and re-energizing our employees.  There's no reason to keep doing what people have always done just because it's the easiest way.

We went all electric on our blowers/trimmers/edgers back in 2019 so we are well ahead of the 2024 mandate.  We are a Weathermatic Premium Partner and install free smart controllers on all of our properties when we takeover so we can manage the irrigation remotely and save water.  We have pilot locations testing environmentally friendly advanced products to reshape standard horticulture practices and we are looking at changing the age old way commercial landscapers have estimated jobs (selling hours) by investing in the best science and technology to help our customers spend their money in landscape improvements and multi-year plans instead of just maintenance work and/or excessive water bills.  The landscape industry needs to adapt to a new way of doing things and we intend to lead the way.

We also put a high focus on training and developing our employees so they can grow professionally through promotions and subsequently grow personally with more income for their families and pride in their accomplishments.  This continuous improvement approach gives us a team environment that encourages people to help each-other succeed. 

We know we can't modernize an industry without our team of open minded innovators and vendors with the same mindset.  If you are a potential customer expecting more, a landscaper looking to improve, or a vendor with innovations we should look into, please reach out to us via email at Innovations@LandcareLogic.com.

Name: MainBaumWächter
Description:
MainBaumWächter BaumbewässerungsTränken sind die innovative, hochwertige und nachhaltige Weiterentwicklung der bereits zur Bewässerung von (Stadt-) Bäumen im Einsatz befindlichen Bewässerungssäcke.
MainBaumWächter gibt es in verschiedenen Größen, die beliebig erweitert werden können, um auch große Bestandsbäume effektiv und effizient zu bewässern. Unsere BewässerungsTränke sind bedruck- und beklebbar, so dass Baumbewässerung zu Marketingzwecken mit Werbung für Unternehmen, Eigentums hinweise bzw. Engagement für Kommunen, Institutionen und Vereine oder mit Kunst am Baum kombiniert wird. Darüber hinaus sind unsere BewässerungsTränke sind recycelfähig und ausschließlich in Deutschland gefertigt. 

Die Qualitätsmerkmale deutscher Fertigung erlauben es bisher nur MainBaumWächter eine 7-jährige Garantie für unsere Kunden zu gewähren. Diese Kombination an Funktionalität und Nachhaltigkeit ist zukunftsweisend und in der Öffentlichkeit innerhalb von Europa und weltweit bisher so nicht umgesetzt. 
So vereint MainBaumWächter #Marketing und #Umweltschutz, #MadeinGermany, auf eine vielversprechende, originelle und innovative Weise. 

Durch die Bedruck- und Beklebbarkeit unserer MainBaumWächter BaumbewässerungsTränke ergibt sich für Unternehmen außerdem die Möglichkeit, Eigenwerbung mit geringen Kosten zu generieren. 
Die Bedruckung von Eigenwerbung (Text, Logos, QR-Code etc.) hilft den Unternehmen, langfristig in der Öffentlichkeit sichtbar zu sein und sichtbar zu bleiben. Name: empreinte, bureau de paysages
Description:
L'agence Empreinte, dirigée par Lilika Troha et Lucas Olivreau, rassemble une équipe d'une dizaine de paysagistes et d'architectes. Installée au cœur d’Euralille, l’agence trouve ses racines au début des années 1990 dans une collaboration avec Gilles Clément pour le parc Matisse, projet novateur incarnant une ambition environnementale ambitieuse dans un quartier en pleine mutation.

Empreinte privilégie une approche contextuelle du paysage, à la fois évidente et sensible, qui valorise les eaux pluviales, transforme les héritages industriels en atouts pour la biodiversité, et intègre les principes d’économie circulaire. L’agence s’appuie sur des valeurs environnementales fortes, une rigueur conceptuelle affirmée et cultive des valeurs de solidarité et de bienveillance dans chacun de ses partenariats.

Cette démarche s’illustre au travers de projets variés : reconversion de friches industrielles et gestion des eaux pluviales à Saint-Denis (93) et Paris (Saint-Vincent-de-Paul), transformation d’infrastructures complexes telles que la Porte-Maillot et les terrasses Boieldieu à La Défense, ou encore, la revalorisation de sites historiques comme la Place des Héros à Arras, le Vieux-Lille et le Bois de Boulogne à Paris.

Empreinte considère le paysage comme un levier essentiel de transformation et de résilience pour des territoires en transition. Elle conjugue usages pratiques et poésie des lieux, en portant une attention particulière à la diversité végétale, aux sols et à l’eau comme matière vivante.

Depuis 2024, une annexe se développe à Tours.

Name: Maclean Exclusieve tuinen
Description:
Welkom bij Maclean Tuinen
Jouw tuin is niet zomaar een ruimte. Het is een bijzondere plek die waarde toevoegt aan hoe je leeft, ontspant en geniet. Bij Maclean hebben we van onze passie ons werk gemaakt. Bijzondere tuinen creëren waarin groen, beleving en duurzaamheid samenkomen. Van het eerste schetsontwerp tot de laatste beplanting. Bij Maclean Tuinen realiseren wij jouw droomtuin. Jouw unieke plek die het hele jaar door uitnodigend en prachtig is. Volledig afgestemd op jouw wensen.

Jouw wensen staan centraal
Jouw ideeën en wensen zijn belangrijk. Daarom starten we altijd eerst met een persoonlijk gesprek. Dit vertalen we naar een passend ontwerp waarin ieder detail klopt. We houden rekening met de bestaande situatie en creëren een tuin die er het hele jaar door prachtig uitziet. Of je nu behoefte hebt aan een stijlvolle zithoek, een luxe zwembad of een mooie buitenruimte. Bij Maclean Tuinen ben je verzekerd van vakmanschap dat jouw verwachtingen overtreft.

Ainsi, nous sommes compétents dans la réalisation de techniques alternatives pour la gestion des eaux pluviales et proposons des éléments adaptés notamment pour l’éclairage, le choix des végétaux indigènes, des matériaux.

Name: Roots Wild | Ecoscape Design
Description:
You want your outdoor space to do two things: enhance your home and work with nature, not against it. But too often landscaping feels like a choice between generic designs or eco-friendly spaces that look messy and overgrown. Most homeowners facing this challenge are worried about making the wrong decision. 

At Roots Wild, we believe landscaping should be a collaboration between human design and natural wisdom, not a battle between them. In fact, we believe you shouldn’t have to sacrifice beauty for sustainability. 

We help your outdoor space look good and do good. We do this by designing landscapes that are beautiful and regenerative, sustainable, and deeply connected to your environment. But don’t worry, we’ve done the thinking for you. 

We understand that your home is an extension of who you are and your outer space should look great, without compromise. 

We take a unique approach. Instead of forcing a design onto nature, we work with it – blending artistry with ecological wisdom to create outdoor spaces that feel effortless, elegant and enduring. 

We don’t just plant trees and lay stone. With years of experience designing for West Michigan’s unique climate, we know how to balance beauty and sustainability so your yard doesn’t just look good it thrives.

Schedule a consultation today to get started.

Name: Peachtree Plants
Description:
Peachtree Plants is an interior plantscaping company, serving the Metro Atlanta area since 2008 with over 30 years of experience in the industry. Our mission is to transform indoor and outdoor spaces into vibrant and beautiful environments that promote health, happiness, and productivity.

We believe that plants are an essential component of any indoor environment, and we specialize in designing and installing custom plant displays for commercial and residential spaces. Our team of experienced horticulturalists will work with you to create a personalized biophilic design that meets your unique needs and enhances the beauty of your space.

Peachtree Plants offers unique solutions to interior plantscaping with their moss and living walls. Our preserved moss walls require little maintenance and provide numerous benefits such as improved air quality and noise reduction. On the other hand, living plant walls bring the beauty of nature indoors and provide various health benefits, including stress reduction and improved air quality. Our experienced horticulturists provide customized designs tailored to clients' preferences.

In addition to our plantscaping services, we are also recognized for our award-winning holiday decor. Our team of talented designers has been recognized internationally for their stunning displays, and we offer a wide range of holiday decor options to suit any style and budget.

Our patioscape designs are perfect for businesses looking to create a welcoming and inviting outdoor environment. We can transform your sidewalks, courtyards, and plazas into beautiful and functional spaces that enhance your brand and promote a sense of community.

We take pride in our exceptional customer service, attention to detail, and commitment to quality, and we look forward to working with you to create a beautiful and functional space that meets your needs and exceeds your expectations.

Name: Xeri33 Hardscaping
Description:
If you’re looking to conserve water, the lawn is the best place to start. Irrigation is by far the biggest source of residential water use. According to the Division of Water Resources, about 2,000 to 3,000 gallons of water goes into a daily irrigation cycle for the average Utah lawn.

Xeriscape is a landscaping and gardening technique that focuses on using water-efficient and drought-tolerant plants, as well as sustainable design principles, to create low-maintenance, visually appealing outdoor spaces. The term "Xeriscape" is derived from the Greek word "xeri," meaning dry, and "scape," referring to the landscape.

The primary goal of xeriscaping is to conserve water, making it an ideal approach for arid and semi-arid regions where water is scarce, or water restrictions are in place. However, xeriscaping principles can be applied to a variety of climates, as they promote responsible water usage and ecological sustainability.

Key principles of xeriscaping include:

1. Plant selection: Choose native, drought-tolerant plants that are well-adapted to the local climate and soil conditions. These plants typically require less water and maintenance.

2. Soil improvement: Amend the soil with organic matter to improve water retention and nutrient availability, which helps plants thrive with less water.

3. Mulching: Use mulch to cover the soil surface, which helps retain moisture, regulate soil temperature, and prevent weeds.

4. Water-efficient irrigation: Install efficient irrigation systems, such as drip irrigation or soaker hoses, and water only when necessary to minimize water waste.

5. Hydro Zoning: Group plants with similar water needs together, making it easier to provide the right amount of water for each zone.

6. Turf reduction: Minimize or eliminate the use of water-intensive turf grass, replacing it with drought-tolerant groundcovers, artificial turf, or hardscape elements.

Name: TH Consulting Ltd
Description:
„Ти Ейч Консултинг” ЕООД – озеленяване и лендскейп дизайн

Зелените площи и зони за отдих, са животоподдържащите механизми на градовете и могат спокойно да носят названието „белите дробове на планетата”. Зелената инфраструктура като паркове, градини, горички, покривно и вертикално озеленяване, улични и междублокови пространства даряват живот на всеки град и допринасят за по-високото качество на живот на неговите жители. Парковете, градините и зелените площи благоприятстват движението, спорта, по-здравословния начин на живот, общуването и в крайна сметка имат своя положителен ефект за обществото.

Стремежът ни е да предоставим услуга, която ще ви накара да се почувствате специални и ще ни донесе удовлетворението от добре свършената работа. Ние ще ви помогнем в организирането, допълването и поддръжката на вашето любимо зелено пространство.

„Tи Ейч Консултинг“ е фирма за озеленяване и ландшафтна архитектура. Тя е създадена, за да осигури на клиентите си пълен спектър от ландшафтно-архитектурни дейности, като акцентира върху елементите от креативния дизайн, екологията и развитието на актуалният ландшафт.

В основата на престижния ни имидж са свежите съвременни идеи, експериментаторският дух, високото качество на предлаганите стоки и услуги, както и еднаквата отговорност при реализирането на всяко начинание – от малката частна градина до най-мащабния и сложен проект.

Our production capacity exceeds 10,000 panels per week, facilitated by significant recent investments in advanced machinery and quality control processes. Our commitment to excellence extends beyond our products.  Nos fondamentaux :
– Des potagers verticaux intelligents, conçus pour s’adapter aux petits espaces urbains (balcons, terrasses, cours).
– Une culture naturelle, sur substrat allégé, sans hydroponie ni technologie lourde.

– Des modèles durables, mobiles et écoresponsables, fabriqués à partir de matériaux recyclables à près de 100 %.
– Des solutions prêtes à l’usage ou en kit, pensées pour les particuliers, les entreprises et les collectivités.

 Chez Greenggies, nous croyons que chaque mètre carré peut devenir fertile.
Notre ambition : végétaliser les villes avec des solutions simples, esthétiques, durables… et pleines de vie.

A Urban Jungle é especialista em arquitetura paisagista, paisagismo de interiores e construção de jardins. O nosso conhecimento técnico imbatível com 15 anos de experiência e a abordagem criativa permitem-nos desenvolver soluções personalizadas para cada espaço – seja em Lisboa, Porto ou em qualquer outra região do país.

Os nossos serviços:
 Paisagismo de interiores para empresas – projetos à medida para escritórios, hotéis, restaurantes e espaços comerciais que procuram ambientes mais saudáveis, elegantes e inspiradores.
 Projetos de Arquitetura Paisagista em Portugal – desenvolvimento de jardins e espaços exteriores que conjugam design, funcionalidade e sustentabilidade.
 Jardins Verticais em Lisboa, Porto e todo o país – soluções com plantas naturais ou artificiais, ideais para dar vida às cidades e criar impacto visual.
 Paredes Verdes com Musgo Preservado – uma alternativa sustentável e de baixa manutenção, perfeita para interiores sofisticados que querem identidade e natureza sem exigirem cuidados complexos.

Na Urban Jungle, acreditamos em criar jardins com alma – projetos que não são apenas estéticos, mas que transmitem bem-estar, identidade e valorizam os espaços a longo prazo.

And what is most important - we listen. 
We listen to you, your needs, dreams nad expectations. We don't force our vision or ideas on you and we won't try to sell you on anything you are not 100% sure about. 

We design your garden WITH you and FOR you.

Because only then your garden can truly be ABOUT you.

#ThisGardenWillBeAllAboutYOU

We are based in Cracow, Poland - but we operate basically in all of southern Poland.

And we do speak fluent English! ;)

Name: Landesign LLC
Description: Founded in 2002, Landesign, LLC continues to be one of the most progressive, well-known green industry businesses in the St. Louis region and is highly committed to excellence in every single aspect of its operation. The scope of expertise includes: modular block retaining walls, paver walks and patios, concrete drives and walkways, finish grading, sodding, seeding lawns, water features and boulder work, outdoor kitchens, all types of plant material installation, mulching and erosion control. At Landesign, it is our mission to cater to clientele’s individualized tastes by offering a wide range of exceptional products and services, maintain the utmost professional staff that understands and responds to customers’ needs in a friendly, specialized manner, and strive to meet and exceed our customers’ expectations through excellent workmanship and quality materials. We strive to be recognized by customers as providing the best valued products and services; to be recognized by employees as a quality company to work for; to be recognized by suppliers as the best channel for their products; and to be recognized by competitors as an innovative leader in utilizing & implementing techniques that improves our unique industry.

Description:
Crafting a landscape is not an exercise in one single skill, but rather, a matter of understanding the entire process and ultimately placing all of the skills together that will bring a project to life. At Creative Roots we have a dynamic team with trade diversities that lay the foundation to create, execute and complete the most challenging projects.

While the size and scope of our ventures has expanded over the years, we have never lost sight of our principles:

* Have Fun. This one is extremely important to us.  Every person we hire is committed to design, create and maintain beautiful landscapes by following systems we are always improving. We follow them because we believe "the system will set us free." 

* Continual innovation. We want to do more than live up to the positive reputation we have earned within our industry. We believe by working on ourselves and our ways of delivering service not only are our clients going to have a GREAT experience, we are also. Our goal is to surpass our best achievements each and every day through education and good business practices.

*  Flawless execution. From water features, custom wood and metal work to automated irrigation, lighting and Natural Stone Walls, we put our professional pride into every detail. Because the quality of our work and manner we deliver it in is the trademark we leave behind.

*  Attention to detail. Every member of the Creative Roots team has artistic talent. This creative edge and attention to every aspect of the project is as much a passion of art and life as it is a professional commitment to our clients. 

Not only do we build amazing yards, but also business-savvy employees who learn how to act and think like owners.

 Naša misija:

Sa fokusom na očuvanje zelenih prostora, GreenCut se zalaže za pružanje najefikasnijih i najodrživijih rešenja u ovoj oblasti. Bez obzira da li je reč o održavanju travnjaka, obaranju stabala ili krčenju placeva, naš tim ima jedinstvenu stručnost da premaši očekivanja klijenata.

 Naše usluge:

1 Održavanje travnjaka - Za besprekorno uređene zelene prostore.
2 Obaranje visokorizičnih stabala - Bezbedno i efikasno rešenje za svaku situaciju.
3 Krčenje placeva - Profesionalno i brzo oslobađanje prostora.

GreenCut je više od kompanije za održavanje zelenih površina - mi gradimo veze sa prirodom i zajednicom. Pridružite nam se na putovanju ka održivijem i lepšem okruženju.

Name: OA DESIGN
Description:
Née en 2024 au sein du Groupe LG, notre filiale s’appuie sur plus de 30 ans de savoir-faire dans le béton pour proposer une nouvelle approche de l’aménagement urbain : design, durable et sur-mesure.

Nous concevons du mobilier urbain et des îlots de fraîcheur pensés pour transformer les espaces publics ou privés en véritables lieux de vie — confortables, esthétiques et responsables.

Notre approche :

- L’éco-conception au cœur de chaque projet : matériaux recyclés ou locaux, béton décarboné, bambou thermotraité, bois issu de forêts gérées durablement.

- Une fabrication française, assurée par les filiales et partenaires du groupe.

- Une conception flexible et modulaire, pour s’adapter à tous les usages et tous les contextes.

Du mobilier standard à la création 100 % sur mesure, nous accompagnons collectivités, architectes, MOE et entreprises pour imaginer des espaces durables, qui s’intègrent dans leur environnement.

At Mariposa, we fuse art and ecology into the landscape, bringing beauty to the practice of sustainability. In every garden, we see a unique opportunity to reconnect a space with its natural systems. Exposing nature’s existing elegant patterns allows us to create artfully designed spaces that complement urban environments.

Mariposa is committed to restoring ecologically sound outdoor spaces in urban areas. We do this by sourcing local materials, combining low-water and native plants, building dry stacked stone structures, and understanding water in order to effectively conserve water in the garden.

L'entreprise se distingue par son expertise technique et dans ses réalisations uniques et sur mesure, adaptées aux besoins et aux préférences de ses clients.

Nous connaître davantage : 

Nous intervenons sur tout chantier d’aménagement extérieur, avec une forte plus-value technique. Nos domaines de compétences sont vastes : travaux préparatoires, terrassement, VRD, maçonnerie paysagère, revêtement de sol, arrosage, plantation engazonnement etc… 


Nous travaillons aussi bien avec des particuliers souhaitant embellir leur jardin qu'avec des entreprises ou des collectivités pour des projets d'aménagement d'espaces publics. Notre zone de chalandise s’étend au Alpes-Maritimes et dans le Var mais certains projets nous amènent dans tout le Sud de la France.

Engagé dans une démarche éco-responsable, nous privilégions des méthodes durables et l'utilisation de végétaux adaptés à l'environnement local.

Entreprise à taille humaine, nous accordons beaucoup d’importance au respect de l’homme et à l’ensemble de nos compagnons.
Notre équipe est composée de jardiniers-paysagistes expérimentés et passionnés, capables de réaliser des projets variés, des maçons spécialistes des structures extérieures et des charpentiers-ébénistes dont certains sont issus du parcours d'excellence des Compagnons du devoir.

Är ni fastighetsägare eller driver eget företag och har grönområden och rabatter som behöver tas om hand så hjälper vi er gärna. Vi kan gör allt från rensa ogräs till plocka skräp runt fastigheten, besikta hängrännorna och beskära mindre träd. 
Allt för att ni ska kunna fokusera på det ni tycker är viktigt. 

Vi kallar detta för omtänksam trädgårdshjälp
Välkomna till Humlans Trädgård!

Vi skapar utemiljöer där människor trivs, där årstider kan komma och gå och där underhållsarbetet minimeras. På så sätt kan pengar sparas och belastningen på miljön minskas. Vi gör det genom smarta, långsiktiga val i alla steg; från det första penndraget till det sista spadtaget.

Oavsett om det gäller en park, en innergård eller en privat trädgård så har vi alltid som mål att skapa en utemiljö med ett långsiktigt fokus. Genom att tänka smart när det kommer till material, växter och verktyg kan vi se till att skapa en attraktiv utemiljö som kräver minimalt med underhåll.

Från det lilla underhållsuppdraget till den omfattande gårdsrenoveringen och allt där emellan. Oavsett om du har en tydlig plan eller behöver hjälp med att förverkliga en vision kan vi hjälpa till. Vi ser till att skapa en trivsam och säker utemiljö med långsiktighet och kostnadseffektivitet i fokus.

Oavsett årstid hjälper vi till att hålla utemiljön trivsam, trygg och säker med hjälp av miljövänliga material och verktyg. Våra medarbetare är vana vid att arbeta med ett långsiktigt tänk, allt för att spara pengar och minska påverkan på miljön.


Följ oss på instagram och Facebook för spännande och inspirerande uppdateringar från branschen och våra projekt, där heter vi @bergochlandskap!

Name: Oasis Enchantée
Description:
Oasis Enchantée est née d’une vision claire, simple mais réelle : nos environnements de travail manquent cruellement de nature, de biodiversité et de plaisir gourmands.

A l’heure du changement climatique, des crises politiques et des grands bouleversements que connais notre monde, pourquoi ne pas transformer le plus d’espace possible en lieu d’évasion, de détente, de biodiversité et de production alimentaire.

Nous avons tant à y gagner :
Amélioration du bien être au travail, réduction du stress et augmentation de la productivité.
Adapter concrètement notre environnement au défi du changement climatique, de ses crises actuelles et à venir.
Prendre conscience et agir sur les enjeux alimentaires en réapprenant à produire le plus localement et sainement possible nos fruits et légumes.

N’hésitez pas à faire appel à Oasis Enchantée si vous êtes :
Une industrie qui souhaite améliorer la qualité de vie au travail de ses salariés en créant un environnement inspirant, favorisant l’esprit d’équipe, le bien-être et les projets participatifs.

Des Professionnels de la restauration et de l’hôtellerie souhaitant améliorer l’espace d’accueil de la clientèle en aménageant un patio, une terrasse, une cour en lieu d’évasion ou en installant un coin d‘autoproduction de légumes, herbes aromatiques, fleurs comestibles.

Bailleurs sociaux, constructeurs ou architectes qui veulent participer à la construction de lieux de vie plus durable et plus vivable en intégrant plus de verdure, de biodiversité et de production alimentaire saine et locale.

Crèches, écoles, collèges ou lycées qui souhaitent sensibiliser les plus jeunes et les « générations futures » à l’environnement, l’écologie et les enjeux alimentaire d’aujourd’hui et de demain.

Établissement de santé, maison de retraite, foyer logement qui souhaitent faire profiter à leurs résidents d’activités de plein air et manuelles.

 Bien entendu, Oasis Enchantée est également accessible à tous

De techniek van Drainjet werd ontwikkeld om verstoorde en gecompacteerde grondlagen te doorbreken zodat hemel- en oppervlaktewater opnieuw hun weg naar de dieper gelegen bodemstructuur kunnen vinden.

Door de gecompacteerde grondlaag onder hoge druk te injecteren met poreuze granulaten, wordt de grond opnieuw waterdoorlatend gemaakt. De ondergrondse injecteringen hebben een permanent karakter waardoor de ontstane aders niet meer dichtklappen om op die manier hun drainerende functie te behouden.

Name: SweatyJob
Description:
SweatyJob is a platform for people who want to build their own robotic lawn care business without a big investment, fancy equipment, or needing to ask anyone for permission.

We started with a question: What if you could build a real service business, with recurring revenue, no inventory, and no employees — for under $50?

That’s exactly what we did.

With just $38 worth of yard signs and a phone number, SweatyJob was born. Within days, people started calling. Within weeks, customers were paying monthly for robotic mowing — and asking for more services. It turns out, when you show up with a quiet little robot that mows lawns automatically, it sells itself.

Now we help others do the same.

SweatyJob gives you the tools, training, and support to launch your own lawn care business using autonomous mowing bots. We provide the tech. You keep the margin. You don’t need to buy anything up front. You just need a neighborhood and a willingness to build something of your own.

It’s not a franchise. You’re not working for us. You’re building your own business — with help from someone who’s doing it right now.

We’ve helped out-of-work tech workers, solo tradespeople, and local hustlers add robotic mowing to their income streams without taking on risk or debt.

If you’ve ever wanted to start something — but didn’t know where to begin — this is your chance to get in early on a growing market, with none of the usual startup costs.

Robots do the mowing. You build the business.

Name: Million Dollar Landscapes
Description:

Name: SeedBharat
Description:
About Us

Welcome to SeedBharat, your gateway to a greener and more sustainable tomorrow. At SeedBharat, we are passionate about empowering individuals and families to cultivate life, grow organic, and embrace the joys of self-reliant living.

Our Mission

SeedBharat is founded on the vision of making households self-sustainable for fresh, organic vegetables. We believe in providing you the tools and knowledge to easily grow your own produce, free from harmful pesticides and chemicals.

What We Offer

Seeds of Diversity:
Explore our diverse range of premium seeds, carefully curated to bring a variety of fruits, flowers, vegetables, and succulent plants to your garden. From exotic vegetable seeds to succulent varieties, we offer a selection that suits both beginners and seasoned gardeners.

Landscaping Services:
Embark on a journey to transform your space into a flourishing oasis with our comprehensive landscaping services. SeedBharat offers complete packages to set up terrace or balcony gardens, providing you with organic vegetables for a sustainable and healthy lifestyle.

Why SeedBharat?

-Quality Assurance: Our seeds are sourced with care, ensuring high germination rates and healthy plant growth.
  
- Expert Guidance: Benefit from the knowledge of seasoned gardeners and experts who are passionate about organic farming.

- Landscaping Excellence: Let us turn your dream of a home garden into reality with our professional landscaping services.

Meet the Founders

SeedBharat is the brainchild of Urmila Sharma, a self-taught organic farmer with a lifelong passion for sustainable living. Together with her son, Sourabh Sharma, they bring their expertise and commitment to promoting organic gardening to every household in India.

Join us on this green journey, and let's cultivate life, grow organic, and make a positive impact on the environment, one seed at a time.

Happy gardening!

Name: Paysage Environnement / Monaco Paysage Environnement
Description:
Paysage Environnement situé à Nice dans le département des Alpes-Maritimes est spécialisée dans la réalisation et la conception sur-mesure des jardins et des espaces verts.

Riche d'une expérience importante dans le monde du paysage, Paysage Environnement a acquis depuis de nombreuses années une réputation solide basée sur le professionnalisme, l’efficacité et la qualité de travail.

Nous répondons à toutes les problématiques en y apportant des solutions adaptées.

La création de jardins englobe une réelle diversité de métiers et savoir-faire, auxquels nous attachons une très grande importance. Chaque savoir faire est mis en avant, de la conception à la réalisation, suivi de l'entretien du jardin selon les règles de l'art.

Nous développons de nombreuses compétences au sein de l'entreprise, afin de répondre à chacune de vos demandes de la manière la plus efficace possible: 
- Création de jardins de toutes tailles, pour tous budgets
- Création de platelage, structure bois, soutènement de talus
- Réalisation d'arrosage automatique adapté et économe en eau
- Mise en beauté de jardins, avec travail sur différents types et architectures de jardins (exotiques, à la Française, à l'Anglaise, ...)

Et nous suivons vos jardins, afin d'y trouver un réel lieu de repos et de détente:
- Entretien de jardins en tout genre, de la taille de haie au désherbage
- Débroussaillement pour normes anti-incendie
- Remise en état

Situé sur l’ensemble du territoire des Alpes Maritimes avec le siège social à Péone et un établissement secondaire à Nice St Isidore, nous travaillons sur l’ensemble du département, en Principauté de Monaco et au-delà.

Name: Işık Landscape Global
Description:
Pencereden dışarı baktığımızda gördüğümüz her alanda peyzaj kavramı kendini hayata sunuyor. 

Yaşam alanlarının doğayla bütünleşerek farklılaşması her gün yeniden şekilleniyor. 
Peyzajın teknoloji ile birlikte sadece estetik bir değer olmaktan ziyade yaşamsal olarak da önem kazanmaya başladığı şu günlerde, biz çeyrek asrı geride bırakmış bulunmaktayız. 
Bu çeyrek asırda sadece yaptığımız projelerimizle değil, markamızı oluşturmak ve globalde bir sektör temsilcisi olmak için kurduğumuz sistemimizle de bugünlere ulaşmanın gururunu yaşıyoruz.

Bizim de ilham aldığımız Rönesans’ın ezbere baş kaldıran insana yakın duran temasını, her işimize yansıtmaya çalıştık. Tüm işlerimizde Rönesansı’n SANAT titizliğini, insana hizmet estetiğini göz önünde bulundururken; insana değer veren, insani değerleri yücelten tüm hislerimizi de işimize kattık. 

Kurumsal DNA’mızın merkezinde İNSAN var. 
Rönesans; yeniden doğuş demek, biz bu çeyrek asırda her projemizde yeniden doğduk. Ezberlerin ötesinde fark yaratabilmek için dinamik kurumsal yapımız, ar-ge’ye ve dünya vizyonuna verdiğimiz önem, mesleki bilgi ve birikimimizle her zaman tecrübenin verdiği güce ve yeniliğe açık olduk.

Rönesansın doğumunda etkili olan İstanbul ve doğduğu yer İtalya bizim şirketimizin de coğrafi eksenini oluşturdu. İstanbul’da doğduk, mesleğimizi  Rönesans’ın doğdu yer İtalya’da geliştirdik, anlamlandırdık. Tarzımız İtalyan, düşüncemiz global, deneyimimiz sınırlar ötesi ve değerimiz insan…

Sadece yaşam alanlarını değil, yaşamak istediğimiz alanları yaratmak için çalışıyoruz.

Teknolojiyi, bilimi, sanatı İNSAN’ın mutluluğu için mesleğimizle yeniden yorumluyoruz.

Name: Atelier Dérobert
Description:
La ville, en constante évolution, est aujourd’hui confrontée à des défis cruciaux tels que le changement climatique et la perte de biodiversité. Dans cette optique, les concepts émergents de la ville résiliente et de l’urbanisme biosphérique proposent une approche novatrice pour réimaginer nos environnements urbains.

Au cœur de cette réflexion se trouve le paysage, où la nature devient un acteur clé dans la conception et la transformation de nos villes pour concevoir la ville augmentée.

Repenser la relation entre la ville et la nature implique de repousser les frontières de l’urbanisme traditionnel. Plutôt que de simplement intégrer la nature dans la ville, il s’agit d’adopter une approche plus profonde, en comprenant comment la nature aurait agi et en laissant la nature guider le processus de conception. Cela nécessite de repenser l’imperméabilisation et la minéralisation des villes, en réintroduisant l’eau dans le sol et en favorisant la végétalisation.

L’atelier Dérobert est une agence de paysage et d’architecture. Son ambition est de répondre aux enjeux contemporains des villes et des campagnes pour dessiner des projets écologiques  ambitieux et novateurs.

Name: Plaisir Vert - jardiniers urbains et environs.
Description:
At Plaisir Vert, we strive to intertwine the beauty of nature with our eco-conscious landscaping and gardening practices. Founded by a passionate couple, our mission is to create sustainable and harmonious green spaces that respect the environment. 

Our team is a blend of experienced gardeners and dedicated office professionals, all committed to providing quality service and catering to our clients' needs. We foster a healthy and fulfilling work environment, encouraging remote work and flexible hours for office staff, and continuous education for our gardeners. 

We prioritize the use of eco-friendly and local materials, such as impregnated pine for our decks. We also install efficient irrigation systems and offer water-free gardens. Moreover, we promote composting and the creation of natural habitats for insects and small birds among our clients. 

Our dedication to environmental sustainability is reflected in our future endeavors, which include equipping our team with eco-friendly tools and establishing specialized cells in different regions of Belgium. 

In terms of social impact, we support professional integration by hiring individuals undergoing career transitions and offering 6-month internships. We also provide career opportunities for students and young professionals. 

Our long-term objectives encompass stabilizing our existing cells, expanding our presence throughout Belgium, and ultimately gaining recognition as a national and international reference in specialized and eco-conscious gardening. 

Plaisir Vert is a continuously evolving enterprise, guided by our values of sustainability, innovation, and inclusion. We invite our clients, collaborators, and partners to share our vision of a verdant and harmonious future.

Name: JARDIN AU CARRE
Description:
Si vous avez envie d’un jardin unique clé en main, il faut absolument retenir cette adresse. Pourquoi ? Parce que vous y rencontrerez pour le concevoir des artistes paysagistes de talent ; parce que vous pourrez y choisir du mobilier design de la marque UNOPIU’ pour l’agrémenter avec style. Et tout ça sur le même lieu.
Jardin au Carré, c’est comme si votre intérieur se prolongeait à l’extérieur. Fred PERMENT et son équipe imagine votre jardin et l’esquisse à main levée en vous écoutant : ici, votre future terrasse, cuisine ou salon d’extérieur, là, d’harmonieux massifs autour de la piscine qu’il a dessinée, du papier-peint d’extérieur pour égayer un mur un peu triste, de la pierre, du bois, du métal... Laissez- vous guider et porter par sa créativité pour planter votre décor !
UNOPIU’, le mobilier outdoor italien de haute qualité, spécialiste en la matière depuis 40 ans. Dans le vaste showroom partagé, on s’inspire des ambiances savamment mises en scène, on se laisse tenter par ces pièces de mobilier au matériau noble, on pique ces idées d’aménagement originales. On a envie de tout acheter : canapés, tables et fauteuils, un tapis, une petite lanterne... Et pourquoi pas cette amusante tente cabane à accrocher à un arbre pour faire la sieste ! Mais aussi, pergolas, toiles solaires, cuisines d’extérieures, éclairages, murs végétaux, et braseros pour réchauffer les fraîches soirées d’été.
Livraison et installation sur demande dans toute la région.

Name: Agriscaping Technologies
Description:
http://www.Agriscaping.com 

Agriscaping is Elegant Edible Landscaping
It's what you get when you bring together the Elegance and grandeur of creative Landscaping and the best of productive agriculture.

Are you DIY? Or Want to hire a pro? 
Whatever your style to get the yard done, we’ve got options for you at Agriscaping.com 

Agri-Scape:(noun, verb)

   1. noun: meaning a landscape that creatively and elegantly integrates elements of productive agriculture either by means of growing produce (edible fruits, vegetables, and herbs) or or other useful plants to reduce useless consumption, landfill waste, and water usage.
   2. verb: the act of creating elegant, productive, and sustainable landscapes for the betterment of health and humanity.

We offer nation-wide services and training to individuals and landscapers who want to lead the way to a greener future. 

Find out more at www.Agriscaping.com

Description:
Spécialiste des aménagements extérieurs à Toulouse, nous concevons votre jardin sur mesure. Au cœur de notre métier, le jardin est un élément incontournable de notre activité. Unique, vivant, à votre image, votre jardin vous ressemble et vous offre ces espaces où vous vous sentez bien. Un jardin réussi offre un écrin mettant en valeur l’architecture tout en suggérant l’envie d’aller dehors et de profiter de nouveaux espaces de convivialité.

Nous vous accompagnons pour l’intégralité de votre projet d’aménagement extérieur de votre maison, de la conception jusqu’à la réalisation. Notre promesse du clé-en-main vous simplifie la démarche mais elle permet également d’améliorer la qualité globale de l’ensemble. Faire appel à un interlocuteur unique permet ainsi la création d’un jardin unique et équilibré, où chaque élément de vos aménagements extérieurs est parfaitement intégré, de la terrasse à la piscine, en passant par les créations paysagères.

Que vous souhaitiez rénover, repenser ou aménager votre jardin, nous sommes à votre écoute. Notre objectif est de vous proposer la création d’un jardin unique et convivial tout en respectant votre budget. Paysagistes et maçons spécialisés dans la création d’aménagements extérieurs pour le particulier et le professionnel, nous proposons à nos clients une très large palette de prestations sur la base de matériaux de qualité sélectionnés et de process de pose soignés et contrôlés.

Nous nous déplaçons gratuitement pour étudier votre projet, réalisons ensemble votre rêve d’extérieur !

Name: Bluestem Ecological Services
Description:
Bluestem Ecological Services is a sustainable company that builds, restores and maintains native ecosystems.  Our goal is to bring elements of the original Midwest landscape back to its natural state.  We develop partnerships based on a balance of people, the environment, and economic value.

We can restore your wetlands, woodlands and prairie - as well as develop new environmental spaces conserving clean water, space for pollinators, environmental education and wellness. 

Our mission is to develop native ecosystems through sustainable land management partnerships that will last for generations.

The benefits of Native Restoration and Native Landscaping are that it’s environmentally responsible, it’s economically beneficial, it creates a better place for the people on the property, and it’s better for our community.

A healthy environment is a diverse environment.

Name: Ralston Contracts Ltd
Description:
High-quality landscaping company in Ayrshire with a meticulous eye for detail.

With more than 35 years of combined experience in the landscaping and construction industry, husband and wife team Natalie and John set up Ralston Contracts. 

Our aim is to always deliver an excellent service, as we’ve seen too many horror stories about poor-quality workmanship leaving homeowners feeling flat and disappointed. 

At Ralston Contracts, we do things properly and are proud to be part of the South Ayrshire Council Trusted Trader Scheme. Everything we do is to an excellent standard, and we treat all customers with the same level of care. 

How we make your dream garden and outdoor space a reality 

So you get the best possible results, our service starts with a specialist landscape design consultation where we discuss your needs, lifestyle, and budget. This means we can really understand what you’re looking for before we get started. 

But we’re also realistic about what you can achieve. If you have a specific budget, we will advise you on the best options. We’ll also offer alternative solutions if your original plans won’t work in your space.

We’d rather be honest about what you can achieve with your space and budget, so you are well-informed to make a decision that suits you. And we never do something that won’t meet your expectations. 

Whether you have no clue what you want or you already have a fully-formed idea, we use over 20 years of experience to give you the best option to transform your garden. 

Our head office is located in Ayr, making landscaping services in all of Ayrshire possible – we cover all of South, East, and North Ayrshire. 

Plus, we will travel down to the Dumfries and Galloway area, going as far as Stranraer and to the south side of Glasgow near East Kilbride.

         We Don’t Just Design Landscapes; We Cultivate Urban Legacies

|Founded by Epheson Elias Geleso—an urban planner, certified Landscape Designer and greenery specialist—Terranova Studios emerged from a vision to heal the rift between cities and nature. We believe urban landscapes should tell a story of renewal, belonging, and hope.

| Mission Statement |  
To transform urban environments into thriving, sustainable ecosystems where nature and human innovation coexist harmoniously. We design resilient cities grounded in ecological integrity, community well-being, and timeless beauty. 

| Vision Statement |  
To pioneer a global shift toward *biophilic urbanism* — where every city is a living testament to the symbiosis between built form and natural vitality.

| Services Offered | 
| Urban Planning | Sustainable master plans • Transit-oriented development • Climate-adaptive zoning. |  
| Landscape Design | Green corridors • Urban forests • Rooftop gardens • Healing landscapes • Water-sensitive design |  
| Greenery Development | Native planting strategies • Soil remediation • Vertical farming integration • Carbon-capture landscapes |  
| Legacy Projects  | Regenerative public parks • Cultural-ecological hubs • Adaptive reuse of industrial sites |  

Target Clientele

Name: Green Abundance
Description:
Green Abundance has been created with a vision to take care of plants in a 100% natural way and nurture the soil.

Plants are like children. They feel emotions, they breathe, they make food & they grow.
 
Taking care of plants is like taking care of children. 

Like children fill us with unconditional love – plants feel the same love for us.

Also, they provide with critical oxygen, fruits, flowers, grains & shade. It is a very symbiotic relationship. 

At Green Abundance – we design, set up and maintain gardens. 

We provide Premium Care for the plants by providing 100% natural ingredients that supports their growth, health & immunity. 

We make ‘Jeevamrutham’, a 100% Natural Fertiliser, from Cow Dung and Cow Urine that fixes Nitrogen and solubilises Phosphorus. 

This helps the plants make nutritious food. 

Nutrition Rich Food = Good Health = Good Immunity = Good Growth

We make ‘Neem Oil Spray’ a 100% Natural Pesticide that we spray over the plants to prevent pest attack.

We work with:

Corporates  I  Gated Communities  I  Hotels  I  Resort  I  Factories  I  Farm Houses  I  Schools  I  

Green Abundance - To set up and maintain garden in your Office, Gated Community or Home - please reach out to us at thegreenabundance@gmail.com or call @ +91 99088 995222.

Currently - Green Abundance offers its services only in Hyderabad, India.

Name: IGY6Rooted
Description:
As an Air Force Reservist and owner of IGY6 Rooted, I bring over 10 years of experience in stump grinding and landscaping to every project. My mission is simple: to provide efficient, professional, and lawn-safe stump removal services that leave your yard better than before.

Using the top-of-the-line Bandit SG 75, I can tackle even the toughest jobs while preserving your lawn’s integrity. Whether it’s fitting through tight spaces or delivering precision work, I ensure every detail is handled with care.

Why choose IGY6 Rooted?
 Veteran-Owned: Proudly serving my community with the same discipline and commitment I bring to my military service.
 Community-Focused: I dedicate time each month to support active-duty military families and veterans in need.
 Professional Expertise: Over a decade of industry experience ensures you’re in good hands.

Tree stumps don’t just take up space—they can attract pests, spread fungi, and create tripping hazards. At IGY6 Rooted, I help homeowners and businesses reclaim their yards by removing these obstacles with care and precision.

Let me help you clear the way for a safer, more beautiful landscape.

 Call: 518.265.0275
 Email: CO@IGY6Rooted.com

Follow along as I share tips, success stories, and updates on transforming yards one stump at a time. Let’s work together to make your outdoor space the best it can be!

As a trusted partner to homeowners, businesses, municipalities, and general contractors, we’ve earned a strong reputation for professionalism, clear communication, and quality execution. Maintenance Services:

- Fertilization and weed/pest control programs

- Irrigation system monitoring and repairs

At Greenstudios, we design, produce, ship, and support smart hydroponic skin systems engineered for Living Green Walls and Green Roofs worldwide. Our roots spread from Beirut to the world, marked by a series of patents and innovations based on a smart and flexible hydroponic 'skin' that can be installed on virtually any surface imaginable. We play an important role in real estate development creating state of the art green projects in a huge real estate market thriving for green.

Nature au Bureau propose aux entreprises son expertise de paysagiste d’intérieur et participe principalement à la végétalisation des lieux de vie publics intérieurs (halls d’accueil, bureaux d’entreprise, salles de réunions,  hôtels, profession libérale...).

Description:
Cayman Growers is Cayman's only plant nursery, sod and tree farm.  Located the East End of Grand Cayman, Cayman Growers is situated about a mile off of the main road and very easy to find.  Spreading over 30 acres in part of an old quarry, Cayman Growers offers the largest selection of trees, potted plants and shrubs, and green sod perfect for you both commercial and residential customers to help beautify their landscaping existence the commercial tree farm.

We are able to offer the prices that we do because we grow all of our greenery locally!

Locally grown plants offer much higher quality than imported plants because unlike their imported cousins, our plants do not spend day and weeks in hot shipping containers or transportation trucks traveling to the port.

Our plants are completely acclimated to the Cayman environment - heat, humidity and ground conditions. This means that it is very, very rare for a Cayman Grower's plant or tree to die after you plant it on your property if you follow our instructions to encourage rooting.

Ofrecemos una amplia gama de servicios, desde el mantenimiento de áreas ajardinadas en hoteles y espacios exteriores, hasta el diseño e instalación de espacios verdes en promociones, urbanizaciones, espacios corporativos y sector público. También realizamos trabajos técnicos de jardinería como poda de palmeras, plantaciones y tratamientos de arbolado, montaje de muros verdes y cubiertas ajardinadas, entre otros.

En Verdalis, nos comprometemos a cumplir con todos los requerimientos legales y a ofrecer alternativas sostenibles a los tratamientos químicos de síntesis. Además, aplicamos técnicas de endoterapia vegetal para tratamientos fitosanitarios y nutricionales, cuidando siempre del medio ambiente.

Nous accompagnons particuliers, professionnels et collectivités dans la valorisation de leurs extérieurs à travers des solutions respectueuses de l’environnement, locales et innovantes.

 Nos services :

Tonte, débroussaillage et entretien régulier
Taille de haies, arbres et massifs
Mise en place de paillage et toiles biodégradables
Plantation d’essences locales
Création de jardins durables et potagers
Revalorisation des déchets verts (broyage, compostage)
Aménagements extérieurs sur mesure (pergolas, treillis, clôtures, etc.)
 Notre approche :
Chez VIREO, nous privilégions l’usage d’outils à batterie et de méthodes d’entretien sans produits chimiques. Notre objectif est double : entretenir vos espaces tout en favorisant la biodiversité et la santé des sols.

 Nos clients :

Particuliers (jardins, villas, résidences)
Copropriétés et bailleurs sociaux (SIKOA, SEMSAMAR…)
Collectivités territoriales
Commerces, hôtels, établissements touristiques
Entreprises en transition écologique
 Pourquoi nous choisir ?
VIREO, c’est l’alliance entre performance, écologie et esthétique. Nous croyons qu’un entretien paysager peut être propre, silencieux et bon pour l’environnement, sans compromis sur la qualité.

Basés aux Abymes, nous intervenons sur toute la Guadeloupe.

Wij willen ook jullie inspireren met het bijzondere tuinontwerp en onze creatieve tuinoplossingen, waarin duurzame en natuurlijke materialen afwisselend worden gebruikt. Samen met jullie nemen wij de tijd om goed te begrijpen hoe de droomtuin van jullie eruit moet komen te zien.

Hierbij stellen we de hoogste eisen aan ons vakmanschap en aan onze creativiteit. Het compliment van jullie, dat wij jullie verwachtingen hebben overtroffen, is ons doel en maakt ons trots. Marco Bakker Droomtuinen vindt daarom de beleving net zo belangrijk als de tuin zelf. U wordt volledig meegenomen in de reis naar uw droomtuin. Dit begint al bij het intake gesprek, onder het genot van een goede espresso bespreken wij uw wensen voor uw droomtuin. Ons team gaat aan de slag om deze wensen te vertalen naar een adembenemend design die vervolgens persoonlijk aan u wordt gepresenteerd. Nadat het ontwerp tot aan de puntjes kloppend is mag ons droomteam aan de slag om uw droom tot realiteit te brengen. 

Wij zeggen ook graag: “Je hebt niet zomaar een tuin, maar een echte Marco Bakker tuin’’.

Name: Nicki King Landscape Design
Description:
From our first chat, you’ll discover that my biggest motivators in life are caring, conservation and creativity.

Which combine beautifully in my work as a Landscape Designer. (Not that it ever feels like work!)

Each day I get to create sustainable and stunning garden designs that are as unique as you are. Gorgeous, practical spaces that enrich your life and health, and support your local ecosystem.

I feel so blessed to work throughout the various regions of Adelaide, because we have so many different sub-climates, conditions and aspects to work with. 

I love the challenge of getting creative with what’s already on-site, but I also adore starting fresh with a clean slate. 

I’ve always cared so deeply about conservation. In fact, when I got asked as a kid about what super power I’d love to have – my answer was twofold. Bringing plants back to life, and fixing the waterways!

I realised that rather than go down the path of studying conservation and tackling these issues on a bureaucratic level, I could make more of a difference starting at home - designing nature and garden spaces. 

I could show parents that even though their backyard is the same size as their car, there are many ways to get their kids outside, interacting with nature. I could show urban dwellers just how easy it is to create a relaxing and peaceful sanctuary.

Through two years of studying to become a qualified Landscape Designer, becoming a member of Master Landscapers of SA, and every moment I’ve spent working in this field – my inspiration and commitment for what I do has grown and grown!

And there’s no doubt that my work continues to fuel my commitment to conservation. 

We need to keep the discussion going and most importantly, spread the word that green spaces and living in natural surrounds is vital for both kid and adults alike. 

Because quite simply if our kids aren’t learning to love and take care of nature then who will look after it when we are gone?

Name: Van Beets Groengroep
Description:
Van Beets Groengroep is een professioneel en maatschappelijk gedreven groenbedrijf gevestigd op bedrijventerrein De Hemrik in Leeuwarden.

Sinds de oprichting in 2009 door Meine van Beets heeft het bedrijf een sterke reputatie opgebouwd in groenonderhoud, boomverzorging, hovenierswerk en terreinbeheer voor bedrijven, overheden en particulieren.

Wat begon als een kleinschalig groenbedrijf met een persoonlijke stijl en een duidelijke liefde voor natuur, is uitgegroeid tot een organisatie waar vakmanschap, betrouwbaarheid en maatschappelijke betrokkenheid centraal staan.

Het team van boomverzorgers, hoveniers en ondersteuners deelt een sterke passie voor het vak, voor de natuur en voor het werken met en voor mensen.

Naast het reguliere hoveniers- en boomverzorgerwerk combineert Van Beets Groengroep groenvoorziening met sociale impact. Het bedrijf biedt werk- en leerplekken aan collega’s met een afstand tot de arbeidsmarkt en organiseert zijn bedrijfsvoering sociaal en inclusief, zonder concessies te doen aan kwaliteit of productiviteit.

Van Beets Groengroep werkt voor zowel grote als kleine opdrachtgevers in heel Friesland. Elke opdracht krijgt dezelfde aandacht en professionaliteit, of het nu gaat om een compleet bedrijfsterrein of het snoeien van een enkele boom.
De werkzaamheden omvatten onder andere:
• Boomverzorging, snoei, controle en kap
• Hovenierswerk en tuinonderhoud
• Ontwerp en aanleg van tuinen en bedrijfsterreinen
• Terreinbeheer en groenonderhoud
• Slootonderhoud, hekkelen en waterbeheer
• Houtbouw, damwanden, bestrating en sedumdaken

Organisaties en particulieren die benieuwd zijn wat Van Beets Groengroep kan betekenen voor hun buitenruimte, kunnen vrijblijvend contact opnemen voor meer informatie.

Van Beets Groengroep – Professioneel groenwerk met hart voor mens en natuur.

Name: Our Temenos
Description:
Our mission at Our Temenos is to revolutionize the landscaping industry. 
Our Temenos is a worker-owned, landscaping firm offering ecologically centered design, execution and maintenance services across New York City and in the surrounding environs. We work in the public and private context with specialization in native, edible and educational gardens that build climate resilience while offering clients a space for rest and respite.

As professional stewards of the environment, it is our responsibility to transform landscapes into thriving ecosystems that inspire and sustain. Rooted in principles of ecological integrity, our commitment to sustainable practices and our integrative process extend our work beyond beautification. We  cultivate resilient and regenerative outdoor spaces. We strive to be leaders in the ecological landscaping industry, making a positive impact on the communities we serve and the world we share.

Our work is an investment in the expansion and improvement of viable green infrastructure. We have a growing portfolio of innovative ecosystems in commercial, residential and public settings. Through the design and feedback process, we hone green infrastructure intelligence to solve individual and community scale problems such as storm water management, steady ambient building and outdoor temperatures, and increased local biodiversity. It is important to us that, while solving practical problems, we co-create elegant and generative sanctuaries for humans too. 

Our democratic business model centers care for the planet, our clients and one another. As land stewards we recognize that every team member is a valuable part of the whole and an integral part of our larger community, to which we are deeply rooted.

Name: Creative Roots Landscaping Ltd
Description:
Creative Roots Landscaping | Luxury Landscape Design, Build & Maintenance in the Okanagan

At Creative Roots, landscaping isn’t just about plants, patios, or pretty yards—it’s about building spaces that elevate lifestyles. For over 30 years, we’ve partnered with thoughtful homeowners, developers, and builders to craft outdoor environments that are both artful and enduring.

What sets us apart? It’s not just the meticulous stonework, the custom wood and metal features, or the curated plant palettes—it’s how we do the work and who we do it with.

We’re a people-first business rooted in transparency, craftsmanship, and continual growth. Our open-book management system ensures everyone on our team—now 65 strong—is empowered to think like an owner. We don’t just build landscapes; we build leaders.

 Flawless Execution
From pools to pergolas, irrigation to illumination, we bring precision and pride to every detail.

 Innovation Meets Integrity
We don’t rest on a reputation—we refine it daily. Through formal training, collaborative planning, and a culture of creativity, we raise the bar for what landscaping can be.

 Purpose-Driven Culture
We believe in making work meaningful. That means having fun, thinking boldly, and obsessing over service—because when our team thrives, our clients do too.

 Full-Service, Year-Round
Whether it’s a multi-phase estate transformation or ongoing property maintenance, we’re structured to serve the entire lifecycle of your landscape.

From our vibrant Kelowna headquarters to luxury lakefront properties across the Okanagan, Creative Roots is where great people grow—and where the work speaks for itself.

Serving Kelowna | West Kelowna | Lake Country | Peachland

Name: L'Arbre d'Ornement
Description:
Bienvenue chez l'Arbre d'Ornement !

Depuis 1967, nous accompagnons les particuliers, entreprises et collectivités dans l’entretien et l’aménagement des espaces extérieurs. Forts de plus de 55 ans d’expérience, nous mettons notre expertise et nos valeurs familiales au service de tous vos projets.  

Découvrez nos engagements !  
Notre équipe place l’excellence et la satisfaction de ses clients au cœur de son action grâce à des valeurs fortes :

- Respect de l’environnement : Des solutions durables et écoresponsables.  
- Proximité et personnalisation : Un accompagnement sur mesure pour répondre à vos attentes.  

Nos expertises en un clin d’œil

- Entretien des espaces verts : Tonte, taille, désherbage et soin des plantations.

- Création et conception : Aménagement paysager, conception de jardins, plantations, installation de clôtures, etc.  
-Service d’aide à la personne : Prestations proposé aux particuliers pour les travaux d’entretien qui permet un crédit d’impôt.
Que vous souhaitiez embellir un jardin, sécuriser vos arbres ou bénéficier d’un service de proximité, notre équipe est là pour vous accompagner avec professionnalisme et passion.  

 Contactez-nous dès aujourd’hui pour un devis gratuit ou une consultation personnalisée.

Name: Independence Landscape
Description:
Independence Landscape is a full-service lawn and landscape company serving Northern Virginia since 2006. We offer a full range of services: lawn maintenance, landscape design and installation, custom hardscape projects, drainage correction and mosquito control. Each of our crews specialize in a specific skill set, which ensures quality of work regardless of the size or complexity of the project. We continually stay on top of industry standards and developments by regularly attending professional training sessions and courses. If a better method, tool or environmentally friendly product appears on the market, Independence is trained and certified to implement it in order to enhance the beauty of our customers' properties.

*Our Company History*

Independence Landscape was established in 2006. Our owners, Curt Greene and Chad Evans, originally started in the landscaping and lawn maintenance business while in high school and college. "Even back then," Greene explains, "we took it very seriously and set high standards for everything we did." Clients noticed their reliability and the quality of their work. After college graduation, they both landed jobs with the Department of Defense, but quickly discovered they missed working on people's yards and building relationships with their clients. They both decided to pursue their real passion, and soon Independence Landscape and Lawn Care officially opened for business.

Today our growing company takes care of residential properties throughout Northern Virginia. Loyalty and trust between our clients and employees is the backbone of everything we do at Independence.

At Nuwora, we believe that every outdoor space has the potential to be a captivating and serene haven. We are a dedicated team of landscape maintenance professionals committed to enhancing the beauty, health, and sustainability of your outdoor environments.

Our Approach:
