Name: Easy Ivy
Description:
For over 15 years, Easy Ivy has been at the forefront of artificial foliage and landscaping innovation in South Africa, transforming indoor and outdoor spaces with enduring allure.

Unique in our industry, we are the sole provider in South Africa to incorporate advanced UV-blocking technology alongside vibrant, long-lasting pigments. This ensures our foliage not only resists fading but remains visually stunning in outdoor settings. Our products are designed to be completely maintenance-free and come with a robust 3-year warranty, highlighting our commitment to quality and durability.

We pride ourselves on our collaborative approach, partnering with landscapers, interior designers, and building contractors to craft bespoke, captivating environments that leave a lasting impression on your clients.

Easy Ivy artificial plants offer a versatile solution for concealing unsightly elements such as air conditioning units and exposed plumbing, creating seamless green walls where dull, lifeless surfaces once stood. Our meticulously designed plants are virtually indistinguishable from their living counterparts, offering an aesthetic enhancement to any space without the upkeep.

Nuestra plataforma y canales digitales crean un ecosistema innovador, vinculando de manera fluida a los amantes de las plantas (B2C) y a los expertos en construcción (B2B) con los productos y servicios del mercado de plantas. Para las organizaciones de construcción (constructores, ingenieros, arquitectos, diseñadores), aportamos valor al ofrecer una solución a un problema que enfrentan en su industria: la incorporación de plantas en sus proyectos. Al mismo tiempo, para los amantes de las plantas, ya estamos transformando la forma en que se conectan con las plantas a través de una solución logística y tecnológica integral. Operando mediante un esquema de envío directo, nuestros servicios digitales crean un modelo de negocio rentable y escalable. En Arbóreo, estamos dando forma a la manera en que las personas se conectan con el mercado de plantas, ofreciendo a los amantes de las plantas y a las empresas una solución completa que redefine sus relaciones con la naturaleza.

Name: Agartha Landscaping
Description: The landscape was a steep boulder field with three-foot-tall tufts of mountain grass between the rocks. Above, rugged, craggy peaks thrust spires of naked rock into the heavens, their summits capped with a dusting of snow that seemed to exhale a frosty air. Below, a river, a vigorous and optimistic blue, coiled its muscular currents through the valley floor. The only sound was the ceaseless breeze ruffling the grass, an overwhelming sense of wildness and grandeur that made one feel infinitely small.

Vi säljer och levererar skogsjord, harpad matjord samt grus av olika sorter.

Name: GroenGemak
Description:
Over GroenGemak 

Wie Wij Zijn
Bij GroenGemak zijn we toegewijd aan het creëren van buitenruimtes die zowel functioneel als esthetisch zijn. Met meer dan 10 jaar ervaring, hebben wij ons gevestigd als een leider in landschapsarchitectuur en tuinonderhoud in Drenthe.

Wat Wij Doen
Wij bieden een breed scala aan diensten, waaronder tuinontwerp, beplanting, onderhoud en renovatie. Onze expertise ligt in het combineren van vorm en functie om duurzame, mooie en leefbare buitenruimtes te maken.

Onze Filosofie
Wij geloven dat een goed ontworpen tuin meer is dan alleen een aanvulling op een woning. Het is een leefruimte op zich, een plaats voor ontspanning, vermaak en verbinding met de natuur. Onze ontwerpen zijn een reflectie van deze filosofie, altijd met oog voor detail, duurzaamheid en de specifieke wensen van onze klanten.

Waarom Kiezen Voor GroenGemak?
Deskundig Team: Ons ervaren en gepassioneerd team van ontwerpers en hoveniers staat klaar om uw visie tot leven te brengen.
Kwaliteit en Duurzaamheid: Wij maken gebruik van de beste materialen en de nieuwste technologieën om projecten van hoge kwaliteit te leveren die de tand des tijds doorstaan.
Klanttevredenheid: Uw tevredenheid is onze hoogste prioriteit. We zetten ons in om aan uw verwachtingen te voldoen en deze zelfs te overtreffen.
Voor samenwerkingen, consultancy of om meer te leren over onze diensten, neem gerust contact met ons op. Wij zijn uw partner voor alles wat groen is.

A finalidade do paisagismo é a integração do homem com a natureza, facultando-lhe melhores condições de vida pelo equilíbrio do meio ambiente.
O paisagismo não é apenas a criação de jardins através do plantio desordenado de plantas ornamentais. Trata-se de uma técnica artesanal aliada à sensibilidade, que procura reconstituir a paisagem natural dentro do cenário devastado pelas construções.
Requer conhecimentos de botânica, ecologia, variações climáticas regionais e tipos de solo, além de ser muito importante o conhecimento das compatibilidades plásticas para o equilíbrio das formas e cores.

Na het tuinontwerp volgt een gedegen beplantingsplan dat aansluit bij de wensen van de klant. Naast plantenkennis beschikt Hoveniersbedrijf De Vuursche ook over veel bomenkennis. Het bedrijf is gecertificeerd boomverzorger, zodat de omgeving rondom de bomen altijd veilig blijft. Door middel van een VTA-scan worden de bomen op veiligheid gecontroleerd. Maak kennis met Hoveniersbedrijf De Vuursche, de veelzijdige tuinspecialist met een groen hart!

Name: Hoebenschot Plant en Tuin
Description:
Welkom op de bedrijfspagina van Hoebenschot Plant en Tuin.

Van je privé- of bedrijfstuin een plek maken om heerlijk te genieten? Met heerlijk vers fruit van fruitbomen en -struiken? Zo’n heerlijke tuinen ontwikkelen, dat is wat Hoebenschot Plant en Tuin doet.

Tuinontwerp, tuinaanleg, tuinonderhoud voor particulieren, bedrijven, overheden, scholen.
 
Oude en vergeten soorten fruitbomen, bessen en sierbomen zorgen voor tuingenot voor al je zintuigen. Ze brengen je tuin tot leven en zorgen voor biodiversiteit. Da’s heerlijk genieten, toch?

Fruitboomgaard

Hoebenschot Plant en Tuin heeft een eigen ambachtelijke boomkwekerij van oude en vergeten fruitbomen en -planten, haagplanten. Met veel liefde en heerlijke energie gekweekt. Unieke stukjes groen te koop voor particulieren, tuinaanleggers, groothandels en organisaties.

Workshops

Fruitbomen snoeien – snelcursus oude en vergeten fruitbomen en bessen – ziekten, plagen en nuttige insecten herkennen – en meer. 

Onze kennis en ervaring delen we graag. Volg onze activiteitenkalender op www.hoebenschot.be

Name: Refining Spray Solutions
Description:
At Refining Spray Solutions, we are dedicated to enhancing the ease of living through specialized services that extend the life of your landscape bedding. We enhance the color and extend the life of your pine straw and mulch. Let us show you the difference with a Free Demonstration.
We specialize in three key service areas:
    • Pine Straw Installation: Transforming your landscape with the careful laying of pine straw to prevent evaporation of water from the soil and helps reduce weed growing in beds while also keeping erosion at bay to help enhance curb appeal.
    • Pine Straw Enhancement: Using our innovative spray solution, we bring an astonishing nine-month color stay guarantee to extend the color life of your pine straw, ensuring a vibrant landscape year-round that will enhance your other landscape features.
    • Mulch Enhancement: Providing expert mulch spraying services with an astounding nine-month color stay guarantee to protect and refine your outdoor spaces with a cost-effective and eco-friendly approach to enhance your landscaping features.
We set ourselves apart from the competition through:
    • Truly Free Demonstration: We provide all the necessary supplies and perform the task, allowing you to simply observe and experience the transformation for yourself.
    • Nine-month Color Stay Guarantee: Our color is guaranteed for 9 months over new or fresh Pine straw and mulch.
    • Sustainable Practices: We are committed to eco-friendly landscaping, offering environmentally responsible solutions that minimize our impact on the environment.
    • Cost-Effective Solution: Our approach not only enhances aesthetics but also provides cost savings over time, making us the wise choice for landscaping needs.
    • Customer-Centric Approach: At Refining Spray Solutions, we prioritize customer satisfaction, working closely with clients to achieve their unique landscaping goals.

- fourniture et pose de portails, de clôtures,

- fourniture et plantation de végétaux (arbres, tous végétaux),

Nous effectuons également beaucoup d'entretiens, qu'ils soient auprès de particuliers #B2B, des syndics #B2B2C ou des entreprises #B2B. Les tailles d'arbustes et de haies, les tailles topiaires, les élagages, les abattages, les remises en état sont également notre lot quotidien.

Aujourd’hui, nous sommes une PME constituée de plusieurs équipes  de collaborateurs actifs qui œuvrons au quotidien pour être à votre écoute et réaliser une prestation conforme à vos attentes.

Hartman Hoveniers en Boomverzorgers is zich op ieder moment bewust van het belang van een
gezonde en groene omgeving. Onze wereld, onze natuur is namelijk een kostbaar en onvervangbaar

Name: The Plant Corner
Description:
— Ons verhaal

In 2017 openden de deuren van onze plantenwinkel The Plant Corner in Antwerpen. We organiseerden workshops, events en richtten talloze huizen en bedrijven in met groen. Na een tijdje kwam de vraag of we ook stadstuinen konden inrichten, dus besloot Sofie een bijkomende opleiding Tuinontwerp te volgen. De vraag werd echter zo groot dat we besloten om onze winkel eind 2023 te sluiten en volop in te zetten op het vergroenen van stadstuinen en bedrijven.

— Tuinontwerp op maat

Je kan bij ons terecht voor een tuinontwerp op maat. We richten voornamelijk kleinere stadstuinen in. Wil je graag je stadstuin vergroenen op een duurzame manier, met aandacht voor biodiversiteit? Dan ben je bij ons aan het juiste adres. Samen met enkele onderaannemers, maken we van jouw tuin een groene oase!

— Groeninrichting

Sofie is met haar opleiding als interieurvormgever ook de aangewezen persoon om je te adviseren welke planten en potten het best bij jouw interieur of zaak passen. Van winkels en restaurants tot bedrijven: je groenproject is bij ons in de juiste handen.

Name: Molen Planten
Description:
A Molen Planten é a única empresa no Brasil especialista em paisagismo de interiores com processo de Hidrocultura. Com parcerias internacionais para um constante aperfeiçoamento e maior qualidade nos produtos e serviços, a Molen Planten tem há 16 anos a qualidade testada e comprovada por seus clientes.

As plantas são adaptadas para ambientes internos corporativos. Onde consiste em um sistema autossuficiente que indica o máximo e mínimo de água na planta.

A Molen Planten garante um respaldo total do serviço, onde a manutenção consiste em higienização, poda, rega, adubação e controle fitossanitário (pragas e doenças) com produtos biológicos altamente controlado.

Em uma época onde mais e mais pessoas sofrem com os efeitos negativos da poluição e salas sem ventilação, as plantas fazem toda a diferença para ajudar a limpar e equilibrar o ar. Escritórios com ambientes climatizados artificialmente, passam a nos prejudicar pelo ressecamento do ar, e o papel das plantas é trazer a volta da umidade. As plantas ajudam até mesmo a aumentar a vida útil do filtro do ar condicionado. 

O diferencial e o objetivo da Molen Planten para com seus cliente é a facilidade. O sistema Molen Planten é produzido com água e argila expandida, isso torna o produto mais leve. Esse processo é totalmente seguro e não permite a proliferação do mosquito Aedes aegypti, devido a água permanecer isolada, com isso, o sistema é considerado extremamente higiênico. A Molen Planten viabiliza atender seus clientes com muita agilidade, com retornos e execuções imediatas.

Dentre os serviços prestados pela empresa, o cliente poderá escolher entre: locação, venda e também a manutenção.

 Paisajismo con propósito:
Cada espacio verde que creamos está pensado para integrarse con el entorno, elevar la experiencia de los visitantes y reflejar la identidad del lugar. No solo diseñamos jardines: construimos escenarios que conectan con la naturaleza.

– Diseño de jardines personalizados con enfoque tropical
– Construcción de áreas verdes según planos del cliente o con propuesta integral
– Suministro especializado de plantas tropicales y ornamentales

– Mantenimiento correctivo y preventivo

 Sostenibilidad como eje central:
Nuestros proyectos buscan cumplir con los estándares necesarios para apoyar certificaciones como LEED, BREEAM o EarthCheck, promoviendo un paisajismo funcional, responsable y duradero.

Trabajamos con hoteles de prestigio internacional como Belmond Maroma, The Reserve at Mayakoba, Secrets Moxché, Rosewood y los nuevos desarrollos del Tren Maya (Tulum y Chichén Itzá).

 Si estás por construir o renovar tu hotel, te ayudamos a crear un jardín que sea tan valioso como cada huésped que lo recorre.

IRRIGAÇÃO DE CONFIANÇA
A certeza de que não vai causar infiltração, a água fica completamente contida dentro do sistema, ou seja, não precisa impermeabilizar a parede.
ECONOMIA DE TEMPO
A imediata transformação visual do ambiente, são 36 plantas por m2 já adultas! Ou seja, não precisa esperar as plantas crescerem.
FACILIDADE DE MUDANÇA
A troca das plantas é muito fácil, como os encaixes dos vasos são independentes dos módulos, você pode modificar a composição do jardim de forma simples e quando quiser.

Our service area ranges from Eagle Rock to the northeast, centrally in Silverlake and Hollywood Hills, west to Santa Monica, and down to South LA. For more information about TreeCareLA and its approach, visit www.treecarela.com.

Name: Big Bully Turf
Description:
We are a woman-owned, San Diego based, family first company that began out of my desire to transform the home improvement industry. As I embarked on buying turf for my home, my story was full of frustration. I did not have a trusted source to provide information on turf, I spent weeks dealing with contractors showing up late or not at all and feeling “bullied” by their sales tactics.
I thought to myself there has to be a better way …. And realized I could do it better. I started by hand picking an installation team with people I would feel comfortable having in my own home. The more I learned about turf, I found ways to improve it for the homeowner, designing my own proprietary custom turf. Our turf includes a feature called Polar Flex allowing the white backing to keep the turf much cooler than our competitors and added extra drainage to keep pet odors away.

Description:

- Biophilic design consultancy for offices, companies and coworking spaces
- Biophilic design for offices, companies and coworking spaces
- Designing residential or commercial outdoor spaces  
- Consulting on customised green wellness plans
- Biophilic Design and Healing Garden training

Crisalide Eco Design is a studio that has been studying and researching the relationship between man and the environment for years. 
Thanks to our experience in the field of biophilia and therapeutic green, we are able to provide answers to the growing state of tress and malaise related to everyday life.
Crisalide Eco Deisgn is able to carry out analyses, consultancy, and projects for private or public spaces, in order to bring psciophysical well-being through strategies, activities, special tools, and design projects focused on nature.

The services we offer to private companies and public institutions range from the design of indoor and outdoor spaces through biophilic design, to the creation of therapeutic oases of well-being, to the accompaniment of forest bathing and nature therapy activities conducted by our team within protected areas and classified by scientific research.

Chrysalis Eco Design develops tailor-made solutions that fit the needs of different sectors: private, business, hospitality, education.
We use cutting-edge technologies and theories to bring psycho-physical wellbeing to workspaces and everyday life.

Our goal is to contribute to building a more sustainable future through the progressive well-being of people in their work and home environments.

Over 25 years ago, Stoney Bradsher set forth to create a company that would transform the word "landscapes" to encompass the entire outdoor experience. Creating expansive outdoor living environments with spa-like qualities and resort style amenities became Bradsher’s calling card and left estate homeowners in awe of the transformation.

Today, the name Bradsher is behind every detail of the outdoor experience. We design and build lush landscapes with captivating lighting. We create striking outdoor fireplaces and install outdoor flooring of unique stone, rustic brick pavers or stamped concrete. We transform pool areas into a slice of paradise with spa-like qualities complemented by tasteful dining and lounge areas that invite relaxation and fun. We even install special recreation areas like pickle ball courts or putting greens. Whether pure serenity is the goal or a space that epitomizes breathtaking luxury, our craftsman know how to build the outdoor experience you have always envisioned. That's the hallmark of when outdoor spaces are built by Bradsher.

Based in Henderson, North Carolina, we build outdoor spaces with painstaking detail for estate home and expansive properties across the state and in southern Virginia. There’s a difference when outdoor spaces have the stamp of perfection that is uniquely Bradsher Custom Outdoor.

Name: Silvasud Environnement & Le Jardin Jacques Rouy
Description:
Etudes / Conception / Maçonnerie paysagère et Entretien de jardin

Le Jardin Jacques Rouy, société créée il y a plus de 50 ans fait, depuis 2011 partie du groupe Silvasud. Cette entreprise familiale est constituée d’une équipe pluridisciplinaire hautement qualifiée, spécialisée dans la création et l’entretien de jardins. Natifs du Luberon, passionnés de nature et amoureux de la Provence, Romain puis Julie Percie du Sert ont intégré l’entreprise à partir de 2013 et mettent tout en œuvre pour que vos rêves de jardin se réalisent.

Observateur patient et attentif, Luc Percie du Sert nourrit depuis l’enfance une admiration pour la nature, le paysage et les jardins de multiples inspirations. Naturaliste par passion, maçon par raison, il crée Silvasud en 2004. L’entreprise puise ses compétences dans une solide connaissance de la culture, du patrimoine et de la flore méditerranéenne. De la conception à la réalisation, c’est aujourd’hui toute une équipe de professionnels du paysage qui offre son savoir-faire et son expertise au service de votre projet d’aménagement paysager.

Rooibos Boomverzorging helpt particulieren, landgoederen, aannemers, bedrijven en gemeenten met één doel: grip op bomen. Inhoudelijk én praktisch. Waar we sterk in zijn:
- Inspectie/BVC en inventarisaties: inzicht en overzicht voor verantwoord beheer
- BEA en boomtechnisch toezicht: bomen, (infra)werkzaamheden en uitvoerbaarheid samen laten gaan
- Uitvoering (snoei/kap/(her)aanplant): zorgvuldig en veilig de boom onderhouden binnen de kaders die een omgeving biedt
- Boombehoud waar het kan: maatregelen om de boom voor de lange termijn te behouden (op basis van: belangen + standplaats + context)

Onze werkwijze:
- Nuchter, praktisch en goed onderbouwd
- Geen omzetgedreven snoei: als niet snoeien beter is, zeggen we dat en leggen we uit waarom
- Altijd duidelijke scope en concrete opdrachtomschrijvingen voor duidelijke verwachtingen
- Veiligheidscultuur: zorgvuldig werken met minimale kans op schade aan omgeving en eigendom
- Ontwikkeling: streven naar het nog verder ontwikkelen van onze competenties onder leiding van in-house ex-boomverzorgingsdocent

Name: Håkonsen & Sukke Landskapsentreprenør AS
Description:
Med hoder som vet og hender som kan, skaper vi utemiljøer som varer – og gleder.

Håkonsen & Sukke er en landskapsentreprenør med solid fagkompetanse, praktisk tilnærming, flinke folk og vilje til å gjøre ting skikkelig. Siden 2009 har vi utviklet, bygget og tatt vare på uterom for både offentlig og private kunder. Vi bygger parker, byrom, gater og grøntområder som skal fungere i dag og i mange år fremover. Vi tar vare på det vi har skapt, og nettopp det er en jobb som må gjøres året rundt. Derfor jobber vi også med vintervedlikehold, kan tilby ved og er opptatt av løsninger som gir gode steder å være – hver dag, hele året.

Vi er opptatt av kvalitet i alle ledd, ryddige prosesser og bærekraftige løsninger som tåler både tidens tann og menneskelig bruk. Overvannshåndtering, blågrønne løsninger og helhetlig landskapsutvikling er en naturlig del av hverdagen vår.

Samtidig er vi mennesker som jobber for mennesker. Hos oss får lærlinger, fagfolk og ledere utvikle seg sammen i et arbeidsmiljø preget av samarbeid, mestring og trivsel. Vi investerer i kunnskap, og vet at de beste løsningene ofte er et resultat av erfaring, nytenking og godt lagarbeid.

Vi finner løsninger, også der det er lett å bare ville grave seg ned. Vi legger stein med kirurgisk presisjon, graver stødig i selv rennende søler og smiler selv når vi vasser i sludd. Vi vet at noe av det fineste vi har rundt oss, starter langt nede i jorda. Nettopp derfor kan vi skape levende, varige uterom der mennesker trives.

Har du spørsmål eller noe du trenger hjelp til? Da er det bare å ta kontakt.

Velkommen ut.

Name: Department of Landscape Architecture, SPA, Delhi
Description:
The Department of Landscape Architecture at the School of Planning and Architecture (SPA), New Delhi, was established in 1972, making it one of the earliest departments dedicated to landscape architecture in India.

The curriculum is thoughtfully designed to provide students a solid grounding in the fundamental principles of landscape architecture, including disciplines such as ecological planning, sustainable design, site investigation, cultural landscape preservation, and more. It is urged of students to take part in fieldwork that complements the coursework's integration of theoretical knowledge and hands on training. The integration of study and practical application guarantees that graduates with the necessary skills to tackle the complex environmental issues linked to current ecological concerns.

Our mission involves a strong commitment to:
- Make SPA a multi-disciplinary academic knowledge house, a pioneer and a global leader in planning and design.
- To provide the nation with passionate and innovative professionals that are rooted in cultural ethos, contributing to nation building with their utmost dedication.
- To carry forward the legacy as an institute with a competitive edge in the field of human settlement planning, design, research, training and consultancy.

Name: Terre d'Ombre
Description:
TERRE D'OMBRE is a team of qualified landscapers specializing in plants, offering both advice and expertise in landscaping. This team of passionate landscapers combines knowledge of plants with aesthetic and artistic sensitivity.
Landscape contractors usually offer a wide range of services, from earthworks to masonry, wood or metal infrastructures, and sometimes neglect the very substance of a natural, long-lasting garden: plants.
It would be presumptuous to claim to master all the disciplines involved in garden design, which is why TERRE D'OMBRE, in close collaboration with Les Serres Caladoises, focuses primarily on the planting of landscape projects.
While the landscape design is handled entirely by the TERRE D'OMBRE team, combining originality, know-how and artistic flair in the production of sketch plans, the execution of the work is entrusted to a panel of local landscapers rigorously selected and supported by TERRE D'OMBRE.
With the idea of putting plants back at the heart of gardens and responding to contemporary environmental challenges (drought, heatwaves, biodiversity, pests, flooding...) it is becoming essential to adapt conventional landscaping practices and bring to gardens the biodiversity essential to the balance of flora and fauna.
A well-thought-out garden plan, composed of plants adapted to the constraints of the site and the local climate, will undoubtedly limit the need for routine maintenance, while at the same time providing invaluable well-being.
TERRE D'OMBRE works upstream and complements the work of landscapers on site, to prepare, design and plant all types of green spaces.

Giving back to our community is a high priority for us as well!  We have annual fundraiser to raise funds for a local charity, Turning Point.  We also have an annual toy drive, support our employee volunteering efforts, and donate to local communities.

Sous son impulsion et son regard neuf, l’entreprise investit alors dans la production d’arbuste, réintroduit l’olivier dans son offre et développe son activité de paysagiste.

Aujourd’hui, avec la pépinière et l’entreprise de paysage, Sarivière s’inscrit définitivement dans la modernité grâce à des idées neuves, des produits de qualité, un service personnalisé et un personnel compétent. 
 Sarivière c’est avant tout un esprit d’équipe ! Une quarantaine de salariés expérimentés qui mettent leur savoir-faire au service des particuliers, professionnels et collectivités locales avec un seul mot d’ordre : la satisfaction et le sourire du client.

Name: Campo Culture
Description:
After 20 years of hands-on experience with soil, farming, and creating gardens that connect people to nature, I took a step back to reflect on my journey. I realized how deeply landscapes influence people—engaging all senses and fostering a profound connection with nature, from taste to consciousness. This awareness led me to establish Campo Culture.

More than just a landscape company, Campo Culture is a movement—a community dedicated to regenerative design, ecological awareness, and sustainable land stewardship. In October 2020, I moved to Portugal to embark on this journey, and along the way, I met like-minded individuals who shared the same vision. Like a wildflower garden, our team has grown organically, rooted in a mission to restore and enhance the land.

Today, we specialize in integrating farms and landscapes into hospitality, homes, and outdoor spaces, designing environments where aesthetics and sustainability coexist. Through innovation and regenerative practices, we align human needs with ecological values, creating landscapes that heal the land and inspire consciousness.

As part of our commitment to earth regeneration, we also cultivate our own small-scale farm, growing seasonal, organic produce with zero waste. This project not only nourishes the soil but also fosters a community dedicated to healing the land and cultivating a sustainable future.

At Campo Culture, we don’t just design landscapes—we cultivate awareness and plant the seeds for a thriving, regenerative future.

Name: Dirt Wizards
Description:
At Dirt Wizards we love working and we know good tools make all the difference when we're out getting work done, day-after-day, week-after-week, all year long. We got tired of waiting for some other company to build tools as serious as we are to empower us to do our jobs. So, we designed, engineered, tried, tested, refined, rebuilt, and ultimately created our own line-up of sprinkler line installation equipment.

Every product from Dirt Wizards is premium quality, hand-built with heavy gauge steel sheet, plate, tube, flat bar, and a few special alloys where necessary. Our thought process was simple, build it thoughtfully and build it to last. Landfills are full of cheap junk. The last place we want any Dirt Wizards product to end up is a landfill.

We also discovered that building premium quality products, 100% American Made, doesn't mean they will be priced out of reach for the people who need them. Dirt Wizards products are solid, built for use and abuse, but very affordable. Our prices seem like wizardry too, but they aren't too good to be true. They're fair, like us.

Name: GM Paisagismo
Description:

Visite nosso site: www.gersonmunayer.com.br

Visite nossas redes sociais:
Instagram: @gersonmunayer e @vasosgmunayer

O paisagismo é uma arte e técnica multifacetada necessária à evolução da paisagem, segundo a qual a natureza e o homem precisam caminhar juntos nos mais diversos tipos de circunstâncias e regiões.

O solo, a fauna, a flora, a história, as comunidades, a arquitetura, a jardinagem; a economia e o clima devem ser observados de forma holística, unificada, de modo a restabelecer vivências e sentimentos, respeitar sua diversidade, enaltecer suas riquezas, compreender suas energias e mistérios.

E é nesse contexto que o paisagismo tem papel fundamental, uma vez que condensa informações de áreas diversas, inspira novas ideias, agrega projetos, capta sensações, promove beleza e estética e, sobretudo, transmuta a vida de muitas pessoas através de mudanças pontuais na consciência individual e coletiva.

We merge the art of landscape architecture with a commitment to exploring innovative concepts and promoting the simple pleasures of play and the strength of relationships, which are fundamental to resilience. We see children as active participants and future shapers of their environments, not merely passive recipients of adult decisions. Our goal is to build inclusive, vibrant cities that respond to the aspirations of all inhabitants, with a special focus on the youngest among us.
Our services include action research, workshops, child-friendly assessment for places and projects, assisting developers and city officials in creating design guidelines, developing pop-up temporary interventions to test new models, project planning and design, and collaborating with like-minded professionals. Name: La Florathèque - Création espaces verts à Mauges sur Loire
Description:
Conception et réalisation de jardins bien-être, paysagiste basé à Saint-Florent-Le-Vieil (commune de Mauges sur Loire).

PAYSAGISTE DEPUIS 1984
La Florathèque est une entreprise paysagiste créée en 1984 à Ancenis (44) entre Nantes et Angers.
La société La Florathèque a été reprise en Juillet 2022 lorsque le fondateur de la Florathèque, a pris sa retraite :
Sébastien BENETEAU a repris La Florathèque et a spécialisé son activité sur la création d’espaces verts à vivre : les aménagements paysagers de parcs et jardins. C’est alors que la Florathèque a déménagé pour se « délocaliser » non loin d’Ancenis, à Saint-Florent-Le-Vieil (Mauges sur Loire), dans le charmant village de la Boutouchère.
CREATION DE JARDINS BIEN-ÊTRE
L’aménagement de jardins à Mauges sur Loire offre une incroyable diversité de créations paysagères possibles.
L’extérieur fait aujourd’hui partie intégrante de la maison, c’est un véritable lieu de vie. Les confinements ont eu l’avantage de prendre conscience de l’importance de son jardin, de sa terrasse.
En fonction de la configuration du terrain, son exposition, la qualité de la terre ou de la disposition de la maison, l’aménagement paysager peut jouer avec :
-	L’aménagement d’une cuisine d’extérieur avec salon de jardin, brasero, bar… (lien vers page)
-	La rénovation ou la création d’une terrasse : en bois, en pierre… (lien vers page)
-	La création d’un bassin naturel (lien vers page)
-	L’aménagement d’un jardin bien-être avec l’alliance d’espèces végétales esthétiques et harmonieuses (lien vers page)
-	L’ornement des jardins et terrasses avec de la décoration d’extérieur (lien vers page)
-	Pergolas et carports ornementaux
C’est dans ce jardin bien-être que notre client va lire sereinement un bon livre pendant ses vacances et le week-end, que vont jouer les enfants et petits-enfants. C’est aussi dans cet agréable aménagement extérieur que nos clients vont passer des moments de joyeuse convivialité avec leurs amis autour d’un bon verre.
Location: Mauges sur Loire, Pays de la Loire

Classic Lawns & Gardens' responsibility as landscape designers is to take our years of combined knowledge and experience to guide you through a flexible and interactive process, from concept to completion. 

The best designs emerge from a thoughtful and collaborative relationship with an understanding of your expectations and priorities. During our first consultation, we will evaluate the existing conditions of your property and discuss all of your ideas. 

A master plan, drawn to scale, will provide continuity as the project moves forward. The proposal, which will be presented with your master plan, is organized with individually priced phases that follow a logical and orderly construction sequence.

When the work begins, you will have a full understanding of what will be happening on your property and how the project will be coordinated. We use top-quality materials and nursery stock, and will provide a highly talented team to address every aspect of the installation. Name: Kniffing's Landscape and Maintenance
Description:
The Kniffings Landscape + Maintenance Story

KLM landscaping concept and passion birthed in 1980 when our family first opened their Nursery and Landscape Business. Plants, gardening and landscape design started as a hobby but soon became a passion that turned into 20 years of serving clients in full time Nursery. Growing up, my dad would take me to different job sites teaching me every aspect and detail of the business. Their passion for the work, integrity in the business and seeing such satisfied clients made me realize that I would one day walk in their footsteps and carry on the family nursery legacy. I persistently pursued getting my Nursery and Landscape Certificate while working in the family Nursery and in 2014 opened my first Nursery and Landscape business. Now with over 20 years of my own experience I opened Kniffing Landscape and Maintenance (KLM). Together with my team of gardening experts, we are more knowledgeable and passionate than ever to guide, inspire and serve clients in their ultimate gardening creations.

Our services include lawn care, landscape maintenance, fertilization, and weed control management. We also do tree and bush trimming, irrigation installation, repair and maintenance, mulch and flower bed installation and maintenance, spring and fall cleanup.

Fundado por Carmen García del Salto, arquitecto y arquitecto paisajista, quien estudió y pasó sus primeros años de carrera en Inglaterra aprendiendo de su cultura y que traslada este aprendizaje a los paisajes mediterráneos. 

Nuestra MISIÓN es explorar la relación entre la arquitectura y el medio ambiente optimizando el uso de los recursos para minimizar su impacto. El uso de materiales naturales y vegetación autóctona, resistente al clima y con muy bajo mantenimiento, proporcionan un carácter agreste lleno de color y belleza. 

Nuestra VISIÓN es la de acercar la naturaleza a las ciudades y ofrecer soluciones que promuevan el bienestar y la salud de aquel que la habite. 

Nuestra CULTURA se basa en el sentimiento de permanencia, el respeto hacia el entorno y memoria del lugar combinado con el deseo de enriquecer lo que ya es.

L’entreprise compte un bureau d’étude avec des concepteurs paysagistes pour répondre aux demandes de conception, qui s’appuie ensuite sur des conducteurs de travaux pour la partie technique de mise en œuvre et des équipes pluridisciplinaire sur le terrain dans la réalisation

Nous nous adressons aux particuliers et aux entreprises pour l’élaboration de leurs projets d’aménagements et leurs demandes d’entretien sur le territoire de l’OUEST parisien 75-92-78-95.

L’exigence et l’ambition sont les guides de notre entreprises, ces valeurs sont incarnées chez chacun de nos collaborateurs ainsi que dans nos projets conçus, réalisés et entretenus.

A travers cette adhésion, l’entreprise s’entoure de professionnels experts pour se perfectionner dans son développement. Elle offre la possibilité à ses collaborateurs de bénéficier de partages d’expériences entre entreprises adhérentes partout en France, de formations pour toujours évoluer dans son métier, et de participer à des évènements forts notamment lié à la course au large avec le bateau lantana environnement.

Name: GREENTECK
Description:
GREENTECK es una empresa vanguardista que fusiona arte y naturaleza para crear espacios armoniosos y sostenibles. Especializada en diseño de paisaje, permacultura y terapia botánica, nuestra misión es transformar entornos urbanos y rurales en oasis de belleza, funcionalidad y bienestar.
Nuestro equipo de expertos en diseño paisajista trabaja en estrecha colaboración con los clientes para materializar sus sueños en jardines excepcionales. Desde parques públicos hasta jardines privados, cada proyecto se aborda con creatividad, respeto por el entorno y un enfoque sostenible.
La permacultura es el corazón de nuestra filosofía. Integramos principios de diseño éticos para crear sistemas productivos y autosuficientes que respetan los ciclos naturales. Además, ofrecemos servicios de consultoría para implementar prácticas permaculturales en huertos, granjas y comunidades.
La terapia botánica es otra dimensión única de nuestro enfoque. Conscientemente utilizamos la naturaleza como herramienta terapéutica para mejorar la salud mental y emocional. Organizamos talleres y sesiones personalizadas donde los participantes se sumergen en la belleza y la energía curativa de las plantas.
En GT, nos enorgullece no solo crear paisajes visualmente impresionantes, sino también contribuir al bienestar del planeta. Nuestro compromiso con la sostenibilidad se refleja en cada proyecto, desde la selección de plantas nativas hasta la implementación de técnicas de conservación del agua y energía.
La innovación es nuestra brújula, y nos mantenemos actualizados con las últimas tendencias en diseño y tecnología verde. Nos esforzamos por ser líderes en la industria, incorporando ideas vanguardistas que fusionan la estética contemporánea con prácticas eco amigables.

Descubre el arte de vivir en armonía con GREENTECK.

Name: Green Up Grass
Description:
Innovative lawn care service that INSTANTLY greens and CONSISTENTLY keeps grass green whilst decreasing watering needs.

Green Up Grass' nutrition program is a customized blend of liquid fertiliser (organically derived pigment) in combination with traditional granular fertilizers to maximize colour and keep grass looking its best year round. Preventative herbicides and pesticide treatments are incorporated into the seasonal nutrition plans. Regular treatments (6- weekly nutrition programs) improve grass health and can dramatically decrease water and mowing needs by up to 50%.

Our service is unique as results are INSTANT and CONSISTENT.

We offer 3 programs but can customize needs as needed:

1. 6-Weekly Nutrition Program
2. 6-Weekly Nutrition Program plus+ (year long protection over lawn grubs and weeds)
3. 12 Month Green Grass Guarantee (as many applications as needed to keep the grass green)

Name: ROYARCH LANDSCAPE
Description: We are a specialized garden and landscape development company committed to transforming spaces into thriving green environments that inspire beauty, wellness, and sustainability. Our services span across indoor and outdoor garden creation, tailored for residences, commercial spaces, religious sites, public areas, and institutional grounds. We offer expert solutions in indoor gardening, vertical gardens, and kitchen gardens that bring nature into everyday life, enhancing air quality and visual appeal in even the most compact settings. For larger landscapes, we develop lush outdoor gardens, oxygen parks, children’s parks, school gardens, and highway landscaping projects that support biodiversity and environmental harmony. Our designs are not only functional but also reflect aesthetic excellence, using climate-appropriate plants, eco-conscious materials, and smart irrigation systems. We take pride in developing serene temple gardens, elegant corporate landscapes, and drought-tolerant succulent and cactus gardens, all customized to the space, purpose, and personality of our clients. Beyond design and installation, we provide reliable garden maintenance services including pruning, seasonal planting, pest management, and irrigation system upkeep to ensure your green space remains vibrant year-round. With a passionate team of horticulturists, designers, and technicians, we bring expertise, creativity, and care to every project. Whether it’s a home balcony, business park, schoolyard, or urban roadside, we believe every space has the potential to flourish. Our mission is to reconnect people with nature—one garden at a time—creating environments that are not only beautiful but purposeful, sustainable, and beneficial to both people and the planet.

Name: Tubestock Nursery Australia
Description:
Tubestock Nursery Australia (TNA) is a leading wholesale production nursery located in Southeast Queensland. Managed by a dedicated team of qualified horticulturists, our expertise spans the Nursery, Landscape Construction, and Revegetation industries. We pride ourselves on producing high-quality nursery lines, with a special focus on native Australian plant stock. 

Situated in Bellmere (Caboolture West), our nursery operates on 4 hectares of active production land, with an additional 2 hectares reserved for future expansion.

Our propagation team adheres to 'Florabank' guidelines through regular seed collections, ensuring sustainability and biodiversity. We specialize in growing trees that meet the AS2303 standard, using seeds propagated onsite to ensure optimal quality and provenance.

2024 marks a significant milestone for us as we celebrate 5 years of NGIQ membership, reflecting our ongoing commitment to industry excellence.

At TNA, forward orders are our specialty, and we look forward to supporting your projects with reliable service and top-quality plants.

Commitment to Quality, Safety and the Environment
At TNA, we are deeply committed to producing plants sustainably while prioritizing the safety of our team and the environment. Our practices are designed to meet the highest standards, ensuring the best outcomes for our customers and the planet.

Name: Green experience
Description:
Tal como nuestro nombre expresa creemos que vivir una "experiencia verde" en contacto con la naturaleza es algo fundamental para el día a día tanto en el ambiente laboral como en el hogar de cada uno. Por lo tanto nuestro objetivo es brindar el mejor servicio posible para lograr la satisfacción de nuestros clientes a la hora de presentarnos sus exigencias.

Somos una empresa cuyos dueños llevan 3 generaciones dedicándose a la jardinería y al paisajismo. Hemos trabajado tanto en el ámbito público en la refacción y mantenimiento como en la planificación de plazas en la ciudad de Buenos Aires así como en la reserva ecológica de costanera sur. Sin embargo, ya hace varios años nos especializamos en el sector privado como puede verse en nuestra cartera de clientes conformada por empresas de distinta envergadura así como de entidades bancarias.

Nuestra filosofía se centra en darle al cliente la mejor solución de la manera más eficaz y al mejor precio posible.

Nuestro objetivo es que cuando un cliente nos propone resolver algún problema o satisfacer alguna necesidad, podamos brindarle la mayor cantidad de opciones para que él elija cuál prefiere y así ser absoluto protagonista de su jardín o patio.

Name: Kral Garden
Description:
Hakkımızda
Kral Garden, peyzaj tasarımı, uygulama ve bakım hizmetleri alanında yüksek kalite standartlarıyla faaliyet gösteren bir çevre düzenleme firmasıdır. Doğaya saygılı, sürdürülebilir ve estetik çözümler üretme vizyonuyla yola çıkan firmamız; sadece alan düzenlemesi yapmakla kalmaz, aynı zamanda yaşam alanlarını doğayla bütünleştirir.

Firmamızın en güçlü yönlerinden biri de, peyzaj projelerinde kullanılan bitkileri kendi yetiştirme alanlarımızda özenle üretmemizdir. Bu sayede bitkilerin gelişimini kontrol altında tutarak, her projeye sağlıklı, dayanıklı ve iklim şartlarına uygun bitkiler sunabiliyoruz. Kendi üretimimiz olması; kalite kontrol, maliyet avantajı ve proje takibinde büyük bir güven sağlar.

Profesyonel ekibimizle villa bahçelerinden kurumsal peyzaj projelerine, otomatik sulama sistemlerinden rulo çim uygulamalarına kadar geniş bir yelpazede hizmet veriyoruz. Her detayda müşteri memnuniyetini, doğaya uyumu ve kalıcı çözümleri önceliklendiriyoruz.

Doğayı güzelleştirmek bizim işimiz. Çünkü biz, yeşilin en asil hâline “Kral Garden” diyoruz.

Name: GREENTEK SRL
Description:
Progettiamo e realizziamo Giardini da Vivere. 
Il nostro compito principale è quello di ottenere e consegnare giardini a basso impatto manutentivo e pensati per valorizzare al massimo i luoghi circostanti. 
Non progettiamo semplici spazi verdi, ma veri Giardini che vengono arredati con massi ciclopici, essenze vegetali ricercate, forme e linee sinuose che incorniciano ogni angolo come un quadro prestigioso. Ma il lavoro di GREENTEK non si ferma a questo. 
Svogliamo opere di cura del verde privato, commerciale e pubblico. Potature, abbattimenti, impianti di irrigazione, piscine e laghi.
Il target di lavoro ed i risultati sono sempre al massimo livello. Si lavora con determinazione, precisione, serietà e puntualità. I nostri ragazzi sono componenti fondamentali di ogni squadra organizzata, autonoma e responsabile.
Abbiamo fatto di GREENTEK un mix tra un lavoro altamente artigianale ed un'organizzazione manageriale attenta alla coordinazione delle operatività, all'ottimizzazione dei flussi operativi e soprattutto attenta a dare il massimo raggiungibile in ogni richiesta, in ogni cantiere e per ogni cliente.

Name: Surround Landscape Design
Description:
We just want to surround you with everything you love.  

We create spaces that reflect the lives of the people we design for. Spaces you feel good in, spaces you cherish, spaces that surround you with vitality and that fill you with that sense of safety that comes from being happy and comfortable in your own home. 

The spaces we create give back. 

They’re spaces that nourish you– from a lush lawn perfect for a family game of cricket, to a BBQ area to cook your 300g scotch fillet, to a perfectly placed bench ideal for soaking up that late afternoon winter sun. We create places that can evolve with you, so you can create a lifetime of memories.

We think your home should have everything.

Our core design principles ensure your backyard adds maximum value to your home. Our landscape design methodology centralises your unique wants and needs to expand and enrich your outdoor space, meaning its everything you knew it could always be and more.

We want the best for you.

We consider functionality, structural integrity, and seasonal interest to create a perfectly balanced landscape design. Our design methodology centralises your passion for nature and your vision for a revitalizing, nourishing outdoor experience. We also consider seasonal interest, the right plant for the right place, water use, and the arrangement and composition of natural form, colour and texture to bring your outdoor space to beautiful, bursting life.

We want you to do you.

We know how to work with you to help you communicate what you want, so you can make the best decisions and be thrilled with the result. We know people – that’s the Surround difference.

Name: Pépinieres Rouy Imbert
Description:
Platanor ‘Vallis Clausa’ est un platane hybride sélectionné pour sa résistance exceptionnelle au chancre coloré (Ceratocystis platani). Issu des travaux de recherche de l’INRAE et co-obtenu par les Pépinières Rouy-Imbert, il est aujourd’hui la seule variété autorisée à la plantation dans les zones infectées.

Son feuillage dense, sa croissance rapide, sa tolérance aux milieux urbains et sa haute valeur ornementale en font une solution idéale pour les alignements, avenues, parcs ou replantations sensibles.

Protégé par un Certificat d’Obtention Végétale, le Platanor ‘Vallis Clausa’ est produit exclusivement par les Pépinières Rouy-Imbert, garantissant traçabilité, qualité sanitaire et conformité variétale.

We also offer exterior grounds maintenance which includes mowing lawns, shrub trimming, weeding, etc. We also do annual flower beds and containers with an initial planting, maintenance throughout the summer with watering and deadheading, and clean up in the fall. 

We offer exterior holiday lighting and interior holiday decorating in the fall and winter. The exterior lighting entails putting up winter lights on trees and buildings for businesses and residences. We also make custom exterior winter arrangements for entry beautification. 

We also have a garden center near 15th and Ingra, offering Anchorage's best variety of houseplants!

Parker Scapes is a Columbus-based residential and commercial landscape company dedicated to transforming outdoor spaces through creative design, skilled craftsmanship, and lasting quality. The result is a seamless blend of form and function designed to elevate curb appeal and quality of life.

Our name is deeply personal and reflects the care and commitment we bring to each project. “Parker” is the name of our founder’s daughter. A daily reminder that our work is about more than property. It’s about pride, purpose, and people. That mindset guides everything we do, from the first consultation to long term care, and drives us to deliver exceptional results on every job.

Whether you’re a homeowner looking to reimagine your yard, an HOA seeking reliable landscape partners, or a commercial property manager focused on long-term maintenance, Parker Scapes provides customized solutions tailored to your needs. From concept to completion and through every season; we’re here to design, build, restore, and maintain landscapes that grow more beautiful over time.

We’re excited to start a visual dialogue, learn about you, and make something beautiful together.

For Chloroplastes Company landscaping is more than constructing a garden or improving the ground. We believe that each project has its individual spirit and task to create something special.

As the “creators of the green” (Chloro=green, life / Plastes=creators) we focus especially on the environment. The protection of the nature and the implementation (/consideration) of the surrounding environment is our highest priority. So it is with the right choice of plant species. The plants we choose are best adapted to the local conditions in the Mediterranean climate.

We choose plants for heat and the dry climate on Crete.

Chloroplastes even offers best modern irrigation techniques for lawns or we have interesting alternatives for a Mediterranean dry garden.

Chloroplastes Company creates / scapes natural gardens, green spaces, Mediterranean gardens, but also exotic gardens or flower gardens. Maybe your garden is nearby the sea or at the beach? So you need a sea garden with special salt tolerant plants. Is your garden in the higher mountains? Then Chloroplastes will create a mountain garden with frost tolerant plants. 

With Chloroplastes Company you found your professional partner scaping your piece of land! Located in Kalyves-Tsivaras Apokoronas – Gardening on Crete (or even outside of Crete if you are interested in us!).

Name: Franz Garten- und Landschaftsbau GmbH
Description:
2013 Ausbildung zum Landschaftsgärtner

Gärten und Natur sind schon seit meiner Kindheit ein Teil von mir, weshalb bereits früh meine Leidenschaft dafür geweckt wurde. Für mich war immer klar, dass ich einen Beruf ausüben möchte, in dem ich meinen Tatendrang und meine Naturverbundenheit verbinden kann. Nach meiner zweijährigen Ausbildungszeit in Leidersbach verbrachte ich drei Gesellenjahre in zwei Garten- und Landschaftsbaubetrieben im Landkreis Aschaffenburg. Dort konnte ich meine praktischen Fertigkeiten weiter ausbauen und Gärten in unterschiedlichsten Stilrichtungen mitplanen, gestalten und pflegen.

2019 Gründung von Franz – Garten- und Landschaftsbau

Seit 2019 bin ich nun mit meinem eigenen Garten- und Landschaftsbaubetrieb selbstständig und voller Tatendrang neue, individuelle und kreative Gartenkonzepte zu planen und umzusetzen. Durch meine Weiterbildung zum Gärtnermeister und Techniker für Garten- und Landschaftsbau an der Landesanstalt für Wein- und Gartenbau in Veitshöchheim begann, konnte ich mein Wissen rund um Pflanzen, Grünflächenbau und Baubetrieb erweitern. 

Meine Leidenschaft ist seit Beginn meiner Tätigkeit als Garten- und Landschaftsbauer ungebrochen und ich bringe diese in all meine Projekte ein. Für mich gibt es nichts Schöneres, als die Fortschritte meiner täglichen Arbeit zu sehen und schließlich eine fertiggestellte Baustelle an die Bauherren zu übergeben.

Ich freue mich darauf, gemeinsam mit Dir deinen Garten zu planen, dabei deine individuellen Wünsche zu beachten und mein Fachwissen und meine Berufserfahrung einzubringen.

Name: Amazing Maintenance Solution
Description:
If you’re in childcare, aged care, education, or manage any facility with synthetic grassed areas, I’d like to introduce you to Amazing Maintenance Solutions (AMS) — specialists in maintaining safe, hygienic environments with over 30 years of experience in install, supply and maintenance of your synthetic grass requirements.
With all of this experience installing and maintaining playground surfaces for childcare centres, schools, and local councils, we’ve seen firsthand how synthetic surfaces can degrade over time and become breeding grounds for bacteria.
To address this growing concern, AMS is proud to introduce our Revolutionary Sanitising Cleaning System. Using advanced UV light technology, our system disinfects all hard surfaces—effectively killing bacteria and viruses—to help ensure your outdoor areas remain clean, safe, and compliant.
Whether you’re looking to improve hygiene standards, meet health regulations, or simply extend the life of your play areas, AMS is here to help.
Get in touch now to see how we can help with your requirements.

Name: Van Berkum Hoveniers

In een eerste gesprek brengen we uw wensen in kaart. Omdat iedere tuinlocatie uniek is, nemen we hiervoor uitgebreid de tijd. We adviseren u over de mogelijkheden, maar zeker ook over dingen die u beter niet kunt doen. Op basis van ons gesprek maken we een uitgebreid tuinontwerp met een plan voor de beplanting. Bij een tuin hoort vaak ook een terras. Hiervoor stellen we een bestratingsplan op.

Na uw goedkeuring gaan we voor u aan de slag. Wilt u tóch net iets anders dan in eerste instantie afgesproken? We zijn flexibel in onze planning en aanpak en doen altijd ons best voor úw droomtuin!

Ons werkgebied ligt in principe rond Balk, Lemmer, Sneek, Joure, Heerenveen en Bolsward. Woont u elders, maar bent u toch op zoek naar een vakkundig hovenier? Neem contact met ons op voor de mogelijkheden.

Van Berkum Hoveniers verzorgt sinds 2019 tuinprojecten. De kracht achter ons bedrijf is Mark van Berkum. Mark is sinds 2015 werkzaam in het vak en opgeleid tot vakkundig hovenier.

Com anos de experiência no mercado, atendemos tanto ambientes residenciais quanto comerciais, cuidando de pequenos jardins e grandes áreas paisagísticas em locais de destaque.
Nosso diferencial está no cuidado técnico aplicado em cada projeto. Investimos constantemente em ferramentas modernas, tecnologia de ponta e capacitação contínua da nossa equipe para garantir que cada jardim receba o tratamento especializado que merece. Sabemos que o paisagismo vai muito além da estética; envolve um conhecimento profundo sobre plantas, manejo correto, prevenção e controle de pragas, e um compromisso com o meio ambiente.

Oferecemos os seguintes serviços:
> MANUTENÇÃO DE JARDINS - Poda, adubação, controle de pragas e doenças, garantindo o desenvolvimento saudável das plantas.

> PROJETOS PAISAGISTICOS E PLANEJAMENTO - Criação de projetos personalizados que unem beleza, funcionalidade e sustentabilidade.

> DIAGNÓSTICO E CONSULTORIA TÉCNICA - Avaliação detalhada de jardins e plantas, com recomendações e laudos técnicos para recuperação eficaz.

> REESTRUTURAÇÃO DE ÁREAS VERDES - Substituição estratégica de plantas, preservando o valor paisagístico do local.

Atendemos clientes em diversos segmentos, como: 
-- Paisagismo Residencial, 
-- Paisagismo Comercial, 
-- Paisagismo Corporativo, 
-- Paisagismo Urbano, 
-- Paisagismo Ambiental,

Name: The Artificial Turf Group
Description:
𝐈𝐧𝐜𝐨𝐫𝐩𝐨𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐀𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐓𝐮𝐫𝐟 𝐐𝐥𝐝 & 𝐀𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐓𝐮𝐫𝐟 𝐍𝐒𝐖.

Synthetic turf, as you might expect, is far more durable than natural grass. It's less susceptible to weeds, pests, or temperature, light, and moisture variations, and it's less easily trampled. A drought won't kill an artificial lawn, and it's less susceptible to the same factors that kill genuine grass.

► 𝐀𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐓𝐮𝐫𝐟 𝐀𝐩𝐩𝐥𝐢𝐜𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐨𝐧𝐬?

 Residential - lawns, around pools, over concrete in patios etc
 Over 50's villages to eliminate the need for watering & mowing
 Child care centres with "Cool King" anti-bacterial turf
 Resorts
Sporting fields - approved FIFA & FIH product

► 𝐖𝐡𝐲 𝐚𝐫𝐭𝐢𝐟𝐢𝐜𝐢𝐚𝐥 𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐟?

 Low Maintenance
When it comes to artificial lawn maintenance, unlike natural lawns, there is no mowing, edging, or fertilising. 

 Child & Pet Friendly
Playing on artificial lawns is completely safe for both children and pets. Unlike natural lawn, artificial grass does not require the use of harsh chemicals for maintenance, such as weed killer, pesticides, or fertiliser. 

 Durability
Artificial lawns, which are made of extremely durable materials, can resist heavy foot traffic for many years. 

 UV resistant & fade protection
The synthetic materials are engineered to withstand Australia's hard summer environment, so your lawn will stay green.

 Less Allergies
Hay fever is caused by rye grass and dust, which are practically impossible to avoid. Artificial lawns have no weeds and dust, which means fewer allergens for you and your family to contend with throughout the spring season. Artificial lawn upkeep does not necessitate the use of chemicals, thus the surface will remain allergen-free for your family.

Name: Earthworks Landscape Architects and Contractors, Inc.
Description:
Earthworks Landscaping has been defining the art of outdoor living in the River Falls and Hudson area since 1978. We specialize in premium patios, retaining walls, landscape lighting, and custom planting designs that elevate your property and lifestyle. Whether you're looking to build a paver patio, solve drainage issues, or create a full backyard retreat, our award-winning team brings expert craftsmanship and creative vision to every project.

We proudly serve River Falls, Hudson, Stillwater, Lake Elmo, Afton, Woodbury, and surrounding areas across western Wisconsin and the east Twin Cities metro. Our clients include high-end homeowners, busy professionals, retirees, and growing families who want more than just curb appeal—they want a space that works, flows, and inspires.

At Earthworks, we believe your outdoor space should be an extension of your home. That's why we take a comprehensive approach to landscape design and installation, starting with an in-depth consultation and 3D design process that helps you visualize the final result. From structural solutions like drainage systems and retaining walls to aesthetic enhancements like low-voltage lighting and perennial gardens, every detail is handled with purpose.

In recent years, we’ve expanded our services to meet demand for complete outdoor living environments—including backyard entertaining areas, natural stone fire pits, outdoor kitchens, and custom poolscapes. Whether we're partnering on a full swimming pool and patio design or building a standalone hardscape feature, we approach every job with the same high standards.

We offer personalized designs, the best warranties in the region, and a commitment to quality that sets us apart. When you're ready to transform your property into a place you'll enjoy for years to come, Earthworks Landscaping is here to bring your vision to life—with bold design, lasting value, and exceptional service.

We provide expert ecological restoration services and operate a regional native seed and plant nursery.

Our ecological restoration team specializes in the construction and management of native landscapes applying proven ecological principles to projects ranging from prairie and wetland restoration to woodland management and invasive species control.

Our native seed and plant nursery produces high-quality, local genotype seed and custom plant material. We offer tailored seed mixes and nursery-grown native plants informed by decades of field experience and region-specific research.

Together, our services support resilient ecosystems and help our clients restore natural function, beauty, and biodiversity to the landscape.

Name: JK Tuinen bv
Description:
JK TUINEN

De kunst van het buitenleven zit hem in de juiste combinatie van natuurlijk schoon, kleuren, geuren, comfort en energie. Een tuin verrijkt het leven zowel binnen- als buitenshuis. Het is de plek waar je tot rust komt of samen met vrienden en familie van geniet.

De natuur heeft een geweldig pallet aan mooie creaties ontwikkeld die door de juiste manier van combineren het hele jaar door voor een prachtig decor kunnen zorgen.

De liefde voor tuinen stroomt bij Jop Koster al vanaf jongs af aan door zijn bloed. Nadat Jop zijn studie afrondde, richtte hij in 2001 JK Tuinen op.

JK Tuinen is sinds die tijd uitgegroeid tot een vooruitstrevende tuininrichter met een team van gepassioneerde hoveniers, die inmiddels al een hele lijst aan mooie projecten hebben ontworpen, opgeleverd en onderhouden.

Jop en zijn team zien elk nieuw project als een uitdaging waarbij het alle aandacht krijgt tot het perfect aansluit bij de bewoners, het huis en de omgeving.

Name: FabLab Divine Nature
Description:
Le FabLab « Divine Nature » est un atelier de fabrication, un laboratoire d'idées et de recherches multidisciplinaire spécialisé dans l'aménagement écologique. Le FabLab célèbre le symbole de l’abeille comme animal sentinelle de la protection de l’environnement. Petite créature aux ailes délicates, elle porte en elle la force de la préservation de l’environnement. Elle est un témoin silencieux des changements qui se produisent dans notre monde naturel. Elle symbolise un engagement à préserver et à restaurer l’équilibre fragile de notre écosystème. L’abeille travaille sans relâche pour collecter le nectar des fleurs, polliniser les plantes et produire le précieux miel. Son travail acharné symbolise un message fort sur l’engagement envers la protection de l’environnement. Le FabLab propose les services de projets d'architecture, d'urbanisme, de paysage et d'environnement. Il gère aussi bien les dossiers de Déclarations Préalables, les permis de construire, les gestions de chantier jusqu'aux publications spécialisées dans ces domaines. Les démarches du FabLab sont inspirées par les valeurs déontologiques, éthiques et écoresponsables. Créé le 13 Juin 2024, le slogan du FabLab « Divine Nature » est : « Protéger, Restaurer, Embellir. Unir pour la Nature ». 

Pour prendre rendez-vous sur Calendly : www.calendly.com/architecte-julie-babigeon , par email : publications.babigeon@gmail.com ou par la ligne de téléphone directe : 0033 674219200 / 0674219200.

Name: Sustainable Solar Grazing
Description:
Our mission is to optimize the biodiversity on your property and increase its biological capital with natural vegetation management.

Sustainable Solar Grazing's management-intensive grazing scheme will outperform any mechanical vegetation service because we will fundamentally improve the health of the soil. Our sheep build healthy soil in a natural manner – increasing both water infiltration and water holding capacity. Over time, this improved soil will help to protect any structure from the dangers of erosion and flooding. This growing, living soil will also help to moderate the ground temperature in the immediate area. On solar panel arrays, this means cooling equipment and optimizing solar panel performance.

Our customers understand the importance of environmental stewardship. By building healthy soils underneath their solar panels and across their property, our customers are not only protecting their investment in their equipment and their land, but they are also investing in the future of their communities.

Name: Jessecology Eco-Landscaping
Description:
Our company's core principles are a deep love of beauty, ethical land stewardship, ecology education and plant literacy. We believe that civilians adopting responsible landscaping and land management principles in suburban and urban areas lays the bedrock for a beautiful future full of possibility and habitat regeneration. When homeowners, business decision makers, municipality managers, campus administrators and park officials partner with Jessecology, we empower them to invest in a better physical future for their neighborhood and community.
Our region's indigenous plants, trees, shrubs and grasses are epic in volume, many of them visually stunning. Sourcing native plants can be challenging; and so we created Saratoga County's first exclusive wildflower farm in 2014. Every year we grow and sell thousands of native species perennials, trees, shrubs and grasses, mostly to our landscaping clients. We can be found occasionally at area festivals and pop-up markets, selling our plants, flower crowns, bouquets, garden art and "Mystery Butterfly Garden Starter Kits." 
Our project portfolio includes hundreds of projects in the Saratoga-Albany-Niskayuna region. Butterfly Gardens and Rain Gardens are our specialty, though Pinebush (dry sand) and Woodland (shade) Gardens are beloved to us as well. We have seeds for sale on our website or available at local boutique shops.
In this age of excess connectivity, we find joy in a slower pace, real connections and being attached to the earth rather than the computer. Please forgive us that we may definitely not respond in a timely manner to social media DM's. 
Website inquiries, email, in person conversations, cups of coffee, old fashioned letters and postcards and phone calls/text messages are much more quickly returned.
Join our email list to keep in touch: http://mailchi.mp/3e3d08eea048/jessecologydiamonds.
::Beauty will save the world::

Name: FREIO Naturspielräume
Description:
Seit über 30 Jahren setzen wir uns leidenschaftlich dafür ein, die Welt für unsere Kinder grüner und erlebnisreicher zu gestalten.
Unsere Mission ist es, pädagogisch sinnvolle, naturnahe und ressourcenschonende Spielräume zu schaffen, in denen Kinder sich frei entfalten können.

Wir glauben fest daran, dass Kinder die Natur erleben und erforschen müssen, um Empathie, Fantasie und Kreativität zu entwickeln. Die heutige Welt ist für junge Menschen oft von digitalen Medien und urbanen Lebensräumen geprägt, aber wir sind fest entschlossen, das zu ändern. In unserer Vision sehen wir Naturspielräume an jeder Kindertagesstätte und an jeder Schule. 

Unsere Leidenschaft für die Natur und unsere Liebe zu Kindern treiben uns an, dieses Ziel zu verfolgen.

Name: Pihasiistiksi Suomi Oy
Description:
Pihasiistiksi Oy on luotettava ja vastuullinen viherrakentamisen kumppani. Toimipisteemme sijaitsevat Lahdessa ja Uudellamaalla. Palvelemme asiakkaitamme ympäri vuoden koko Etelä-Suomen alueella.

Tarjoamme laajat viherrakentamisen palvelut suunnittelusta toteutukseen kaupungeille ja kunnille, taloyhtiöille sekä yksityispihoille. Tarjoamme palvelut myös piha-alueiden ylläpitoon. 

Palveluitamme ovat myös maanrakentaminen, puu- ja kivirakentaminen sekä verkkokaupasta voit ostaa maa-ainekset suursäkeissä, Bendersin pihakivet, siirtonurmen ja kuntan sekä vaihtolavat suoraan pihaan toimitettuna.

Toimitamme maa- ja kiviaineksen sovitussa aikataulussa haluttuun paikkaan. Kuljetuspalvelumme toimittaa ketterästi tuotteet hankaliinkin kohteisiin ja pieniin pihoihin.

Kivipihamme palvelee kesäisin Lahdessa ja kaikki tuotteemme ovat ostettavissa myös verkkokaupassamme. 

Laaja kumppaniverkostomme varmistaa kokonaisurakoiden laadukkaan toteutuksen sovitussa aikataulussa. Pihasiistiksi Oy on osa Helokivi Groupia.

Name: ClimateScaping
Description:
We are a water-conservation company helping homeowners make better decisions on how they use precious resources, interact with nature, and enjoy their yard. By removing water-wasting grass and flammable plants and materials, we help homeowners design, install, and maintain healthy and stunning drought-tolerant ClimateScaped and FireScaped front and back yards. Focused on drought-tolerant grasses, native drought-tolerant colorful plants and flowers, and elegantly incorporating decorative rocks, mulch and stone...we help people reinvent their outdoor areas, while helping the environment at the same time.

Our team is made up of Ecology and Horticulture University students looking to make an impact on climate change. By reintroducing pollinator plants, repairing our soils, cutting back on water use in homes up to 50%, and re-wilding our urban areas with local native wildflowers and plants...we can make a dent in this global crisis around climate, but staring right outside our front doors.

Name: Kronos Landscape & Design
Description:
Merhaba, Biz Kimiz?

Biz, deneyimli bir Peyzaj Mimarı ve Ziraat Mühendisi ekibiyiz ve 2020'den beri Türkiye'nin her köşesine hizmet veriyoruz. İzmir'den yola çıkarak, peyzajda uzmanlığımızı ve tutkumuzu her projemize yansıtarak, çevremizi güzelleştirmeye çalışıyoruz.

Bizimle Çalışmak Ne İfade Eder?

Biz, işimizi seviyoruz. Her bir projeye büyük bir özenle yaklaşıyor ve sizin için en iyi çözümleri sunmak için çalışıyoruz. Bahçenizde veya iş yerinizde yaratmak istediğiniz atmosferi hayal edin, biz de bu hayali gerçeğe dönüştürmek için buradayız.

Ne Sunuyoruz?

Sizin ihtiyaçlarınıza ve tercihlerinize uygun olarak özel tasarlanmış peyzaj projeleri sunuyoruz. Yeşil alanlarınızı planlıyor, bahçenizi düzenliyor, sulama sistemlerini kuruyor ve bitki seçiminde size rehberlik ediyoruz. Her adımı, doğayı ve sizin yaşam tarzınızı ön planda tutarak atıyoruz.

Siz de Bu Yolculuğa Katılmak İster Misiniz?

Eğer siz de bahçenizi bir yaşam alanından daha fazlasına dönüştürmek istiyorsanız, bizimle iletişime geçmekten çekinmeyin. Samimi, uzman ve tutkulu bir ekiple çalışmanın keyfine varın.

Hayal gücünüzü serbest bırakın, gerisini bize bırakın!

Name: JORA Green Building Solutions
Description:
JORA Green Wall System, Het meest betrouwbare systeem voor de realisatie van groene gevels!
Speciaal voor het maken van groene wanden en muren, zowel binnen als buiten, werkt JORA met het in eigen huis ontwikkelde JORA Green Wall System – een modulair systeem met geïntegreerde slimme irrigatie en een natuurlijke voedingsbodem waardoor plantenwanden beter gedijen en minder onderhoud vragen.  

Waar andere systemen gebaseerd op steenwol of andere niet natuurlijke materialen vaak problemen krijgen met de vochthuishouding zorgt het speciaal gestabiliseerde substraat voor een solide basis, ook op de langere termijn. Het substraat transport het vocht en de voedingsstoffen optimaal naar alle planten zodat er ook bij lange droogte periodes voldoende vocht aanwezig is en de tuin een stootje kan hebben.

Kenmerken JORA Green Wall System

-Groot vocht vasthoudend vermogen zodat er ten alle tijde voldoende vocht aanwezig is voor de planten.
-Het systeem heeft een optimale capillaire werking zodat het water evenredig wordt verdeeld en elke plant over de juiste hoeveelheid water beschikt.
-De voedingsbodem heeft een luchtige structuur zodat er altijd voldoende zuurstof beschikbaar blijft voor de plant en waardoor de plat snel en gemakkelijk kan wortelen.
-De voedingsbodem beschikt over de juiste hoeveelheid voedingstoffen en zal veel minder bemest hoeven te worden dan andere systemen.
-Degelijk en gemakkelijk te monteren systeem
-De modules beplanten we vooraf op onze kwekerij waardoor de plaatsing snel en efficiënt kan worden uitgevoerd met weinig overlast en rommel van uitvallende grond bij het inplanten

Name: Veridian Hub - the container garden
Description:
What is it?
Veridian Hub container gardens can be installed in an hour, creating 5-15 m2 of green space per container unit, and we provide a living plant guarantee.

What does it mean?
A frame structure of a standard shipping container. Into the bottom we have built a nearly 1 m3 water tank. Above the tank planting boxes hold plants selected for the target market. In this container garden, an automatic telematic system controls watering and solar power supply, plus collects data from the environment. We envision our Hubs as green spaces that people can enter and make their own.
Hubs for a green future.
Hubs are ideal for urban projects where we can create green space without destroying the existing stone-built environment, like UNESCO cities. In construction, where we can speed up the final phases and we can create green surfaces quicker and more effectively. From a marketing perspective, you can imagine how much more attention-grabbing is a large green space filled with plants in a busy city center, where any marketing campaign can be launched. The hubs continuously collect data from the environment, which, once processed, gives us an opportunity building a greener and healthier future.

Why do we believe in this project?
This is because Hubs allow us to create green spaces with minimal local environmental impact and without any significant environmental intervention. Veridian Hubs are part of clean energy technology because they function independently in island mode, run entirely on renewable energy, and are designed to naturally cleanse and refresh the air.

Name: GREENBRIER LANDSCAPING Inc
Description:
Greenbrier was founded over 25 years ago in Ontario's Waterloo Region by the Medeiros family, who chose to pursue their vocation in the landscaping and green maintenance sector. 

Nelson and Belmira Medeiros, began to look around and understand what the winning choice could be to face the challenges of a market that was already quite aggressive at the time. 

Quality and safety, flexibility and operational capacity. 

It is with these requirements that Greenbrier began its commercial journey, quickly positioning the company within the market of that geographical area just a few kilometers from Toronto.

After about 10 years, they become one of the most qualified companies with the municipalities in the Waterloo Region, establishing themselves as a well-known local player. 

By the end of 2023, the meeting with the Molinari family, founders of the Ecogest brand, who arrived in Canada a year earlier and established Ecogest North America Inc., with the goal of entering the Canadian market, focusing on industrial green maintenance through the use of highly innovative technological equipment.

During the first half of 2025, the two families, decide to unite under the single international brand of Ecogest, and the Molinari family acquires the business from the Medeiros family, maintaining and ensuring the entire company system made up of people and equipment, while providing the Medeiros family with senior operational roles, resulting in a new face for the company, which becomes Greenbrier Landscaping, a division of Ecogest North America.

- Disseny de Jardins: Transformem idees en paisatges captivadors, fusionant creativitat i coneixements botànics per a donar vida als teus somnis de jardí.
- Manteniment: Cuidem de cada detall, des de la poda meticulosa fins a la gestió eficient del reg, per a garantir que el teu jardí es mantingui exuberant i saludable.
- Instal·lació de Sistemes de Reg: Implementem solucions innovadores per a optimitzar l'ús de l'aigua i assegurar l'adequada hidratació de les teves plantes.
- Paisatgisme Sostenible: Ens comprometem amb pràctiques ecològiques per a crear jardins que no sols embelleixen, sinó que també respecten el medi ambient.
- Venta de llenya: Lliurem llenya de qualitat directament a la teva llar, proporcionant una experiència de foc excepcional. Descobreix la comoditat de gaudir de la calidesa de la llenya sense complicacions.

La nostra missió:
A Jardineria Monés, la nostra missió és superar les expectatives dels nostres clients, brindant serveis de jardineria excepcionals que reflecteixin la nostra passió per la naturalesa i la qualitat.

Name: FREIO Naturspielräume

Seit über 30 Jahren setzen wir uns leidenschaftlich dafür ein, die Welt für unsere Kinder grüner und erlebnisreicher zu gestalten.
Unsere Mission ist es, pädagogisch sinnvolle, naturnahe und ressourcenschonende Spielräume zu schaffen, in denen Kinder sich frei entfalten können.

Wir glauben fest daran, dass Kinder die Natur erleben und erforschen müssen, um Empathie, Fantasie und Kreativität zu entwickeln. Die heutige Welt ist für junge Menschen oft von digitalen Medien und urbanen Lebensräumen geprägt, aber wir sind fest entschlossen, das zu ändern. In unserer Vision sehen wir Naturspielräume an jeder Kindertagesstätte und an jeder Schule. 

Unsere Leidenschaft für die Natur und unsere Liebe zu Kindern treiben uns an, dieses Ziel zu verfolgen.

Name: Gayle Gardens
Description:
A small but mighty, female owned company governed by a  passion for design and science. In an effort to create beautiful landscapes, we know that good design will not sustain itself unless it has the right groundwork. 

We bring a holistic approach to every aspect of our business that honors the natural rhythm of the seasons, the intelligence of native plants, and most importantly, practices that are backed by cutting edge soil microbiology. 

While we plan to deliver stunning landscapes, we also consider how the land can inform the design, how it may evolve ten and twenty years down the line, and plan accordingly. The goal is not to build to a certain end, but to change the trajectory in a dynamic process of coevolution between person and place.

It is a privilege and a responsibility to work with the earth and to implement functional landscape elements that enhance the human experience. Beyond aesthetics, there has never been a better time to build back resilient and regenerative landscapes that support our local ecology. In doing so we design to extend our short New England seasons by incorporating nitrogen-fixing, early bulb species, and the long-standing carriages of hardy perennials. This seasonal extension provides winter forage and habitat for wildlife, protective layers for soil biotics, and curiosities all winter long.

It is important for us to acknowledge the wisdom that has been passed down through generations that feeds much of how we approach every new design project. We respectfully acknowledge the Wampanoag people, who have stewarded this land throughout the generations.
